title: "Cake" Americano (American Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- four ounces of butter
- six ounces of white dry sugar
- half a pound of sifted flour
- six egg yolks
- six egg whites
- one quarter glass of milk
- one teaspoon of vanilla

## Directions

1. Beat the butter with the sugar until very fine
2. Add the sifted flour and egg yolks, mix very well
3. Fold in the beaten egg whites, milk, and vanilla
4. Pour into a buttered mold
5. Bake in the oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Albondigas a la Reina (Queen-Style Meatballs)
body:
## Ingredients

- beef and pork in equal proportions or only beef
- saffron
- Castilian pepper
- a piece of cinnamon
- a little cumin
- white bread or bread powder
- three raw eggs per pound of meat
- salt
- raisins
- almonds
- cooked ham
- chorizo
- olives
- raw tomato
- parsley
- water

## Directions

1. Grind beef and pork in equal proportions or only beef with a little saffron, Castilian pepper, a piece of cinnamon, a little cumin and white bread or bread powder; grind first in a machine then with all the spices to refine further
2. Mix with three raw eggs and a little salt per pound of meat
3. Take one tablespoon of meat and make a patty not too thin
4. Place inside a raisin, half an almond, a piece of cooked ham, a small slice of chorizo and an olive
5. Cover everything forming it into a ball shape
6. Fry in very hot butter over low heat
7. Grind a little raw tomato and add minced parsley and a little water to taste
8. As soon as it boils, remove and bathe the meatballs with this and serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Albondigas Fritas (Fried Meatballs)
body:
## Ingredients

- meat prepared as before
- butter
- chile
- two roasted tomatoes
- salt
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Prepare the meat as in the previous recipe
2. Make meatballs of desired size and fry them
3. When done, remove them and in the same butter add a chile that has been ground beforehand with two roasted tomatoes
4. Season with salt and a little vinegar and put the meatballs in to give two boils
5. Then serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Albondigones Asturianos (Asturian-Style Large Meatballs)
body:
## Ingredients

- meat ground and prepared
- a little sherry
- one hard boiled egg
- capers
- almonds
- olives
- green chile or pickled chile
- a few potatoes
- bread powder
- butter
- onion
- white wine
- tomatoes
- salt
- vinegar
- tender lettuces
- fried potatoes

## Directions

1. Grind and prepare the meat as in previous recipes, but add a little sherry
2. Chop one hard boiled egg, capers, almonds and olives; also add green or pickled chile and a few potatoes, all well mixed
3. Spread out the meat to desired size, place all this chopped filling in the middle, cover and form into a ball shape, either round or long
4. Coat with bread powder, fry in very hot butter over low heat
5. When fried, remove and place on a platter with tender lettuces and very thin slices of fried potatoes
6. Prepare a sauce as follows: in very hot butter, well chopped onion with a little white wine, water, salt, vinegar, two roasted and ground tomatoes, and serve
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Albóndigas de Gallina (Chicken Meatballs)
body:
## Ingredients

- Chicken
- Onion
- Tomato
- Flour or bread without sugar
- Broth
- Dry sherry (optional)

## Directions

1. Debone the chicken and mince the meat until ground
2. Make a mixture of onion and peeled and finely minced tomato
3. Add the chicken meat with a little flour or a piece of bread without sugar
4. Mix very well with a small spoon
5. Take small amounts and drop them into the broth
6. As soon as it boils, remove and serve hot
7. If desired, add a small glass of dry sherry
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Alcachofas a la Catalana (Artichokes Catalan Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- artichokes
- salt
- flour
- lard
- pig's feet
- onion
- salt
- one cup of broth

## Directions

1. Split the artichokes in half
2. Place them to cook with salt
3. Remove the spines, drain them, coat them in flour and fry them in lard
4. Separately cook pig's feet with onion and salt
5. When the artichokes are fried add the pig's feet and one cup of broth and let them boil together
6. If it is too thin add a little flour
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Alcachofas a la Italiana (Artichokes Italian-Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- Artichokes
- Water and salt
- Manteca (lard), one tablespoon
- Onions, two large, chopped
- Mushrooms, abundant, chopped
- Meat juice, one cup
- White wine, one glass
- Salt
- Parsley, a bit, chopped
- Bay leaves, two
- Pepper powder

## Directions

1. Cook the artichokes with water and salt.
2. In a pan, put one tablespoon of manteca with two large chopped onions.
3. When fried, add abundant chopped mushrooms, one cup of meat juice, one glass of white wine, salt, a bit of chopped parsley, two bay leaves and pepper powder.
4. Let simmer until it thickens and bathe the artichokes with this sauce.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Alcachofas a la Leonesa (Artichokes Leonese-Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- Artichokes
- Water and salt
- Manteca (lard), one tablespoon
- Lemon juice, from one lemon
- Onions, two
- Broth, one ladle
- Flour, one teaspoon, dissolved in a bit of water
- Pepper powder
- Parsley, chopped

## Directions

1. Cook the artichokes in water with salt.
2. Once cooked, cut into four pieces and let drain.
3. Place in a pan with one tablespoon of manteca, the juice of one lemon, two onions, one ladle of broth, one teaspoon of flour dissolved in a bit of water.
4. Let simmer about ten minutes.
5. Remove the artichokes, strain the sauce and return the artichokes to it so they give a light simmer.
6. Serve with pepper powder and chopped parsley.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Alcachofas a la Vinagreta (Artichokes Vinaigrette)
body:
## Ingredients

- Artichokes
- Water and salt
- Oil
- Vinegar
- Pepper powder
- Salt
- Onion, thin slices, abundant
- French mustard, one teaspoon (optional)

## Directions

1. Remove the first leaves, cook in water with salt.
2. Once cooked, place in cold water.
3. Prepare oil mixed with equal parts water and vinegar, pepper powder and salt.
4. Place the artichokes in this with abundant thin onion slices.
5. If desired, add one teaspoon of French mustard.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Alcachofas Guisadas (Stewed Artichokes)
body:
## Ingredients

- Artichokes
- Water and salt
- Oil
- Garlic, one clove
- Onion, chopped
- Tomatoes, three, roasted and ground
- Pepper
- Capers, about ten
- Vinegar, a bit
- Water, a bit
- Bread powder, white, one teaspoon

## Directions

1. Remove the tip and stem, cook in water with salt.
2. Fry in oil one clove of garlic, one chopped onion, three roasted and ground tomatoes with pepper, about ten capers, a bit of vinegar, a bit of water and one teaspoon of white bread powder.
3. Cut the artichokes in half and let them simmer in this.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Alcachofas Migadas (Breadcrumbed Artichokes)
body:
## Ingredients

- artichokes
- garlic
- oil
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. After cooking them whole, lift the top part and remove the spines
2. Chop garlic, fry it in oil and add sufficient bread crumbs
3. Fill the artichokes with this, brush them with oil and leave them in a warm place
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Alcachofas Rellenas (Stuffed Artichokes with Chicken)
body:
## Ingredients

- Artichokes
- Water and salt
- Chicken, cooked, in small pieces
- Ham
- Parsley, chopped
- Manteca or mantequilla, one tablespoon
- Tomato
- Garlic, one clove
- Onion, peeled and chopped
- Pepper powder
- Clove
- Nutmeg
- Broth

## Directions

1. Cook in water with salt.
2. Remove all the fuzz very well and let all water drain.
3. Dry with a cloth.
4. Prepare a filling of cooked chicken made into small pieces, ham, chopped parsley.
5. Fry all in one tablespoon of manteca or mantequilla with tomato, one clove of garlic, peeled and chopped onion with pepper powder, clove and nutmeg.
6. Fill the artichokes with this, tie them and place in a pan with a bit of broth in the oven.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Alcachofas Rellenas (Stuffed Artichokes with Pork)
body:
## Ingredients

- Artichokes, well cleaned
- Salt
- Pork, partially cooked, ground
- Ham, cooked, in small pieces
- Manteca or mantequilla, one tablespoon
- Tomato
- Onion
- Garlic, peeled and chopped
- Hard-boiled egg yolks, chopped
- Pepper powder
- Cinnamon
- Clove
- Saffron water, one teaspoon
- Bread powder, one teaspoon
- Oil, one tablespoon
- Bay leaves, two
- Castilian pepper
- Ham pieces

## Directions

1. Remove the top leaves from well-cleaned artichokes and cook with salt.
2. Once cooked, remove and let all water drain completely.
3. Dry with a cloth.
4. Have prepared a filling of partially cooked pork, cooked ham in small pieces.
5. Fry this in one tablespoon of manteca or mantequilla with tomato, onion and peeled and chopped garlic, chopped hard-boiled egg yolks, pepper powder, cinnamon and clove, one teaspoon of saffron water and one teaspoon of bread powder.
6. Fill the artichokes with this, tie with hemp twine, making sure the filling does not spill out.
7. Place in a cooking pot with one tablespoon of oil, salt, two bay leaves, some Castilian pepper and ham pieces.
8. Place in the oven and when serving, remove the spices.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Alfajor
body:
## Ingredients

- One bottle of white honey
- One pound of sugar
- A small piece of ginger
- One-eighth ounce of cloves
- One-eighth ounce of Castilian pepper
- One-eighth ounce of Chiapa pepper
- One quarter ounce of cinnamon
- Four ounces of peanut
- Four ounces of toasted sesame seeds
- Two pounds of French sponge cake, ground

## Directions

1. Put the white honey with one pound of sugar and the ginger over the fire and boil for five minutes only, because it will become caramelized
2. While hot, add the cloves, Castilian pepper, Chiapa pepper, and cinnamon, all ground dry
3. Mix with four ounces of peanut, four ounces of toasted sesame, and two pounds of ground French sponge cake
4. Pour into a container or small boxes as desired
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Almendra de Salpor (Almond Drink with Salpor)
body:
## Ingredients

- three ounces of dried salpor
- one ounce of melon seed
- half an ounce of peeled almond
- water
- milk
- cinnamon stick
- sugar to taste

## Directions

1. Cook three ounces of dried salpor with only water
2. When it is cooked, grind one ounce of melon seed and half an ounce of peeled almond
3. Strain with a glass of water
4. Place on the fire and when it thickens add milk and a small stick of cinnamon and sugar to taste
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Almendra para Enfermos (Almond Drink for the Ill)
body:
## Ingredients

- one ounce of melon seed
- one ounce of rice
- half an ounce of almond
- cinnamon stick
- sugar to taste
- milk

## Directions

1. Soak one ounce of melon seed, one ounce of rice, half an ounce of almond
2. Grind the almond well after peeling, the rice well washed, everything well ground
3. Strain with little water
4. Place on the fire with a small stick of cinnamon and sugar to taste
5. When it thickens, add the necessary milk to make a thin atole
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Almibar de Cidra (Citron Syrup)
body:
## Ingredients

- cidra
- water
- salt
- one and a half pounds of sugar clarified per pound of fruit
- cinnamon strips

## Directions

1. Peel the cidra and chop into very small cubes imitating hail
2. Throw into a little boiling water and when it has boiled a few times remove that water and return to the fire with hot clean water
3. Add one tablespoon of salt
4. When blanched, remove and place in cloth and tie well under the stream of water for three days
5. After three days remove and place in clarified honey
6. When the fruit has heated through add cinnamon strips
7. Always take care to clarify one and a half pounds of sugar for one pound of fruit
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Almibar de Durazno (Peach Syrup)
body:
## Ingredients

- water
- sifted ash
- ten large peaches
- one pound of sugar clarified
- cinnamon strips or fig leaf

## Directions

1. Put some water with a ladle of sifted ash in a vessel, and when it comes to a boil throw in ten peaches
2. When they peel, remove them and wash in very clean water
3. Make three cuts with a knife down the middle of each peach
4. Have one pound of sugar already clarified
5. Put the peaches in the clarified sugar to heat
6. They should boil for two hours over moderate heat
7. When they begin to reach the proper consistency, add cinnamon strips or a fig leaf
8. Remove when the syrup has reached medium point
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Almond Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 egg whites
- 8 egg yolks
- half a pound of ground and peeled almonds
- clarified sugar at half-thread stage
- 1 glass of sherry

## Directions

1. Beat the four egg whites and eight yolks separately
2. When both are well beaten, combine them
3. Add half a pound of ground and peeled almonds
4. Pour into a buttered mold
5. Place in the oven or in a bain-marie
6. When cooked, remove and place in a clean mold
7. Have the clarified sugar at half-thread stage with a glass of sherry
8. Coat the cake with this mixture and return to the oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Alverjas a la Italiana (Peas Italian Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- peas
- hot water
- one tablespoon lard
- a small piece of sugar
- salt
- one onion head

## Directions

1. Place well-washed peas in a pot with one cup of water, one tablespoon of lard, a small piece of sugar, salt, and one peeled onion head cut in half
2. Once cooked, serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Alverjas con Costilla de Marrano (Peas with Pork Rib)
body:
## Ingredients

- pork rib
- salt
- two tomatoes
- two green chiles
- peas

## Directions

1. Cook the pork rib with salt
2. In the same broth, cook two tomatoes and two green chiles
3. Cook the peas separately with salt
4. When the tomato is cooked, grind it with the chile and about four tablespoons of cooked peas
5. Dissolve this mixture with a little of the broth in which the rib was cooked
6. Add the peas and the rib, fry everything well, ensuring it is not too thin
7. Serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Alverjas en Adobo (Peas in Adobo Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- peas
- two cooked tomatoes
- one garlic clove
- oregano
- one dried cooked chile
- a small piece of achiote
- one piece of French bread soaked
- pork loin

## Directions

1. Cook the peas as in previous recipes
2. Grind two cooked tomatoes, one garlic clove, a little oregano, one dried cooked chile, a small piece of achiote, and one piece of soaked French bread
3. Dissolve this mixture with the peas' cooking broth, fry it, and add the cooked peas
4. If desired, add pieces of cooked pork loin
5. Serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Alverjas en Leche (Peas in Milk)
body:
## Ingredients

- peas
- salt
- bicarbonate of soda
- one tablespoon butter
- one tablespoon flour
- milk
- nutmeg powder
- Castilian pepper

## Directions

1. Cook the well-washed peas in boiling water with salt and a little bicarbonate of soda
2. Fry one tablespoon of butter with one tablespoon of flour in a pan
3. Once fried, gradually add milk until a thin sauce forms
4. Add a little nutmeg powder and Castilian pepper
5. Add the peas to the sauce and serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Alverjas en Leche (Peas in Milk)
body:
## Ingredients

- peas, well washed
- salt
- a little baking soda
- one tablespoon of butter
- one tablespoon of flour
- milk
- a little ground nutmeg powder
- Castilian pepper

## Directions

1. Cook the peas well washed in boiling water with salt and a little baking soda
2. Fry one tablespoon of butter with one tablespoon of flour
3. When fried, gradually add milk until a thin sauce forms
4. Add a little ground nutmeg powder and Castilian pepper
5. Add the peas to this
6. Serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Alverjas Guisadas (Stewed Peas)
body:
## Ingredients

- peas
- salt
- bicarbonate of soda
- longaniza sausage
- chorizo
- one tablespoon oil
- one garlic clove
- one onion
- one peeled and chopped tomato
- a small piece of fried French bread
- two Castilian peppers
- one clove

## Directions

1. Cook the peas with salt and a little bicarbonate of soda
2. Once cooked, remove the peas
3. In the same water, cook longaniza and chorizo cut into slices
4. Fry one tablespoon of oil with one garlic clove, one onion, and one peeled and chopped tomato
5. Once fried, add the peas, chorizo, and longaniza
6. Grind a small piece of fried French bread with two Castilian peppers and one clove
7. Dissolve this with a little water, add to the stew, and let it come to a boil before serving
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Ante de Camote (Sweet Potato Paste)
body:
## Ingredients

- sweet potato, yellow
- milk, cooked
- sugar

## Directions

1. Cook the yellow sweet potato, strain and weigh it
2. For one pound of sweet potato, use one and a half pounds of sugar; the sweet potato dissolved in two glasses of cooked milk
3. Place on the fire to reach the paste stage
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Ante de Coco (Coconut Paste)
body:
## Ingredients

- three pounds of sugar
- flesh of one coconut, well ground
- three ounces of soaked, ground, and strained rice
- three ounces of peeled and ground almonds
- one liter of milk
- raisins and almonds for decoration

## Directions

1. Clarify three pounds of sugar
2. Add the well-ground flesh of one coconut, three ounces of soaked, ground, and strained rice, three ounces of peeled and ground almonds, and one liter of milk
3. Place over fire and let it reach the consistency of paste
4. Decorate with raisins and almonds
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Ante de Coco y Piña (Coconut and Pineapple Paste)
body:
## Ingredients

- pineapple
- flesh of one coconut
- coconut water
- three pounds of clarified sugar

## Directions

1. Wash and grind pineapple with the flesh of one coconut
2. Dissolve everything with the coconut water and have three pounds of sugar clarified at the right point
3. Add the coconut to let it reach the consistency of paste
4. Decorate
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Ante de Coco y Piña (Coconut and Pineapple Preserve)
body:
## Ingredients

- pineapple
- meat of one coconut
- water from the coconut
- three pounds of sugar

## Directions

1. Wash and grind the pineapple with the meat of one coconut if it is not too acidic
2. Dissolve everything with the water from the coconut
3. Have three pounds of sugar clarified beforehand to medium syrup stage
4. Add the coconut mixture and cook until it reaches the soft-ball stage (punto de ante)
5. Decorate with raisins and almonds
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Ante de Guayaba (Guava Paste)
body:
## Ingredients

- Guava
- Water
- Sugar

## Directions

1. Cook the guava with little water, removing all the dark part at the tip
2. Strain without water and weigh the fruit
3. Add an equal amount of sugar
4. Place over the fire with the water in which the guava was cooked, strained
5. When it doesn't stick to the pan, remove from heat
6. Pour into a container or spread fine powdered sugar on a board
7. Place the paste on it and wrap well to store
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Ante de Mamey (Mamey Preserve)
body:
## Ingredients

- one and one-quarter pounds of sugar
- one pound of mamey, well ground
- one teaspoon of ground cinnamon powder mixed with six cloves
- marquesote cake soaked in sherry
- raisins and chopped almonds

## Directions

1. Clarify one and one-quarter pounds of sugar
2. Add one pound of well-ground mamey
3. When it begins to set, add one teaspoon of ground cinnamon powder mixed with six cloves
4. Serve alone if desired, or place a layer of marquesote soaked in sherry on a platter, then a layer of the preserve
5. Decorate with raisins and chopped almonds
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Ante de Manzana (Apple Paste)
body:
## Ingredients

- apples, split
- a little water
- sugar equal in weight to the cooked apple

## Directions

1. Cook the split apples with a little water
2. When cooked, remove and strain dry
3. Weigh the apple and for each unit of fruit weight add the same weight of sugar
4. Put on the fire with the water in which they cooked until they reach the paste stage
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Ante de Manzana o de Membrillo (Apple or Quince Paste)
body:
## Ingredients

- apple or quince (2 pounds)
- sugar (1 pound)
- water (minimal, used in cooking)

## Directions

1. Cook the apple or quince with a small amount of water.
2. Remove the core and seeds from the fruit.
3. When cooled, strain the fruit without any water.
4. For 2 pounds of fruit, use 1 pound of sugar.
5. Place on fire, adding only the water in which the fruit was cooked.
6. After 1 hour of cooking, let it boil.
7. Pour into molds of desired shape and let cool.
8. The same method is used for guava paste.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Ante de Membrillo (Quince Preserve)
body:
## Ingredients

- quince
- sugar

## Directions

1. Cook the quince
2. When cooked, drain the water in which it was cooked and strain it separately to make a jelly
3. Strain the quince without water and weigh it
4. For every pound of quince, use two pounds of sugar that have been clarified beforehand and brought to medium syrup stage
5. Add the strained quince and let boil until it separates from the pot
6. If desired, store in a well-covered earthenware vessel where it will keep for a long time
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Ante de Piña (Pineapple Preserve)
body:
## Ingredients

- two pounds of sugar
- one pineapple, ground
- six egg yolks
- one-half pound of peeled and ground almonds

## Directions

1. Clarify two pounds of sugar
2. When it reaches the proper stage, add one ground pineapple
3. Let boil until it takes on the consistency of preserve (punto de conserva)
4. Remove and when cold, add six egg yolks and one-half pound of peeled and ground almonds
5. When it reaches the high stage (punto alto), place in the oven to brown
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Arequipa (Arequipa Sweet)
body:
## Ingredients

- one and one-half pounds of sugar
- one and one-half ounces of well-sifted rice flour
- two ounces of peeled and ground almonds
- one liter of milk
- one-half liter of milk
- cinnamon

## Directions

1. Clarify one and one-half pounds of sugar with very little water
2. Lower the heat and add one and one-half ounces of well-sifted rice flour, two ounces of peeled and ground almonds in their dry state, and one liter of milk
3. Place all over fire, leaving the almonds aside
4. When it is about to reach the proper stage, add the almonds dissolved in one-half liter of milk
5. When it reaches the soft-ball stage (punto de ante), pour into a platter
6. Decorate with cinnamon
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Arroz a la Vizcaína (Basque-Style Rice)
body:
## Ingredients

- rice
- tomato
- onion
- garlic
- chorizo
- pork ribs
- pork loin
- chicken or hen
- chicken broth
- peas
- carrot
- potato
- tender green beans
- bell peppers
- snails
- pepper
- clove
- saffron water
- long green chiles (guaques)

## Directions

1. Prepare the rice exactly as in the previous recipe
2. Separately, fry plenty of finely minced tomato, onion and garlic
3. Drop pieces of chorizo, pieces of ribs and pork loin into this (the chorizo should be sliced), with all meat, chicken or hen parboiled and cooked separately
4. Mix all of this into the rice with the chicken broth, cover and add peas, small carrot slices, potato slices, tender green beans, finely chopped bell peppers, snails, pepper powder, clove and a small cup of saffron water
5. Top with long green chiles or guaques, cover and let it cook over very low heat
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Arroz con Calamares (Rice with Squid)
body:
## Ingredients

- one pound of rice
- one can of squid
- tomato
- garlic
- onion
- water or broth

## Directions

1. Fry the rice very well.
2. Add tomato, garlic, and onion.
3. Add the can of squid and cover with water or broth.
4. When it has burst and the liquid is consumed, place on low heat.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Arroz con Leche (Rice with Milk)
body:
## Ingredients

- 0.5 pounds rice
- 1 glass water
- 2 glasses cooked milk
- salt
- 1 cinnamon stick
- 2 ounces sugar

## Directions

1. Wash 0.5 pounds of rice
2. Put it with 1 glass of water on very gentle fire without stirring the rice, only move the pot
3. When the water is consumed, add 2 glasses of cooked milk
4. Add some grains of salt and 1 cinnamon stick
5. When it has boiled sufficiently, add 2 ounces of sugar
6. Serve cold or hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Arroz Regenta (Regent's Rice)
body:
## Ingredients

- rice
- Parmesan cheese powder
- butter
- onion
- flour
- broth or milk
- ham pieces
- mushrooms
- truffles
- chicken livers
- roasted meat
- chicken
- sherry wine
- 2 egg yolks
- lemon juice
- tomato sauce

## Directions

1. Prepare rice as for everyday rice, but before it is done add Parmesan cheese powder, taking care that it remains white
2. Prepare a hollow mold, grease it and put the rice in it and put in the oven
3. Prepare a béchamel as follows: put a little butter, a little onion, flour, broth or milk; when it has boiled add pieces of ham, mushrooms, truffles, chicken livers and roasted meat
4. Chop the chicken as everything else and add to the sauce with a little sherry wine and two egg yolks with lemon juice
5. Remove the rice from the mold and in the interior put the béchamel and on the edge fine tomato sauce
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Arroz Valenciano Caldoso (Valencian Broth Rice)
body:
## Ingredients

- chicken or fat poultry broth
- rice
- oil or lard
- fried seasoning
- pepper powder
- saffron water
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Heat the chicken or poultry broth in advance
2. Fry the rice well in oil or lard
3. Add the fried rice to the broth
4. Remove the chicken and leave the poultry pieces
5. Add the fried seasoning, pepper powder, and saffron water
6. Cook on very low heat without stirring so the rice comes out whole
7. Just before serving, add a little vinegar
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Arroz Valenciano Caldoso (Valencian Broth-based Rice)
body:
## Ingredients

- broth from a hen or plump chickens
- rice, well fried in oil or butter
- fried seasoning
- pepper powder
- saffron water
- vinegar

## Directions

1. In the broth from a hen or plump chickens, drop the rice that has been well fried in oil or butter
2. Remove the hen and leave the chicken pieces
3. Add fried seasoning, pepper powder, and saffron water
4. Just before serving, add a little vinegar
5. Cook over very low heat without stirring so that the rice comes out whole
6. Serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Asado de Carne (Meat Roast)
body:
## Ingredients

- carne (meat)
- agua (water)
- ajo (garlic)
- vinagre (vinegar)
- cebolla (onion)
- tomate (tomato)

## Directions

1. Slice the meat and fry it, being careful not to brown too much
2. Add water, mashed garlic clove and a little vinegar
3. When tender, add raw onion in small pieces and raw tomato
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Aspic de Lomo (Loin Aspic)
body:
## Ingredients

- one pound loin
- beef gelatin
- hard-boiled eggs
- cooked ham
- lettuce
- cucumber
- lemon

## Directions

1. Braise one pound of loin, then press it immediately.
2. Cut into very thin slices.
3. Place in a mold with two glasses of beef gelatin, alternating slices of hard-boiled egg and cooked ham with the meat slices.
4. Cover with gelatin and refrigerate on ice.
5. When unmolded, place on a salad of finely cut lettuce, decorated with cucumber slices and lemon slices.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Atole de Elote con Leche (Corn Atole with Milk)
body:
## Ingredients

- six to eight white corn ears
- water
- one small teaspoon of salt
- half a pound of sugar
- cooked milk
- tender green beans
- cinnamon powder
- or alternatively: one dry chile, a small piece of burnt tamale, a small piece of cinnamon, two Chiapa peppercorns, salt, water

## Directions

1. Shuck about six to eight white corn ears
2. Grind them very well
3. Dissolve this with half a liter of water and strain through loose cloth, adding small amounts of cold water
4. Place on the fire without stopping stirring, with one small teaspoon of salt and half a pound of sugar
5. When it thickens, gradually add cooked milk little by little, as otherwise it will curdle
6. To test doneness, drop a small amount in a bowl of cold water; if it does not rise, it is ready
7. Cook tender green beans with salt and serve a little atole, then a spoonful of cooked corn kernels and sprinkle cinnamon powder on top
8. Alternatively, toast one dry chile, grind it with a small piece of burnt tamale, a small piece of cinnamon and two Chiapa peppercorns, dissolve with a little water and a few grains of salt, and sprinkle over the atole with a small cloth
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Atole de Haba (Fava Bean Atole)
body:
## Ingredients

- fava bean powder
- milk or water
- cinnamon stick
- optionally: one tablespoon of coffee essence
- sugar to taste

## Directions

1. Cook the fava bean powder, if desired with milk, if not with water
2. Add a small stick of cinnamon
3. When made only with water, one tablespoon of coffee essence and sugar to taste can be added
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Atole de Maíz con Leche (Corn Atole with Milk)
body:
## Ingredients

- a little salpor
- lime
- milk
- cinnamon stick
- sugar to taste

## Directions

1. Cook a little salpor as for small tamales, with lime
2. Wash it and remove the germ
3. Give it one pass on the grinding stone, so it is neither whole nor very fine
4. Place on the fire with milk, a small stick of cinnamon and sugar to taste and let it boil for half an hour
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Atolillo (Small Atole)
body:
## Ingredients

- three ounces of rice
- water
- half a liter of milk
- three egg yolks
- a few grains of salt
- four ounces of sugar

## Directions

1. Soak three ounces of rice overnight
2. The following day grind it with water
3. Strain with half a liter of milk and three egg yolks
4. Place on the fire with a few grains of salt and four ounces of sugar
5. If it is too thick add more milk to make a thin atole
6. If desired, serve alone; if not, serve half atolillo and half rice with milk
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Ayote Frito (Fried Squash)
body:
## Ingredients

- squash
- one tablespoon lard
- peeled tomato
- garlic clove
- one tablespoon ground breadcrumb powder
- piece of achiote
- Castilian peppercorns

## Directions

1. Cook the squash as the others
2. Fry in one tablespoon of lard, peeled tomato and one chopped garlic clove
3. Add the squash to this
4. Add one tablespoon of ground breadcrumb powder with a piece of achiote and some Castilian peppercorns
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Ayote Guisado (Stewed Squash)
body:
## Ingredients

- young squash
- salt
- fine masa
- piece of achiote
- Castilian peppercorns
- chile
- cilantro

## Directions

1. Chop the young squash into small squares and cook with salt
2. Grind a little very fine masa with a piece of achiote, some Castilian peppercorns and chile to taste
3. Dissolve this with the same water and add to the pot where the squash is
4. Add a sprig of cilantro and serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Ayote Tierno en Huevo (Young Squash in Egg)
body:
## Ingredients

- young squash
- salt
- beaten egg
- lard and chile
- tomato
- onion

## Directions

1. Peel the young squash, cut into slices, cook with salt
2. When cooked remove and dry with a cloth
3. Wrap in beaten egg
4. Fry in lard and chile
5. Dissolve the tomato and onion
6. Leave the chile whole to eat as desired
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Ayotillos en Tomate (Chayotes in Tomato)
body:
## Ingredients

- two or three peeled tomatoes
- garlic clove
- onion
- one teaspoon oil or lard
- pepper powder
- clove powder
- half cup water
- salt
- chayote
- cheese slices

## Directions

1. Chop two or three peeled tomatoes, one garlic clove and onion
2. Fry in one teaspoon of oil or lard
3. Add pepper powder and clove powder, half a cup of water and a little salt
4. Add the chopped chayote to this; if small put whole
5. When cooked, serve with plenty of cheese slices
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Ayotillos Rellenos (Stuffed Chayotes)
body:
## Ingredients

- chayotes
- salt
- one tablespoon butter
- peeled tomato
- garlic clove
- chopped onion
- cheese
- pepper powder
- one tablespoon butter
- white breadcrumb powder

## Directions

1. Cook whole with salt
2. When cooked, open a small square on each, remove all the inside, chop it and fry in one tablespoon of butter with peeled tomato, one garlic clove and chopped onion
3. When well fried, add plenty of cheese and a little pepper powder
4. Stuff the chayote with this mixture, cover with the same small square
5. Rub with one tablespoon of butter and white breadcrumb powder
6. Place in the oven for ten minutes
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Ayotillos Tiernos (Young Chayotes)
body:
## Ingredients

- young chayotes
- salt
- dried chile soaked and seeded
- oregano
- garlic clove
- three cooked tomatoes
- one teaspoon lard

## Directions

1. If small, cook whole with salt; if not, chop them
2. Grind a soaked and seeded dried chile with a little oregano, one garlic clove, three cooked tomatoes
3. Fry in one teaspoon of lard
4. Add the chayote to this
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Azucarada de Chocolate (Chocolate Frosting)
body:
## Ingredients

- half a teaspoon of butter
- 3 tablespoons of milk
- 2 ounces of dark chocolate
- 2 cups of powdered sugar
- half a teaspoon of vanilla

## Directions

1. Put the milk, butter, and chocolate in a water bath
2. When hot, add the sugar without stopping beating
3. Add the vanilla and continue beating until it reaches a cream consistency
4. If too thick, add a little milk so it can be spread on the cake
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Bacalao a la Chapina (Cod Guatemalan Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- Soaked cod
- Four to six large tomatoes per pound of cod
- Four cloves of garlic
- Three onion heads
- One guaque chile, fried
- A little oregano
- A little cumin
- Castilian peppercorns
- A small piece of annatto
- Half a French bread, fried in lard
- Three tablespoons of good vinegar
- One cup of cod cooking broth
- One glass of oil
- Pickled vegetables, optional
- Green peas, well cooked, optional

## Directions

1. Soak and cook the cod as with previous recipes.
2. Roast four to six large tomatoes, four garlic cloves, three onion heads, and one fried guaque chile.
3. Grind this roasted mixture with a little oregano, a little cumin, some Castilian peppercorns, a small piece of annatto, and half a French bread fried in lard.
4. Mix this ground mixture with three tablespoons of good vinegar and one cup of the cod cooking broth.
5. Fry this mixture in one glass of oil.
6. Place the cod to boil for half an hour in this sauce.
7. When serving, if desired, add chopped pickled vegetables and well-cooked green peas.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Bacalao a la Española (Cod Spanish Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- Oil
- Four large peeled tomatoes
- Red pepper strips, very thin
- Onion slices
- Salt
- Pepper powder
- Cooked cod
- One glass of oil and vinegar
- Canned fried vegetables, optional

## Directions

1. Place a baking dish with a little oil, four large peeled tomatoes cut into pieces, very thin strips of red pepper, onion slices, salt, and pepper powder.
2. Oil a frying pan with one tablespoon of oil.
3. Layer alternately the chopped vegetables and cooked cod that has been prepared as in previous recipes, ensuring the top layer is sauce.
4. Moisten with one glass of oil and vinegar mixture.
5. If desired and available, add a can of fried vegetables.
6. Cook over two fires until it boils.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Bacalao a la Francesa (Cod French Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- cod
- water
- tomatoes
- half bottle oil
- pepper powder

## Directions

1. Soak and cook the cod as previous recipes
2. Roast a quantity of tomatoes on a griddle
3. Remove, peel and remove all seeds, then roughly chop the tomato
4. Place in half a bottle of very hot oil with a little pepper powder and the cod
5. Strain the tomato water and add to this to boil until it reduces
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Bacalao a la Mexicana (Cod Mexican Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- cod
- water
- three dried chiles, fried in lard
- one ounce peeled and toasted almonds
- two cloves
- Castilian peppercorns
- a small piece cinnamon
- abundant lard
- half cup water from the cooked fish
- three spoonfuls good vinegar
- oregano powder
- a little oil

## Directions

1. Soak and cook the cod as the previous recipe
2. Grind three dried chiles fried in lard with one ounce of peeled almonds toasted with hot water
3. Grind this with two cloves, some Castilian peppercorns and a small piece of cinnamon
4. Fry in abundant lard until it rises to the top
5. When well boiled, remove the fat and add half a cup of water in which the fish was cooked, three spoonfuls of good vinegar, oregano powder, a little oil and the cod
6. Let it boil a bit and serve
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Bacalao a la Provenzal (Cod Provençale)
body:
## Ingredients

- sufficient oil
- onion
- tomato
- garlic
- parsley
- pepper
- olives
- capers
- cod

## Directions

1. Fry finely chopped onion in sufficient oil, then add peeled and chopped tomato, a little ground garlic, chopped parsley, pepper, olives, capers, and cod pieces.
2. Serve hot.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Bacalao a la Tirolesa (Cod Tyrolean Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- Soaked cod
- Two bay leaves
- Two dried pasilla chiles, soaked and seeded
- Two cloves of garlic, fried
- A little oregano
- Castilian peppercorns
- A sprig of thyme
- A piece of French bread, browned in lard
- Two tablespoons of vinegar
- One cup of cod cooking broth
- One glass of very hot oil

## Directions

1. After soaking the cod, cook it in water with about two bay leaves.
2. Grind two dried pasilla chiles, soaked and seeded, with two fried garlic cloves, a little oregano, some Castilian peppercorns, a sprig of thyme, and a piece of French bread browned in lard.
3. Mix this ground mixture with two tablespoons of vinegar and one cup of the cooking broth.
4. Fry this in one glass of very hot oil.
5. Place the cod in this mixture and let it reduce.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Bacalao a la Tirolesa (Cod Tyrolean Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- cod
- water
- two bay leaves
- two dried chiles, soaked and seeded
- two cloves garlic, fried
- oregano
- Castilian peppercorns
- sprig thyme
- piece of bread, golden in lard
- two spoonfuls vinegar
- one cup broth
- one glass oil

## Directions

1. Soak the cod and cook in water with two bay leaves
2. Grind two soaked and seeded dried chiles with two fried cloves of garlic, a little oregano, some Castilian peppercorns, a sprig of thyme and a piece of bread browned in lard
3. Mix all this with two spoonfuls of vinegar and one cup of the same broth
4. Fry in one glass of very hot oil
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Bacalao con Morrones (Cod with Red Peppers)
body:
## Ingredients

- cod
- oil
- three heads garlic, peeled and crushed
- two or three chopped onions
- eight or ten large chopped tomatoes
- one jar red peppers
- olives
- capers

## Directions

1. Prepare the cod as in previous recipes
2. Fry in a little hot oil
3. When fried, remove and fry three heads of peeled and crushed garlic in the same oil
4. When they take color, remove them keeping the oil very clean
5. Have two or three chopped onions ready and add to the oil eight or ten large chopped tomatoes with one jar of red peppers in their juice
6. Place the cod in this and let boil sufficiently
7. When serving, add olives and capers
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Bacalao Seco (Dried Cod)
body:
## Ingredients

- dried cod
- water
- one cup oil
- four or six onions, quartered
- two or three peeled and chopped tomatoes
- two raw ground tomatoes
- two spoonfuls vinegar
- salt
- pepper powder
- minced parsley

## Directions

1. Soak the cod overnight in water
2. The next day cook in very clean water
3. When cooked, remove and cut into pieces lengthwise as desired
4. Place a pot on the fire with one cup of oil and four or six onions cut into quarters
5. When they take color, add two or three peeled and chopped tomatoes, two raw ground tomatoes and two spoonfuls of vinegar
6. Season with salt, pepper powder and minced parsley
7. Add the cod with half a cup of the broth in which it was cooked
8. Serve hot or cold
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Bagre en Blanco (Catfish in White Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- oil
- two to three roasted and ground tomatoes
- two garlic cloves
- oregano powder
- two to three cooked onions, shredded
- salt
- one tablespoon vinegar
- french bread, fried
- water
- fish, whole or in pieces

## Directions

1. Fry two to three roasted and ground tomatoes in oil with two garlic cloves.
2. Add oregano powder, two to three cooked shredded onions, salt, one tablespoon of vinegar with a piece of fried french bread dissolved in a little water.
3. Add the whole or cut fish to this preparation.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Barquillos (Wafer Cookies)
body:
## Ingredients

- Half a liter of milk
- Half a pound of sugar
- One pound of sifted bread flour
- Two ounces of melted butter
- Half an ounce of vanilla essence

## Directions

1. Put half a liter of milk with half a pound of sugar in a bowl and beat until no granules remain
2. Add one pound of sifted bread flour and beat so it does not become lumpy
3. Add two ounces of melted butter
4. If too thick, add a little more milk and half an ounce of vanilla essence
5. Heat the wafer iron over charcoal fire
6. Pour in one large spoonful of batter; if the iron is large, three or four wafers can be made at once
7. Close the wafer iron carefully so they do not spread too much
8. When golden, roll them in a tube or stick made for this purpose
9. Remove and place in a location where they will not break
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Barquillos de Primera (First Quality Wafers)
body:
## Ingredients

- half a liter of milk
- half a pound of sugar
- one pound of sifted bread flour
- two ounces of melted butter
- half an ounce of vanilla essence

## Directions

1. Place in a bowl half a liter of milk with half a pound of sugar and beat until there is not a single grain remaining
2. Add one pound of sifted bread flour and beat so it does not become lumpy
3. Add two ounces of melted butter
4. If too thick add a little more milk and half an ounce of vanilla essence
5. Have the wafer iron ready over charcoal fire and drop one large spoonful; if the wafer iron is large three or four can be made at once
6. Close the wafer iron carefully so they do not spread too much
7. When they are golden remove them
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Barquillos de Segunda (Second Grade Wafer Cookies)
body:
## Ingredients

- Half a pound of sugar
- Half a liter of water
- One pound of sifted bread flour
- One tablespoon of melted lard
- Juice of two lemons

## Directions

1. Put half a pound of sugar in half a liter of water and beat very well
2. Add one pound of sifted bread flour
3. Add one tablespoon of melted lard and the juice of two lemons
4. If too thick, add a little more water; if not, leave as is
5. Prepare the griddle and cook like the previous wafer cookies
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Baso de Res Relleno (Stuffed Beef Brisket)
body:
## Ingredients

- beef brisket
- garlic
- potato
- peas
- carrot
- half pound of pork

## Directions

1. Place the beef brisket in boiling water.
2. Prepare garlic, potato, peas, carrot, and half pound of pork.
3. Par-cook the vegetables and chop the meat.
4. Open the brisket to fill.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Baso de Res Relleno (Stuffed Beef Spleen)
body:
## Ingredients

- beef spleen
- garlic
- potato
- peas
- carrot
- half pound pork meat
- salt
- parsley
- onion
- tomato
- sweet bell pepper
- vinegar
- mint

## Directions

1. Place the spleen in boiling water.
2. Prepare garlic, potato, peas, carrot and half a pound of chopped pork meat, with the vegetables parboiled and meat minced.
3. Open the spleen and remove the blood.
4. Fry the blood with salt, parsley, garlic, onion, tomato, sweet bell pepper, vinegar and the vegetables, mixing everything well.
5. Fill the spleen with this mixture, sew it closed, and place it on the fire with water, salt and a sprig of mint.
6. Turn it and let it brown as the liquid reduces.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Bavarois de Ciruela Princesa (Princess Plum Bavarian)
body:
## Ingredients

- plums, two and a half pounds
- sugar, two and a half pounds
- egg yolks, eight
- vanilla, one teaspoon
- milk, cooked, one liter
- gelatin sheets, thirty
- heavy cream, half glass
- egg whites, three, beaten

## Directions

1. Soak the plums in tea water the night before
2. The following day cook them in the same water until they become like a puree, leaving some whole for decoration
3. In a pot place the sugar with the vanilla and mix the yolks with a wooden spoon
4. Add cold cooked milk and gelatin sheets washed in cold water
5. Continue stirring in a water bath until it thickens
6. Remove and continue stirring a little until it is somewhat cold
7. Then add the plum puree, cream and beaten egg whites
8. Wet a mold with water, place the contents in it
9. Place the mold in ice until it hardens
10. Unmold and decorate with the plums, also with Chantilly cream
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Bazo (Spleen)
body:
## Ingredients

- spleen
- salt
- tomatillo
- garlic
- oregano
- dried chile
- French bread
- butter

## Directions

1. After washing the spleen well, split it in half, salt it, place it in the oven or roast it on a grill
2. Then put it to cook in salted water
3. Grind some cooked or toasted tomatillo, one clove of garlic, a little oregano, a dried chile and a piece of soaked French bread
4. Dissolve this in the water in which the spleen cooked, fry it with a little butter and add the spleen cut into pieces of the desired size
5. Serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Bazo Guisado (Stewed Spleen)
body:
## Ingredients

- spleen
- salt
- miltomate, cooked or roasted
- garlic clove
- oregano
- dry chile
- piece of French bread, soaked
- lard

## Directions

1. Salt the spleen and roast it in the oven or grill it.
2. Then cook it in salted water.
3. Grind a bit of cooked or roasted miltomate with a garlic clove, a little oregano, a dry chile, and a piece of soaked French bread.
4. Dissolve this mixture in the water in which the spleen was cooked.
5. Fry with a little lard and add the spleen cut into pieces of desired size.
6. Serve hot.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Bazo Relleno (Stuffed Spleen)
body:
## Ingredients

- spleen
- salt
- oregano powder
- sheep blood, partially cooked
- lard
- onion
- tomato, chopped
- capers
- olives
- pickled vegetables
- ham
- chorizo slices
- pepper powder
- vinegar
- butter

## Directions

1. Clean the spleen well and cut it open lengthwise.
2. Season with salt and oregano powder.
3. Have some partially cooked sheep blood, chopped.
4. In a pan with hot lard, add onion, chopped tomato, capers, olives, pickled vegetables, ham cut lengthwise, chorizo slices, pepper powder and three tablespoons of vinegar.
5. Mix everything well and fry until half done.
6. Fill the spleen with this mixture.
7. Sew it closed with thick thread.
8. Coat well with butter and salt.
9. Put in the oven, stirring it continuously.
10. Baste with its own juice so it does not dry out.
11. Serve with a vegetable salad.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Bebida Nobleza (Nobility Drink)
body:
## Ingredients

- One pineapple
- Five glasses of water
- One pound of peeled tamarind
- Water
- Ten to fifteen glasses of water
- One tablespoon of ground cinnamon powder
- About ten cloves
- Juice of six lemons
- Sugar to taste
- One bottle of red wine
- Thin lemon slices

## Directions

1. Grind one pineapple and put it in infusion for three days with five glasses of water
2. At the same time, put one pound of peeled tamarind with the same amount of water
3. After that time, strain it
4. Add ten to fifteen glasses of water, one tablespoon of ground cinnamon powder with about ten cloves and the juice of six lemons
5. Add sugar to taste and let sit
6. The following day, add one bottle of red wine and serve with very thin lemon slices
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Berenjenas al Graten (Eggplants au Gratin)
body:
## Ingredients

- eggplants
- salt
- lard
- bread crumbs
- milk
- butter
- chopped onion
- bacon in small pieces
- salt and pepper powder
- two eggs
- parmesan cheese powder

## Directions

1. Cut the eggplants into slices or lengthwise
2. Place them in brine and one hour before cooking brown them in lard
3. Soak a little bread crumb in milk and put it in butter with chopped onion and bacon in small pieces, salt and pepper powder, letting it fry for a while
4. Then add the eggplants sprinkling them with parmesan cheese powder
5. Beat two eggs, cover with this and place in the oven or over two fires
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Berenjenas Guisadas (Stewed Eggplants)
body:
## Ingredients

- eggplants
- tomato
- onion
- chorizo
- ham
- flour
- oil
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Cook the eggplants
2. Stew them as in the previous lentil recipe
3. Alternatively, they can be made in oil and vinegar
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Berros Guisados (Braised Watercress)
body:
## Ingredients

- Watercress
- Water
- Salt
- A little baking soda
- One tomato (optional)
- One onion (optional)

## Directions

1. Put a pot with water on the fire, salt, and a little baking soda
2. Prepare the watercress by removing all the stems
3. Wash it very well with hot water
4. Add it to the pot
5. Let it boil for ten minutes on even heat
6. Remove it immediately, because if it stays longer it will turn black
7. If desired, before removing it from the fire, add one halved tomato and one onion
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Berros Guisados (Stewed Watercress)
body:
## Ingredients

- water
- salt
- a little baking soda
- watercress
- hot water
- tomato
- onion

## Directions

1. Put a pot with water on the fire, salt and a little baking soda
2. Prepare the watercress by removing all the stems
3. Wash very well with hot water
4. Add to the pot and let it boil for ten minutes on moderate heat
5. Remove immediately, as if it takes more time it will turn black
6. If desired, before removing from the fire add a halved tomato and an onion to eat thus alone, if not, remove all the water and fry what is greens with tomato and chopped onion
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Biscocho Americano (American Biscuit)
body:
## Ingredients

- one pound of butter
- three egg yolks
- three egg whites
- half a pound of flour
- six ounces of sifted sugar
- zest of one lemon
- nutmeg powder
- cinnamon powder
- a small glass of rum or dry sherry

## Directions

1. Beat the butter for one hour
2. Add the egg yolks and beaten egg whites and beat another hour
3. Add the flour, sifted sugar, lemon zest, nutmeg, cinnamon, and rum or sherry
4. Place in buttered molds or paper boxes
5. Bake in the oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Biscuits de Leche (Milk Biscuits)
body:
## Ingredients

- two cups flour
- salt
- four tablespoons Royal baking powder
- a pinch of bicarbonate of soda
- five tablespoons butter
- one cup curdled milk
- butter for brushing

## Directions

1. Mix the bicarbonate of soda with the butter until it resembles coarse breadcrumbs.
2. Place on a kneading board and knead for forty seconds.
3. Cut biscuits, rolling them out with a rolling pin, and place on a greased baking sheet.
4. Brush with butter and bake in the oven.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Bistec (Steak)
body:
## Ingredients

- good quality meat sliced
- butter
- orange juice or a little vinegar
- pepper powder
- onion sliced
- raw tomato
- parsley

## Directions

1. Make slices from good meat and fry in little butter after tenderizing, adding orange juice or a little vinegar and pepper powder
2. Have butter or buttter prepared in a pan
3. Some like it well cooked and others with only two turns
4. Serve with sliced onion, raw tomato and minced parsley
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Bistec a la Americana (American-Style Steak)
body:
## Ingredients

- tenderized, round pieces of meat
- sour orange juice
- many onions sliced very thin
- butter, oil or buttermilk
- fried potatoes or soufflés
- tender lettuce

## Directions

1. Prepare tenderized, round pieces of meat; if they are from the side leave the bone
2. Add sour orange juice and many very thinly sliced onions and fry in butter, oil or buttermilk
3. Serve with two turns along with fried potatoes or soufflés and tender lettuce
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Bistec a la Milanesa (Milanesa-Style Steak)
body:
## Ingredients

- tenderized meat slices
- salt
- pepper powder
- one egg
- white bread powder

## Directions

1. Make slices from tenderized meat, not too thin, and season with salt and a little pepper powder
2. Beat one egg (white and yolk) with salt
3. Dip the meat in the egg and then coat with white bread powder
4. Fry in very hot butter over low heat
5. Serve with lettuces and hot sauce
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Bistec con Harina (Steak with Flour)
body:
## Ingredients

- meat slices
- butter
- tomato
- parsley
- onion, chopped with tender stems
- one tablespoon flour
- water

## Directions

1. Fry the meat slices as before
2. In the same butter add tomato, parsley, chopped onion with tender stems
3. Once fried, add one tablespoon of flour, give it two turns and add water until the meat cooks
4. Let it boil for ten minutes
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Bizcocho (Sponge Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 egg whites
- 6 egg yolks
- 4 ounces of sugar
- 3 ounces of potato starch
- 2 ounces of sifted bread flour

## Directions

1. Beat six egg whites to stiff peaks
2. When well firm, mix in the yolks beaten with four ounces of sugar
3. Then add three ounces of potato starch and two ounces of well-sifted bread flour
4. Pour into a mold coated with butter or paper boxes
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Bizcocho de Albaricoque (Apricot Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- eggs (2)
- milk (1 cup)
- butter (2.5 teaspoons)
- sugar (1 cup)
- flour (1 cup)
- Royal baking powder (1 teaspoon)
- vanilla essence (1 teaspoon)
- apricots with whipped cream (for filling)

## Directions

1. Beat the eggs with the sugar.
2. Add the flour mixed with Royal baking powder and hot milk mixed with flavoring.
3. Beat very well.
4. Pour into the oven in layers.
5. When cooked, layer in a serving platter: one layer of cake, one layer of apricots with whipped cream, another layer of cake, and finally a layer of apricots and sweetened cream on top.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Bizcocho de Fresa (Strawberry Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- one cup of sugar
- four tablespoons of butter
- one egg
- one cup of flour
- one tablespoon of Royal baking powder
- a little salt
- one cup of milk
- one teaspoon of vanilla
- one teaspoon of cream
- one teaspoon of strawberries

## Directions

1. Beat the butter and sugar together.
2. Add the beaten egg.
3. Add the flour and half of the milk.
4. Add the Royal baking powder, vanilla, and the rest of the milk.
5. Place in the oven in a very tall mold.
6. When cool, split in half and cover with strawberries mashed with sugar and cream on top.
7. Place the other layer on top and more strawberries on top.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Bizcocho de Naranja (Orange Sponge Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- Half pound of dry sugar
- Eight egg yolks
- Eight egg whites
- Half pound of sifted flour
- Zest of one sweet orange
- One teaspoon of Royal baking powder
- Butter for greasing

## Directions

1. Beat half pound of dry sugar with eight egg yolks until thick
2. Add eight well-beaten egg whites with half pound of sifted flour, orange zest, and one teaspoon of Royal baking powder
3. Pour into a buttered mold
4. Place in a hot oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Bizcocho Romántico (Romantic Sponge Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 glass of wine
- 4 egg yolks
- a pinch of salt
- 12 ounces of lard
- 1.5 pounds of sifted flour

## Directions

1. Put one glass of wine and add four egg yolks, a pinch of salt, and twelve ounces of lard
2. Mix everything well together
3. Add one and a half pounds of sifted flour and stir without kneading
4. Form small balls of the desired size, coat them in beaten egg, dust with powdered sugar, and place in the oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Bizcochos (Sponge Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 egg whites
- 6 egg yolks
- 1 ounce chocolate powder
- 4 ounces sifted bread flour

## Directions

1. Beat the six egg whites as if for nougat
2. Mix in the six yolks with one ounce of chocolate powder and four ounces of sifted bread flour
3. Stir together and place in a mold greased with lard in the oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Bocado a la Reina (Royal Bite)
body:
## Ingredients

- one pound well-clarified sugar
- six egg yolks
- four ounces butter
- one cup pineapple juice

## Directions

1. Put one pound of well-clarified sugar on the heat; when it reaches caramel point, remove from heat and when cool, mix in six egg yolks with four ounces of butter.
2. Return to heat without stopping to stir, add one cup of pineapple juice, and when thickened, put on a plate and serve.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Bojón en Chirmol (Bojón in Chirmol Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- bojón
- two tomatoes, peeled
- onion
- chile

## Directions

1. Peel the bojón, removing all the skin to chop only the center which is the most tender part
2. Cook with about two peeled tomatoes, onion, and chile
3. When well cooked, mash to serve as the previous recipe
4. The same is done with palmito
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Bolas de Berlín (Berlin Balls)
body:
## Ingredients

- one and a half pounds of sifted flour
- three eggs
- two and a half cups of milk
- a pinch of salt
- two ounces of sugar
- one and a half cups of bread yeast

## Directions

1. Mix everything at eight o'clock in the evening
2. The next morning, stretch out the dough with a rolling pin
3. Cut rounds the size desired
4. Place jelly in the middle and put egg white on the edges to seal the two halves
5. Let rest for half an hour to an hour
6. Then fry in very hot lard
7. Before serving, sprinkle sifted sugar over them
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Borrachos (Brandy-soaked Cakes)
body:
## Ingredients

- one pound of flour
- one and a half tablespoons of beer yeast
- three and a half eggs
- half a glass of warm milk
- seven more eggs
- six ounces of melted butter
- two ounces of ground sugar
- butter for greasing molds
- clarified honey at the thread stage
- plenty of cognac

## Directions

1. Put one pound of flour with one and a half tablespoons of beer yeast, add three eggs and half a glass of warm milk
2. One by one mix in seven more eggs with six ounces of melted butter and two ounces of ground sugar
3. Knead until it becomes very white
4. Place in small molds greased with butter in the oven
5. When cooked, remove and give them a bath in honey at the thread stage mixed with plenty of cognac
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Bowl de Champaña (Champagne Bowl)
body:
## Ingredients

- Pieces of ice
- One bottle of champagne
- Four small glasses of very fine cognac
- One small glass of maraschino
- One bottle of Apollinaris
- One small glass of Angostura bitters
- One bottle of white wine
- Pieces of frozen ripe pineapple
- One jar of grapes with all their liquid

## Directions

1. Put pieces of ice in a container
2. Add one bottle of champagne, four small glasses of very fine cognac, one small glass of maraschino, one bottle of Apollinaris, one small glass of Angostura bitters, one bottle of white wine, pieces of frozen ripe pineapple and one jar of grapes with all their liquid
3. Serve with pieces of ice
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Brazilian Omelette (Tortilla Brasileña)
body:
## Ingredients

- Oil
- Onions
- Salt
- Tomatoes
- Oregano powder
- Pepper powder
- Thyme powder
- Parsley
- Cooked fish
- Eggs

## Directions

1. Fry in a tablespoon of oil three or four onions with salt (only the heads).
2. Add two peeled and chopped tomatoes.
3. Add oregano powder, pepper powder and thyme powder.
4. Add a little chopped parsley and a piece of cooked fish.
5. Mix everything well and stir with the egg, which will have been previously prepared as in the others.
6. Fry.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Brazo de Gitano (Spanish Sponge Roll)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- half a cup of sugar
- 6 tablespoons of cold water
- half a cup of flour
- half a teaspoon of Royal baking powder
- quarter teaspoon of salt
- cream or jelly of desired flavor
- powdered sugar

## Directions

1. Separate the eggs
2. Beat yolks until thick
3. Add sugar without stopping beating
4. Add water without stopping moving
5. Sift the dry ingredients together
6. Add to the yolks and fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites
7. Line a pan with waxed paper
8. Pour the batter thinly into the mold
9. Bake in a moderate oven for fifteen minutes
10. Remove from mold and place on a damp cloth dusted with powdered sugar
11. Remove paper and spread with cream or jelly of desired flavor
12. Roll without letting it cool
13. Place on a cold cloth in a platter
14. Dust with powdered sugar; everything must be done lightly because if it cools the pastry will crack when rolling
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Budin de Macarrones (Macaroni Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- one pound of macaroni
- salt
- drops of lemon
- half a pound of butter
- four ounces of cooked diced ham
- half a pound of parmesan cheese
- one glass of white wine
- one cup of cream
- six whole eggs

## Directions

1. Cook one pound of macaroni in salted water with a few drops of lemon
2. Mix with half a pound of butter, four ounces of cooked diced ham, half a pound of parmesan cheese, one glass of white wine, one cup of cream, and six whole beaten eggs
3. Mix everything well and pour into a greased mold
4. Put in the oven for ten minutes
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Budín (Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 egg whites
- 6 egg yolks
- 4 ounces sugar
- 4 ounces butter
- 4 ounces salpor flour
- 4 ounces bread flour
- 1 teaspoon Royal baking powder
- 2 ounces candied fruits: fig, chilacayote, orange and lemon, chopped
- 1 ounce raisins
- peeled and chopped almonds

## Directions

1. Beat 6 egg whites like for nougat
2. Add the egg yolks beaten with 4 ounces of sugar and 4 ounces of butter
3. Mix in 4 ounces of salpor flour and 4 ounces of bread flour, mixing everything very well
4. Mix in 1 teaspoon of Royal, 2 ounces of candied fruits (fig, chilacayote, orange and lemon), all chopped, 1 ounce of raisins and peeled and chopped almonds
5. After mixing everything well, pour into a mold greased with butter
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Budín con Almendras (Pudding with Almonds)
body:
## Ingredients

- Eight egg yolks
- Six ounces of well-ground sugar
- Six beaten egg whites
- Half pound of ground almonds
- Six ounces of well-sifted starch
- Half teaspoon of Royal

## Directions

1. Place egg yolks with six ounces of well-ground sugar
2. Beat for half an hour
3. Mix in six beaten egg whites and half pound of ground almonds, six ounces of well-sifted starch, and half teaspoon of Royal
4. Pour into a well-buttered mold
5. Put in a hot oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Budín de Bizcocho (Sponge Cake Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 0.5 pounds sugar
- 1.5 glasses milk
- 3 ounces melted butter
- 0.25 ounce cinnamon powder
- 1 ounce raisins
- figs
- chilacayotes
- candied oranges cut lengthwise
- 0.5 pounds crushed sponge cakes
- 9 eggs

## Directions

1. Put in a dish 0.5 pounds of sugar, 1.5 glasses of milk, 3 ounces of melted butter, 0.25 ounce of cinnamon powder, 1 ounce of raisins, some figs, chilacayotes, candied oranges cut lengthwise, and 0.5 pounds of crushed sponge cakes
2. Beat 9 eggs as for marquesote
3. Mix everything very well
4. In a butter-greased mold, pour the mixture
5. Put in the oven for about 20 minutes
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Budín de Coco (Coconut Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 coconut, ground
- 2 ounces peeled almonds
- 1 ounce peeled walnuts
- 1 pound sugar clarified to half point
- 6 egg yolks
- butter
- bread powder

## Directions

1. Grind 1 coconut, 2 ounces of peeled almonds, and 1 ounce of walnuts peeled with hot water
2. Have clarified 1 pound of sugar to half point
3. Add all the ground mixture to it
4. Put on the fire until it thickens
5. Remove and when cold, add 6 egg yolks
6. Return to the fire until it reaches the point of before (ante)
7. Grease a mold with butter and bread powder
8. Pour the mixture into it and put in the oven for 10 minutes
9. Insert a knife and if it comes out clean, it is ready to serve
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Budín de Gabinete (Cabinet Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 8 eggs
- 0.5 pound sugar
- 0.5 pound butter or lard
- 1 pound bread flour, sifted
- zest of 1 lemon or 1 sweet orange

## Directions

1. Beat 8 eggs, the whites like for nougat and the yolks with 0.5 pound of sugar and 0.5 pound of butter or lard
2. When well beaten, mix them together
3. Mix in 1 pound of well-sifted bread flour and the zest of 1 lemon or 1 sweet orange
4. Pour into a mold greased with lard and into the oven hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Budín de la A. (A. Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 7 egg yolks
- 0.5 pound sugar
- 0.5 pound butter
- 7 egg whites
- 1 pound bread flour
- 1 cup milk
- 1 teaspoon Royal baking powder
- 2 ounces chocolate powder (optional)

## Directions

1. Beat 7 egg yolks with 0.5 pound of sugar and 0.5 pound of butter
2. When everything is well beaten, mix with the 7 egg whites that will have been beaten like for nougat
3. Add 1 pound of bread flour, 1 cup of milk and 1 teaspoon of Royal
4. Place in a mold greased with lard and bake hot
5. If desired, this batter can be made in two parts and in one of them put 2 ounces of chocolate powder; place one layer of batter and one of chocolate
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Budín de Macarrones (Macaroni Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound macaroni
- salt
- a few drops of lemon
- half a pound of butter
- 4 ounces of cooked ham, chopped
- half a pound of Parmesan cheese
- 1 glass of white wine
- 1 cup of cream
- 6 whole eggs, well beaten
- butter for greasing the mold
- butter for the sauce
- oil for the sauce
- onion
- roasted garlic
- 1 tablespoon flour
- 1 cup milk
- sufficient mushrooms
- salt for the sauce

## Directions

1. Cook 1 pound of macaroni in salted water with a few drops of lemon
2. Mix the cooked macaroni with half a pound of butter, 4 ounces of chopped cooked ham, half a pound of Parmesan cheese, 1 glass of white wine, 1 cup of cream, and 6 well-beaten whole eggs, mixing everything well
3. Pour the mixture into a buttered mold and bake in the oven for 10 minutes
4. For the sauce: fry butter, oil, onion, and roasted garlic; add 1 tablespoon of flour dissolved in 1 cup of milk, sufficient mushrooms, and salt
5. Serve the pudding with this sauce
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Buñuelos (Fried Dough Puffs)
body:
## Ingredients

- two glasses of water (about half a liter)
- a few grains of salt
- half a teaspoon of lard
- half a pound of sifted flour
- nine eggs (if small), or eight eggs (if large)
- sufficient lard for frying
- white honey
- water
- dill flowers

## Directions

1. Put a saucepan on the fire with two glasses of water or about half a liter with a few grains of salt
2. When it comes to a boil, add half a teaspoon of lard
3. Remove from the fire and add half a pound of well-sifted flour
4. Return to the fire without stopping stirring
5. When it no longer sticks to the hand, remove it and add the eggs one by one, nine if they are small, eight if they are large
6. Once everything is well mixed, with a small spoon drop the buñuelos into a skillet with sufficient lard that is boiling
7. Prepare some white honey with water so it is not so thick
8. Serve the buñuelos with this honey and adorn with dill flowers
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Buñuelos (Fried Pastry Puffs)
body:
## Ingredients

- half a pound of flour
- 6 eggs
- a little salt
- half a teaspoon of vanilla
- 1 tablespoon of Royal baking powder

## Directions

1. Place half a pound of flour in a dish
2. Add the six eggs one by one
3. Mix well
4. Add a little salt
5. Add half a teaspoon of vanilla
6. Add one tablespoon of Royal baking powder
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Buñuelos (Fritters)
body:
## Ingredients

- Water (two glasses or half a liter)
- Salt
- Lard (half a teaspoonful)
- Flour (half a pound, well sifted)
- Eggs (eight to nine, depending on size)
- Lard (sufficient for frying)

## Directions

1. Put a saucepan on the heat with two glasses of water (or half a liter) and a pinch of salt.
2. When it boils, add half a teaspoonful of lard, remove from the heat and add half a pound of well-sifted flour.
3. Put back on the heat without stopping stirring it.
4. When it no longer sticks to the hand, remove it and add eggs one by one, eight if they are large, nine if they are small.
5. Mix everything well with a small spoon and drop the fritters one by one into a pan with sufficient lard.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Buñuelos (Fritters)
body:
## Ingredients

- half a pound of flour
- six eggs
- a little salt
- half a teaspoon of vanilla
- one tablespoon of Royal baking powder

## Directions

1. Place half a pound of flour in a bowl
2. Add the eggs one by one, mixing well
3. Add salt, vanilla, and Royal baking powder and mix
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Buñuelos (Fritters)
body:
## Ingredients

- two pounds of bread flour, starch, or salpor flour, well sifted
- one liter of water
- one-eighth ounce of anise
- twelve eggs
- lard for frying
- half water and half white honey, or one pound of clarified sugar at high stage
- small roses and a sprig of fennel

## Directions

1. Place two pounds of well-sifted flour in a strong pot
2. Add one liter of water and a small amount of water in which one-eighth ounce of anise has been boiled
3. Place over fire, stirring vigorously with a wooden paddle
4. When the dough is cooked (does not stick to the hand when touched), remove from heat and place in a wrung-out damp cloth to prevent a crust from forming
5. The next day, place in a trough, add one egg and knead for ten minutes
6. Add another egg and knead for another ten minutes
7. Continue adding one egg every ten minutes until all twelve eggs are incorporated
8. Have a clay earthenware pan prepared with sufficient lard over a high flame
9. With the point of a knife, take small amounts of dough and drop into the lard, turning them on all sides with a pointed stick
10. Remove and coat with a mixture of half water and half white honey, or with one pound of clarified sugar at high stage
11. Decorate with small roses and a sprig of fennel
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Cabeza de Carnero (Sheep's Head)
body:
## Ingredients

- sheep head
- salt
- chickpeas
- leek bundle
- garlic head
- chayote
- cabbage
- carrot
- turnip
- kohlrabi
- potatoes
- ham piece
- chorizo piece
- French roll
- cumin

## Directions

1. Clean the head well and cut in half
2. Cook with salt, plenty of chickpeas, a bundle of leeks, a head of garlic, chayote, cabbage, carrot, turnip, kohlrabi, potatoes, a piece of ham, and a piece of chorizo
3. Grind a French roll with a little cumin and add to the pot
4. Use the broth for soups and serve the rest as a potage
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Cabeza de Marrano en Revolcado (Pork Head in Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- Pork head
- Salt
- Tomatillo
- Cooked tomato
- Garlic clove
- Oregano
- Cumin
- Castilian peppers
- Guache chile
- Achiote
- Onion
- French bread

## Directions

1. Cook the head well with salt
2. Grind together a little tomatillo, cooked tomato, one garlic clove, a little oregano, cumin, some Castilian peppers, a guache chile, a small piece of achiote, a roasted onion head, and a soaked piece of French bread
3. Fry this mixture in a little lard
4. Thin it with the same broth in which the head was cooked
5. Add pieces of meat of desired size
6. Serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Cabeza de Ternera (Calf's Head)
body:
## Ingredients

- calf's head
- salt
- parsley
- garlic
- ham
- pepper powder
- butter, melted
- water
- parsley bundle
- leeks
- orange leaves
