- one tablespoon of butter

## Directions

1. Peel the apples and cook them in the clarified sugar
2. When tender, remove and let the syrup thicken more
3. Cook the peaches separately in the same manner, or prepare five peaches first
4. When done, remove and cook five apples in the same syrup
5. When tender, place both fruits on a platter
6. Prepare the rice cooked in milk with egg yolks and butter
7. Mix this with the thick syrup and cover the apples
8. Place in the oven to brown
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Manzanas Jaleadas (Candied Apples)
body:
## Ingredients

- ten or twelve apples
- one teaspoonful of lime water (lejía de cal)
- one pound and a half of sugar, clarified
- a handful of cloves
- almonds and raisins, chopped, or cinnamon powder

## Directions

1. Peel ten or twelve apples, place in water with one teaspoonful of lime water for one hour
2. Have one pound and a half of sugar clarified, wash the apples, make three small cuts with the knife and place in the honey on the fire with a handful of cloves
3. When they have soaked through, remove and place on the platter; if the honey is still thin, let it boil a quarter hour more
4. Cover the apples with this, top with chopped almonds and raisins, or if not, cinnamon powder
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Marquesote (Marquesote Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- Two cups of flour
- One cup of sugar
- One tablespoon of Royal
- Four ounces of butter
- Two eggs
- One cup of milk

## Directions

1. Sift everything very well
2. Add one cup of milk
3. Beat the two eggs as for marquesote
4. Mix everything very well
5. Stir in a circular motion
6. Pour into a buttered small pan
7. Put in the oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Marquesote (Spanish Sponge Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- eight eggs
- four ounces of sugar
- six ounces of flour

## Directions

1. Beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form
2. When they are well set, mix in the egg yolks and the sugar, ground and sifted
3. Then add the sifted flour
4. Put in small greased molds and place in the oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Marquesote (Sponge Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- twelve egg whites
- six egg yolks
- six ounces of sugar
- six ounces of cornstarch
- two ounces of sifted bread flour

## Directions

1. Beat the egg whites until stiff like nougat
2. Beat the yolks with sugar until well beaten
3. Combine both mixtures
4. Add the cornstarch and sifted bread flour
5. Place in a buttered pan
6. Bake in a moderate oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Marquesote de Harina (Flour Sponge Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- sixteen egg whites
- one pound of flour
- one pound of ground sugar

## Directions

1. Beat sixteen egg whites to stiff peaks
2. Have one pound of flour and one pound of ground sugar sifted
3. Once the egg whites are well beaten, add the sugar and the egg yolks and finally the flour, mixing without beating
4. Place in greased molds and put in a gentle oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Marquesotes (Marquesote Cakes)
body:
## Ingredients

- eight egg whites
- egg yolks
- seven ounces powdered sugar
- half pound rice flour, well sifted
- lard

## Directions

1. Beat eight egg whites; when they are very stiff, mix in the yolks with seven ounces of powdered sugar and half a pound of well-sifted rice flour.
2. Mix well and put into molds well coated with lard and bake in the oven.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Masa de Hojaldre (Puff Pastry Dough)
body:
## Ingredients

- one pound of flour
- half a teaspoon of salt
- six eggs
- four ounces of lard
- a little water if needed

## Directions

1. Put one pound of flour, half a teaspoon of salt, and six eggs together
2. Add four ounces of lard, and if it is too stiff add a little water so that it becomes a smooth dough
3. Knead very well and let rest for half an hour
4. This dough serves for many pastries
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Masa de Hojaldre (Puff Pastry)
body:
## Ingredients

- una libra de harina
- media cucharadita de sal
- seis huevos
- cuatro onzas de manteca
- un poquito de agua

## Directions

1. Se pone una libra de harina, media cucharadita de sal, seis huevos; cuatro onzas de manteca y si está muy dura se le pone un poquito de agua para que quede una pasta suave
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Mayonesa (Mayonnaise)
body:
## Ingredients

- egg yolks
- oil
- salt
- vinegar
- French mustard

## Directions

1. Beat four raw egg yolks, letting a large spoonful of oil fall drop by drop
2. When it begins to thicken, let it fall in a thin stream
3. When well thick, let sit for half an hour and then add salt, a tablespoon of very good vinegar, and if desired, a tablespoon of French mustard
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Mazapán (Marzipan)
body:
## Ingredients

- Two pounds of peanut
- Water for blanching
- One egg white
- Three glasses of cooked milk
- Three pounds of well-clarified sugar

## Directions

1. Put two pounds of peanut in a little lime water
2. When it has boiled sufficiently and peels, remove from heat
3. The next day, wash in a fine-mesh basket
4. Change the water many times until all three skins covering it are removed
5. Grind in a very clean stone mortar and wet with a little water where an egg white has been beaten so it doesn't stick
6. Dissolve this with three glasses of cooked milk
7. Add to three pounds of well-clarified sugar at high point
8. When it reaches the consistency of before, remove from heat and decorate with dragées
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Melocotón (Peach Syrup)
body:
## Ingredients

- peaches
- water with lime lye
- one and a half pounds of sugar clarified per pound of fruit
- cinnamon strips

## Directions

1. Peel the peach and remove all the pit
2. Soak for half an hour in water with two teaspoons of lime lye
3. Blanch in clean water
4. When blanched place in cold water
5. Have clarified one and a half pounds of sugar for one pound of fruit
6. Put the peach in the syrup to reach the proper point
7. Add cinnamon strips and serve as syrup
8. If desired remove and let dry in the sun for one or two days, then coat with high-point honey
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Membrillo (Quince Preserve)
body:
## Ingredients

- quince
- sugar and honey (amount not specified)
- water

## Directions

1. Peel the quince
2. Remove the seeds and skin
3. Parboil it, cutting it to the desired size
4. Remove it and place in cold water
5. Then place it in the honey to cook through
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Membrillo (Quince)
body:
## Ingredients

- quince
- water

## Directions

1. Peel the quince and remove the seeds and pith
2. Blanch cutting it into whatever size is desired
3. Remove and place in cold water
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Merengues (Meringues)
body:
## Ingredients

- egg whites
- sugar syrup (from previous recipe)
- fresh butter or butter mixed with quince paste for filling

## Directions

1. Beat egg whites as in the previous recipe, making sure the syrup is very overcooked
2. When cold, place a damp piece of paper on a thin board and put a teaspoon of nougat on it
3. Put in the oven; if desired remove white, if not let them take on color, leave for five minutes
4. Then remove and with great delicacy join one with another as a cap to form true meringues
5. They can also be filled before joining with fresh butter or mixed with quince paste, and once filled, joined together
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Mermelada de Naranja (Orange Marmalade)
body:
## Ingredients

- two large ripe oranges
- water
- one pound of clarified sugar

## Directions

1. Place the two large ripe oranges in hot water
2. After boiling for a quarter of an hour, remove that water and place them again in boiling water
3. At the same time remove that water and put another one for a third time
4. After boiling the same amount of time, split them and cut the skin very thin
5. Have one pound of sugar clarified, put the orange into it and then remove the white pith from the inside and chop it finely and put it with the orange to soak well
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Mienflis de Avena (Oatmeal Cakes)
body:
## Ingredients

- one cup of quick oats
- one cup of sour milk or curdled milk
- one egg
- one half cup of brown sugar
- one cup of wheat flour
- one half teaspoon of salt
- one tablespoon of Royal baking powder
- one half teaspoon of baking soda
- melted butter

## Directions

1. Soak the oats in the milk for one hour
2. Add the egg and beat well
3. Then add the sugar and the flour sifted with the Royal baking powder and baking soda and the melted butter
4. Mix well
5. Butter the small molds and place them in a hot oven for ten to twenty minutes
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Mienflís de Avena (Oatmeal Muffins)
body:
## Ingredients

- one cup quick oats
- one cup sour or curdled milk
- one egg
- half cup brown sugar
- one cup wheat flour
- half teaspoon salt
- one tablespoon Royal baking powder
- half teaspoon bicarbonate of soda
- melted butter

## Directions

1. Soak the oats in milk for one hour.
2. Add the egg and beat well.
3. Then add the sugar and flour sifted with Royal and bicarbonate of soda and melted butter; mix well.
4. Coat molds with butter and place in a hot oven for ten minutes.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Mole Ta Patio (Patio Mole)
body:
## Ingredients

- lard
- chile de pasa, twenty, seeded
- almonds, three ounces
- sesame seeds
- cloves
- pepper
- cinnamon
- French spice, well fried
- salt
- chicken, turkey, or pork, cooked in pieces

## Directions

1. Toast in lard twenty seeded red chiles
2. Fry three ounces of almonds, a little sesame, cloves, pepper, cinnamon, and well-fried French spice
3. Grind all of this, add salt to taste
4. Place in a pan with lard to fry
5. Add the previously cooked pieces of chicken, turkey, or pork
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Molletes (Stuffed Sweet Rolls)
body:
## Ingredients

- small molletes (rolls)
- manjar blanco or fresh butter for filling
- two eggs for eight molletes
- one teaspoon of bread
- lard for frying
- one and a half pounds of clarified sugar or half a loaf of very white panela sugar
- cinnamon sticks

## Directions

1. Take small molletes and remove a small cap from each
2. Hollow them out without breaking them
3. Fill them with manjar blanco or fresh butter
4. Put the cap back on
5. Beat two eggs for eight molletes, first the whites and then the yolks
6. Add one teaspoon of bread
7. Wrap the molletes in this mixture
8. Fry them in hot lard over very gentle heat
9. Once fried, remove and wash in a little hot water
10. Squeeze and dry with a very clean cloth
11. Have ready one and a half pounds of clarified sugar or half a loaf of very white panela sugar
12. Put the molletes in this, making sure the vessel is wide so they do not pile on top of each other
13. Add cinnamon sticks and let them heat
14. Remove with a skimmer very carefully so they do not break
15. Cover with the syrup
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Molletes (Sweet Rolls)
body:
## Ingredients

- four pounds of flour
- twelve egg yolks and six egg whites (or six whole eggs and six yolks)
- twelve ounces of ground sugar
- half pound of butter
- one pound of yeast
- one glass of Muscatel wine
- milk as needed

## Directions

1. Mix four pounds of flour with twelve egg yolks and six egg whites (or six whole eggs and six yolks).
2. Add twelve ounces of ground sugar, half pound of butter, and one pound of yeast.
3. Add one glass of Muscatel wine and as much milk as needed to make a soft dough.
4. Form the molletes.
5. When they rise, place in a gentle oven.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Mondongo (Tripe)
body:
## Ingredients

- beef tripe
- salt
- a little lard
- tomato
- onion
- parsley
- achiote
- a little flour
- a little water
- cooked chickpeas (for Spanish style variation)

## Directions

1. After the tripe is well cooked, put a little lard in a pan with a little salt and heat it.
2. Prepare a fried mixture as follows: after peeling the tomato, chop it very finely with onion and parsley that have been chopped beforehand.
3. Take a small piece of achiote and dissolve a little of it in the same pan to give it color.
4. Add the tripe cut into long pieces and add a little flour dissolved in a little water.
5. For Spanish-style mondongo, prepare it the same way but add cooked chickpeas.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Morongas (Blood Sausage)
body:
## Ingredients

- pig blood
- salt
- spearmint
- onion
- green chile
- oregano powder
- pepper powder
- lard
- intestines
- soap
- lemon
- water

## Directions

1. At the moment of slaughtering, add salt to the blood and stir very well
2. Chop plenty of spearmint, onion, green chile, oregano powder, and pepper powder
3. Chop plenty of lard
4. Mix everything well together
5. Wash intestines very well with plenty of soap and lemon
6. Fill the intestines with the mixture, not completely full to prevent bursting
7. Place in a little boiling water to parboil
8. After boiling ten minutes, remove them
9. Eat roasted or fried with tomato chirmol and cooked potatoes
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Morroños a la Española (Spanish Chickpea Stew)
body:
## Ingredients

- chickpeas
- water
- bicarbonate of soda
- good bone
- salt
- chayote or squash
- tomato
- onion
- garlic
- sweet pepper
- broth

## Directions

1. Soak chickpeas one day before in cold water with a teaspoon of bicarbonate of soda.
2. The next day, add to a pot or cook with a piece of good bone and salt.
3. Cut chayote or squash into small pieces.
4. Place a layer of chickpeas in a pot, then a layer of chayote.
5. Cover with a fried mixture of tomato, onion, garlic, sweet pepper, and broth.
6. Cook over low heat.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Mostachones de Almendra (Almond Pastries)
body:
## Ingredients

- one and one-half pounds of sugar
- one-half pound of peeled and ground almonds
- eight egg yolks
- cinnamon powder

## Directions

1. Clarify one and one-half pounds of sugar to the soft-ball stage (punto de bolita)
2. Lower the heat and let cool
3. Add one-half pound of peeled and ground almonds and eight egg yolks
4. Return to fire and when it reaches the proper stage, lower the heat and beat until a paste forms
5. Place on a table, cut into desired shapes
6. Roll in cinnamon powder and serve
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Nabos Blancos con Perejil (White Turnips with Parsley)
body:
## Ingredients

- turnips
- salt
- one tablespoon oil
- garlic cloves
- parsley
- one clove
- a small piece of cinnamon
- a small piece of fried French bread
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Peel the turnips, cut them into pieces, and cook with salt
2. Once cooked, remove them
3. Heat one tablespoon of oil in a pan, add peeled garlic cloves, and remove once they turn golden
4. Grind a little parsley with one clove, a small piece of cinnamon, and a small piece of fried French bread
5. Dissolve this with water and a teaspoon of vinegar, add to the oil
6. Add the turnips to the mixture, let it come to a boil, and serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Nabos con Acelgas (Turnips with Chard)
body:
## Ingredients

- three chard leaves
- ten peeled fried almonds
- water
- a small teaspoon of oil or lard
- nutmeg powder
- Castilian pepper
- turnip roots
- salt

## Directions

1. Cook three chard leaves without the white stalk
2. Once cooked, grind them with ten peeled and fried almonds
3. Dissolve this with a little water and fry in a small teaspoon of oil or lard
4. Add nutmeg powder and Castilian pepper
5. Add the turnip roots that have been previously cooked with salt
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Nabos Fritos (Fried Turnips)
body:
## Ingredients

- turnip greens
- water
- salt
- bicarbonate of soda
- white turnip roots
- one tablespoon lard
- two peeled tomatoes
- one onion
- one garlic clove

## Directions

1. Chop all the green parts and place in a pot with boiling water, salt, and a little bicarbonate of soda
2. Peel the white roots and cook separately in salted water
3. Once everything is cooked, drain well
4. Heat one tablespoon of lard in a pan and chop two peeled tomatoes, one onion, and one garlic clove
5. Add the turnips to the pan, and once fried (after about five minutes), serve immediately so it does not discolor
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Nogaditos (Walnut Fritters)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound of flour
- 5 eggs
- a pinch of salt
- a little warm water if needed
- lard for frying
- 2 pounds of sugar
- dragées

## Directions

1. Mix one pound of flour with five eggs and a pinch of salt
2. If too stiff, add a little warm water, knead very well until it forms blisters
3. Let rest half an hour
4. Then stretch with the hands, cut small pieces the size of a finger and fry them in hot lard
5. Clarify two pounds of sugar and when at very stiff peaks beat very well
6. Add the nogaditos to this, form them into small balls and place dragées on top
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Ojos de Venado (Deer Eyes)
body:
## Ingredients

- plums preserved in sugar
- four ounces of sugar

## Directions

1. Plums are preserved in sugar
2. Open them carefully removing the pit and fill them with the following: place four ounces of sugar over heat until it reaches the soft-ball stage
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Ojos de Venado (Deer's Eyes)
body:
## Ingredients

- preserved plums
- four ounces of sugar
- a little cream of tartar
- eight egg yolks
- fine sugar
- honey caramel glaze

## Directions

1. Open the preserved plums carefully, removing the pit.
2. Put four ounces of sugar on the fire to reach soft-ball stage.
3. Add a little cream of tartar and eight egg yolks.
4. Place on the fire, stirring constantly.
5. When it pulls away from the pan, remove from heat.
6. Once cool, knead with a little fine sugar until it becomes consistent.
7. Fill the plums with this mixture.
8. Coat the filled plums with caramel honey glaze.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Omelette León Style (Tortilla a la Leonesa)
body:
## Ingredients

- Eggs
- Salt
- Butter
- Fresh cheese
- Parsley
- Tomatoes
- Chile de pasa
- Water
- Or alternatively: cooked raisins, butter, salmon, sardines, ground meat, or sausage slices

## Directions

1. Beat the eggs according to the number of persons (white and yolk together).
2. Season with salt.
3. Fry in very hot butter and turn over with great lightness.
4. When fried, remove it and without letting it cool, cover completely with plenty of fresh cheese.
5. Roll it up and serve with chopped parsley.
6. Alternatively, grind two roasted tomatoes with a seeded and soaked chile de pasa.
7. Fry with about two tablespoons of water and salt and place this sauce around the egg.
8. If desired, cover the omelette instead of cheese with cooked raisins fried in butter, salmon, sardines, chopped meat or very thin slices of sausage.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Omelette with Bread Powder and Cheese (Tortilla con Polvo de Pan y de Queso)
body:
## Ingredients

- Eggs
- White bread powder
- Cheese powder
- Butter

## Directions

1. Beat four eggs (white first and then yolk).
2. Add two tablespoons of white bread powder and one of cheese powder.
3. Mix well and fry in hot butter.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Onion Omelette (Tortilla de Cebolla)
body:
## Ingredients

- Onion stalks
- Eggs
- Butter

## Directions

1. Cut the tender onion stalks.
2. Blanch them lightly.
3. Squeeze them very well so they have no water.
4. Mix them in beaten egg and fry as in the previous recipe.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Ostiones a la Francesa (Oysters French Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- oysters
- oil
- tomato
- onion
- parsley
- oyster cooking broth
- bread powder
- Castilian pepper

## Directions

1. After cleaning the oysters well, cook them.
2. Place a pan over heat with two or three tablespoons of oil.
3. Add a peeled tomato, onion and chopped parsley.
4. Add a little of the broth in which the oysters were cooked.
5. Add one tablespoon of bread powder ground with some Castilian peppers.
6. Add the oysters for a light boil and serve.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Ostiones en Escabeche (Oysters in Escabeche)
body:
## Ingredients

- oysters
- oil
- garlic
- onion
- bay leaves
- oregano powder
- Castilian pepper
- clove
- vinegar

## Directions

1. After cleaning and cooking the oysters, fry in oil.
2. Remove the oysters.
3. In the same oil fry chopped garlic and onions and add two bay leaves, oregano powder, Castilian pepper and a little clove.
4. If the oil is not sufficient, add more with one tablespoon of vinegar.
5. Let boil and when reduced, remove the bay leaves and onion.
6. Bathe the oysters with this sauce to serve.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Ostras al Horno (Baked Oysters)
body:
## Ingredients

- Oysters
- Bread powder
- Parsley
- Pepper powder
- Salt
- Butter

## Directions

1. Open the oysters, add bread powder, chopped parsley, pepper powder and salt
2. Cover with a little washed butter and place in the oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Ostras con Huevo (Oysters with Egg)
body:
## Ingredients

- Butter
- Parboiled and chopped mushrooms
- Pepper powder
- Four hard egg yolks
- Ten or twelve fresh oysters
- White bread powder

## Directions

1. Place a pan with one tablespoon of butter, if available, some parboiled and chopped mushrooms, pepper powder, four chopped hard egg yolks and ten or twelve fresh oysters
2. Fry everything well and fill the shells with this
3. Cover with white bread powder and place in the oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Otra Carne (Another Meat Preparation)
body:
## Ingredients

- A good piece of meat
- Salt
- Pepper
- Clove
- Water
- One cup of vinegar
- Pepper powder
- Oregano
- Clove
- A small piece of ginger
- Herbs salad or potato salad

## Directions

1. Take a good piece of meat and beat it with a mallet
2. Add salt, pepper, and clove
3. Place in a press for one night
4. The next day put to cook with water, one cup of vinegar, pepper powder, oregano, clove, and a small piece of ginger
5. When cooked, place in a press again
6. The next day cut into slices
7. Serve with herb salad or potato salad
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Otra de Miltomate (Another Ground Cherry Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- miltomate
- chile chiltepe
- cumin
- water
- vinegar
- salt
- onion

## Directions

1. Toast the miltomate and grind with a quantity of chile chiltepe and a little cumin
2. dissolve with a little water and one spoonful of vinegar
3. add salt and plenty of chopped onion
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Otra de Mostaza (Another Mustard Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- beef broth
- egg yolks
- mustard powder
- butter
- vinegar
- sugar

## Directions

1. Dissolve two egg yolks in a cup of broth, a tablespoon of mustard powder, a tablespoon of melted butter, two tablespoons of vinegar
2. If desired, add a bit of sugar
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Otra Masa de Hojaldre (Another Puff Pastry Dough)
body:
## Ingredients

- one pound of flour
- one egg
- two egg yolks
- water
- half a pound of butter

## Directions

1. To one pound of flour add one egg, two egg yolks and the necessary water to make a tender dough
2. Spread it on a board with a rolling pin
3. Brush with half a pound of melted butter
4. Repeat this operation three or four times
5. Then use it for whatever you wish
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Otra Pierna (Another Leg of Mutton)
body:
## Ingredients

- leg of mutton
- ham
- pepper powder
- garlic
- onion
- salt
- vinegar
- butter
- thyme
- bay leaves
- bread powder

## Directions

1. Lard the leg with ham, pepper powder, garlic and onion with salt
2. Rub with vinegar, salt and one tablespoon of butter
3. Add chopped onion, thyme and bay leaves
4. Place in the oven with plenty of bread powder on top
5. Baste frequently while cooking
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Otra Salsa Suprema (Another Supreme Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- butter
- bread flour
- broth
- pepper powder
- salt
- mustard powder or French mustard

## Directions

1. Put a spoonful of butter in a pan, add a spoonful of bread flour
2. when well browned, add the necessary broth so it becomes a thin sauce
3. add pepper powder and salt
4. let it boil ten minutes, remove and mix in one spoonful of mustard powder or French mustard, according to taste
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Otra Sopa de Tortuga (Another Turtle Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- turtle
- lemon
- half a teaspoon of baking soda
- onion stems
- parsley
- celery
- bay leaf
- thyme
- chicken broth
- vegetables, finely chopped
- soffritto
- turtle meat
- chicken
- chicken giblets
- chopped parsley
- toasted or fried flour with butter
- turtle eggs

## Directions

1. Hold the turtle over fire; when it puts out its head, tie and hang it to cut off the head
2. Wrap in cloth and leave for half an hour
3. With a very sharp knife, remove all the meat and wash very well with lemon
4. Have water boiling with half a teaspoon of baking soda; after a quarter hour, remove from that water and return to fire in little water with onion stems, parsley, celery, bay leaf, and a sprig of thyme
5. Have ready a good chicken broth with finely chopped vegetables and sufficient soffritto
6. Add the chopped turtle meat, the chicken, and giblets to the broth, along with chopped parsley and some toasted or fried flour in butter
7. Add the turtle eggs whole or chopped
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Otras Alcachofas (Other Stuffed Artichokes)
body:
## Ingredients

- Artichokes
- Water and salt
- Ham, cooked, sufficient amount
- Bread powder
- Pepper powder
- Salt
- Lemon juice

## Directions

1. Cook in water with salt.
2. Chop sufficient cooked ham.
3. Mix with bread powder, pepper powder, salt and lemon juice.
4. Fill the artichokes with this mixture, tie them and fry lightly.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Otras Croquetas de Verdura (Vegetable Rib Croquettes)
body:
## Ingredients

- Pork ribs
- Carrot
- Güisquil
- Tender green beans
- Potatoes
- Peas
- Tomato
- Onion
- Chorizo
- Hard-boiled egg
- Capers
- Vinegar
- Salt
- Bread powder
- Pepper
- Clove
- Paper
- Butter

## Directions

1. Cook ribs as in the previous recipe
2. Chop carrot, güisquil, tender green beans, potatoes, and peas, all cooked
3. Fry with tomato, onion, small slices of chorizo, pieces of hard-boiled egg, capers, two tablespoons of vinegar, salt, bread powder mixed with pepper and clove
4. Place bone on paper as before
5. Add a spoonful of this vegetable mixture
6. Fold the paper and place on a platter in the oven as before
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Otras Españoletas (Other Spanish Almond Cookies)
body:
## Ingredients

- 8 egg yolks
- 4 ounces of sugar
- 8 egg whites
- 4 ounces of sifted flour
- dry sifted sugar for topping
- chopped almonds

## Directions

1. Beat in the same way as the previous recipe, with the only difference that add only four ounces of flour
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Otras Macarelas (Other Mackerel)
body:
## Ingredients

- three or four roasted tomatoes
- three or four red peppers
- hot oil
- salt
- one teaspoon vinegar
- mackerel

## Directions

1. Grind three or four roasted tomatoes with three or four red peppers
2. Fry this in hot oil and season with salt and one teaspoon vinegar
3. Serve the mackerel with this sauce, hot or cold as preferred
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Otro Chompipe (Another Turkey)
body:
## Ingredients

- one turkey
- one Frenchman
- vinegar
- pepper powder
- butter

## Directions

1. Kill one day before
2. Soak a Frenchman in vinegar
3. Rub the turkey inside and outside with this, pepper powder and butter
4. Place in the oven as the previous recipe
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Otro Chompipe a la Francesa (Another Turkey French Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- one cleaned turkey
- salt
- pepper
- clove
- cinnamon
- nutmeg
- three to four garlic cloves
- parsley
- three to four onions
- thin slices of ham
- cloth
- water
- ham
- sherry wine
- three bay leaves
- four to six slices of bitter orange
- three onion heads
- thyme
- half cup of oil
- half cup of vinegar
- lettuce
- fresh pickles

## Directions

1. Clean the turkey well and add salt
2. Grind a little pepper, clove, a small piece of cinnamon and a small piece of nutmeg
3. Chop three to four peeled garlic cloves, a little parsley and three to four onions, all finely
4. Mix together and rub the turkey inside and outside with this mixture
5. Cover with very thin slices of ham and wrap in a very thin cloth
6. Place in a pan and cover with water
7. After two hours of boiling over even heat, remove the turkey and lard it with ham chopped with three garlic cloves and pepper powder
8. Then place in a pan with one glass of dry sherry wine, three bay leaves, salt, four to six slices of peeled bitter orange without seeds, three peeled onion heads, a sprig of thyme, half a cup of oil and half a cup of vinegar
9. Keep on the fire for one hour
10. Serve with lettuce leaves and fresh pickles
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Otro Chompipe al Horno (Another Oven-Roasted Turkey)
body:
## Ingredients

- one turkey
- salt
- butter
- pepper powder
- four to five tablespoons of vinegar
- two bay leaves
- onion

## Directions

1. Kill the turkey one day before cooking it, otherwise it will not be tender
2. Clean it very well and prick it with a fork
3. Rub with salt, butter and pepper powder
4. Place in a pan with four to five tablespoons of vinegar, two bay leaves and chopped onion
5. Put in the oven leaving it there for three hours, basting with its juices every five minutes
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Otro de Elote Amarillo (Yellow Corn Atole)
body:
## Ingredients

- yellow corn ears (same quantity as previous recipe)
- water
- sugar

## Directions

1. Shuck the same quantity of corn ears
2. Dissolve them with an equal quantity of water and strain only with water
3. Cook as the previous recipe, calculating the water in small quantities so it does not come out thin
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Otro Frijol (Another Bean Dish)
body:
## Ingredients

- beans
- salt
- one onion
- two spoonfuls of lard
- a small piece of dough, well ground
- a few Castilian peppers
- water
- hot pepper to taste

## Directions

1. Soak in water the night before
2. The next day place over fire with salt
3. When more than cooked, chop one onion (head and stalk)
4. Add two spoonfuls of lard
5. Add a small piece of dough well ground with a few Castilian peppers
6. Dissolve with a little water
7. Add to the beans seasoned with salt and a little hot pepper
8. Serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Otro Jamón (Another Cured Ham)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 ham leg
- salt
- saltpeter
- bay leaves
- parsley
- other herbs

## Directions

1. Proceed as in the previous recipe, except leave it in the open air for three nights, rubbing it during the day with salt and saltpeter
2. After three days, cook it with the same herbs as the previous recipes for the same length of time
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Otro Pan (Another Bread)
body:
## Ingredients

- four ounces of melted butter
- six eggs
- flour
- three tablespoons of cream or milk
- one tablespoon of beer yeast
- four tablespoons of ground sugar
- one ounce of currants
- two ounces of peeled and lengthwise-cut almonds

## Directions

1. Put four ounces of melted butter in a saucepan and beat until it becomes like cream
2. Add six eggs, putting in one egg and one tablespoon of flour and so on until all six eggs are done
3. Then three tablespoons of cream or milk, putting in one tablespoon of this and one of flour until three tablespoons are done
4. Add one tablespoon of beer yeast, three more tablespoons of flour and four of ground sugar
5. Beat everything for half an hour
6. Add one ounce of currants and two ounces of peeled almonds cut lengthwise
7. Put in greased molds of lard or butter and when it rises put in a hot oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Otro Queso, con Vino (Pork Cheese with Wine)
body:
## Ingredients

- pig's head
- red wine
- thyme sprig
- bay leaves
- pepper powder

## Directions

1. Clean the head well.
2. Chop it raw.
3. Place in a dish with a bottle of red wine, a thyme sprig, two bay leaves and a little pepper powder.
4. Let it cook well for six hours.
5. When well cooked, remove the bay leaves and thyme.
6. Press the rest as with the other cheese.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Otro Salmon con Mostaza (Salmon with Mustard)
body:
## Ingredients

- one or two spoonfuls French mustard
- vinegar
- abundant oil
- pepper powder
- salt
- salmon
- minced parsley

## Directions

1. Place one or two spoonfuls of French mustard in a platter with a little vinegar and abundant oil, pepper powder and salt
2. Place the salmon in this mixture, mixing with great care
3. Serve with minced parsley on top
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Otro Vinagre (Another Vinegar)
body:
## Ingredients

- flour (1 pound)
- yeast (1 cup)
- water (1 cantaro, a large jug)
- panela (1 piece, added after 5 days)

## Directions

1. Mix 1 pound of flour with 1 cup of yeast.
2. Wrap very tightly in thin cloth.
3. Place in a jug of water and cover.
4. After 5 days, add 1 piece of panela.
5. After 15 days, stir without touching it.
6. If it is already very strong, strain and it is ready to use; if not, leave it several more days until it is strong enough.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Otros Güisquiles Rellenos (Stuffed Chayotes)
body:
## Ingredients

- Güisquiles (chayotes), whole
- Mantequilla (butter), one tablespoon
- Tomato
- Onion, peeled and chopped
- Salt and sugar to taste
- Raisins
- Almonds, chopped
- Bread powder, sweet
- Salt

## Directions

1. Cook the güisquiles whole in steam.
2. When cooked, cut them in half lengthwise and remove all the flesh, leaving the shell very whole.
3. Put in a pan one tablespoon of butter, tomato and peeled and chopped onion.
4. Add the güisquil, well broken up, with salt and sugar to taste, raisins and chopped almonds.
5. Once well seasoned, fill the shells with this mixture, keeping them very even.
6. Cover with sweet bread powder and place in a hot oven for ten minutes.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Otros Patos (Another Duck Preparation)
body:
## Ingredients

- ducks
- sufficient oil
- onion slices
- one glass red wine
- juice of half a lemon
- a very small lemon peel
- two bay leaves
- chopped parsley
- a little pepper powder
- water

## Directions

1. After cleaning the ducks well, fry them in sufficient oil
2. When they have taken on color, remove them and fry onion slices in the same oil
3. Add one glass of red wine, the juice of half a lemon, a very small lemon peel, two bay leaves, chopped parsley, and a little pepper powder
4. Return the ducks, cover them with water, and let them boil for two or three hours
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Otros Tamales (Other Tamales)
body:
## Ingredients

- rice or corn dough
- green or guaque chile
- tomato
- miltomate

## Directions

1. If made of rice, proceed as with the previous tamales
2. If made of corn, the same, except when simmering the dough do not add saffron
3. Make the sauce by grinding green or guaque chile, plenty of cooked tomato and miltomate
4. Fry and mix as with the others
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pachitos de Cangrejo (Crab Tamales)
body:
## Ingredients

- corn (ground)
- salt
- twelve ounces lard
- small crab legs
- one cup cooked miltomate
- a little oregano
- a little cumin
- a piece of achiote
- dried chile cooked to taste
- chayote (chopped)
- carrot (chopped)
- green beans (chopped)
- potatoes (chopped)
- one cup water
- one crab (well washed)
- two large crab claws

## Directions

1. Grind the corn as with the others
2. Add salt and twelve ounces of lard
3. Remove the thin tips from the small crab legs and grind the rest with one cup of cooked miltomate, a little oregano, a little cumin, a piece of achiote, and dried chile cooked to taste
4. Chop chayote, carrot, green beans, and potatoes, mix everything well together
5. Add one cup of water
6. Place one spoonful of the mixture on a leaf with a well-washed crab and the two large claws
7. Wrap and cook the same as the others
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pachitos de Cangrejo (Little Crab Pachis)
body:
## Ingredients

- corn (maíz)
- salt
- twelve ounces lard
- crab legs
- one cup cooked miltomate
- a little oregano
- a little cumin
- a small piece of achiote
- dried chile, cooked
- güisquil, chopped
- carrot, chopped
- green beans (ejotes), chopped
- potatoes, chopped
- one cup water
- whole crabs, well washed

## Directions

1. Grind the corn as for the other tamales.
2. Add salt and twelve ounces of lard.
3. Remove the thin pointed ends of the small crab legs and grind the rest with one cup of cooked miltomate, a little oregano, a little cumin, a small piece of achiote, and dried chile cooked to taste.
4. Chop güisquil, carrot, green beans, and potatoes and mix everything well together.
5. Add one cup of water.
6. Place one tablespoon of this mixture on a corn husk with a well-washed whole crab and its two large claws.
7. Wrap and cook.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Paciencias (Patience Cookies)
body:
## Ingredients

- four egg whites
- nine ounces of ground sugar
- six ounces of sifted flour
- zest of one lemon

## Directions

1. Beat the egg whites until stiff like nougat
2. Mix in the ground sugar, sifted flour, and lemon zest
3. Place in a paper cone and pipe onto buttered trays in desired sizes
4. Allow to form a crust
5. Place in the oven until browned
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Paella a la Valenciana (Valencian Paella)
body:
## Ingredients

- oil
- two tender chicken pieces
- tomato, peeled and chopped
- four ounces of pork loin slices
- four ounces of fresh pork ribs, cut
- three sausages, cut
- one large jar of piquillo peppers
- one glass of water
- one-eighth ounce of saffron
- two pounds of rice
- snails
- tender peas
- potato slices
- carrot
- tender green beans, cut
- salt
- pepper powder

## Directions

1. Put sufficient oil in a pan and add pieces of two tender chickens
2. When they take color, add peeled and chopped tomato, four ounces of pork loin slices, four ounces of fresh cut pork ribs, three cut sausages, and one large jar of piquillo peppers
3. Add one glass of water in which one-eighth ounce of saffron has been dissolved
4. When this has boiled for half an hour, add two pounds of rice that has been fried in three spoonfuls of oil until golden but not burned
5. Add snails, tender peas, potato slices, carrot, tender cut green beans, salt, and a little pepper powder
6. Cover with one liter of water
7. Cover and let cook on very gentle heat
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pan al Minuto (Quick Bread)
body:
## Ingredients

- six ounces of flour
- one cup of milk
- one pound of flour
- three ounces of butter
- four ounces of melted lard
- four eggs
- one full teaspoon of Royal

## Directions

1. Put six ounces of flour in one cup of milk, one pound of flour
2. Knead very well and add three ounces of butter and four ounces of melted lard and four eggs
3. Knead until it sounds beaten, add one full teaspoon of Royal
4. Put in greased molds in a very hot oven
5. If you wish to make it simpler, use only two ounces of butter and four ounces of lard
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pan Americano (American Bread)
body:
## Ingredients

- butter or lard (0.5 pound)
- sugar (6 ounces)
- eggs (9)
- flour (1 pound)

## Directions

1. Work 0.5 pound of butter or lard for half an hour with 6 ounces of sugar.
2. Beat 9 eggs; mix the yolks with the butter and 1 pound of flour.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pan Americano (American Bread)
body:
## Ingredients

- half a pound of lard or butter
- six ounces of sugar
- nine eggs
- one pound of flour
- one small teaspoon of Royal baking powder

## Directions

1. Work the lard or butter for half an hour with the sugar
2. Beat the egg yolks with the butter and one pound of flour
3. Beat the egg whites separately until very stiff, like for nougat
4. When the whites are well set, mix everything together very well
5. Add one small teaspoon of Royal
6. Put in greased small casseroles and place in the oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pan Americano (American Bread)
body:
## Ingredients

- ten eggs
- sugar equal to the weight of five eggs
- flour equal to the weight of seven eggs
- one tablespoon of Royal
- two ounces of melted lard or butter

## Directions

1. Take ten eggs and weigh the sugar to equal the weight of five eggs; flour equal to the weight of seven eggs and one tablespoon of Royal
2. Beat the yolks with the sugar, beat the whites as for nougat
3. Mix everything with two ounces of melted lard or butter
4. When well mixed put in the oven in a greased mold
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pan Americano Alternativo (Alternative American Bread)
body:
## Ingredients

- half a pound of butter
- four ounces of lard
- one pound of sugar
- one pound of flour
- twelve egg yolks
- egg whites
- optionally half a pound of tapioca flour or rice flour

## Directions

1. Beat the butter, lard, sugar, flour, and egg yolks together
2. When everything is well beaten, beat the egg whites as for nougat
3. Mix everything very well
4. Put in greased small casseroles and place in the oven
5. If desired, add half a pound of tapioca flour or rice flour
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pan Blanco (White Bread)
body:
## Ingredients

- one cup of flour
- a little salt
- one teaspoon of Royal
- one tablespoon of lard or butter
- milk

## Directions

1. Put in a dish one cup of flour, a little salt, one teaspoon of Royal, one tablespoon of lard or butter and the necessary milk to make a smooth dough
2. Put in a greased mold in a hot oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pan Común (Common Bread)
body:
## Ingredients

- una libra de harina
- cuatro onzas de azúcar
- cuatro yemas
- dos claras de huevo
- cuatro onzas de manteca
- cuatro onzas de levadura

## Directions

1. Una libra de harina; cuatro onzas de azúcar, cuatro yemas y dos claras de huevo, cuatro onzas de manteca y cuatro onzas de levadura
2. Se bate la masa muy bien
3. Se hacen los panes en moldes
4. Se dejan crecer una noche
5. Al día siguiente al horno
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pan de la Vida (Bread of Life)
body:
## Ingredients

- two pounds of common bread dough
- half a pound of sugar
- seven egg yolks
- four egg whites
- half a pound of lard or butter
- four tablespoons of yeast

## Directions

1. Weigh two pounds of common bread dough and add half a pound of sugar, seven egg yolks, four egg whites beaten as for nougat and half a pound of lard or butter
2. Knead with four tablespoons of yeast
3. Knead until it blisters
4. Put in greased baking dishes and place in the oven
5. This is prepared at night and put in the oven the next day
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pan de Mantequilla (Butter Bread)
body:
## Ingredients

- half a pound of butter
- five eggs
- five ounces of sugar
- one pound of flour
- one teaspoon of Royal

## Directions

1. Beat half a pound of butter for a quarter of an hour
2. Beat five eggs as for nougat and when well beaten mix the yolk with the white
3. Mix with the butter five ounces of sugar and one pound of flour
4. Stir everything well with one teaspoon of Royal
5. Put in greased baking dishes in the oven with sprinkles on top
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pan de Maíz (Corn Bread)
body:
## Ingredients

- un poco de maíz
- una libra de masa de maíz
- un poquito de leche
- dos huevos
- unos granitos de sal
- dos onzas de azúcar
- unos granos de anís
- dos onzas de manteca
- ajonjolí

## Directions

1. Se cuece un poco de maíz como para tortillas
2. Se muele en seco y se cuela
3. Se vuelve a moler dos veces sin mojarlo
4. Una libra de esta masa se moja con un poquito de leche, dos huevos, unos granitos de sal, dos onzas de azúcar, unos granos de anís, dos onzas de manteca
5. Se soba hasta que esté muy fina
6. En un molde untado de manteca se pone al horno, con ajonjolí encima
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pan de Maíz (Corn Bread)
body:
## Ingredients

- one glass of liquid (two parts milk and one part water)
- half a tablespoon of salt
- one pound and two ounces of sugar
- ten ounces of lard and half of butter
- two pounds of bread flour and one of cornmeal
- half an ounce of Royal baking powder

## Directions

1. Put in a bowl one glass of liquid (two parts milk and one part water), half a tablespoon of salt, one pound and two ounces of sugar, ten ounces of lard and half of butter
2. Mix everything well and add two pounds of bread flour and one of cornmeal
3. Knead for half an hour
4. Let rest for a quarter hour
5. Then add half an ounce of Royal
6. Place in greased bowls and put in a hot oven for three quarters of an hour
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pan de Pasas (Raisin Bread)
body:
## Ingredients

- half a pound of sugar
- half a pound of butter
- four eggs
- half a pound of sifted flour
- one small glass of milk
- one large tablespoon of Royal
- one glass of sherry
- half a pound of pitted raisins
- lemon zest if desired

## Directions

1. Beat half a pound of sugar with half a pound of butter
2. Mix in four eggs and beat well
3. Mix in half a pound of sifted flour, one small glass of milk, one large tablespoon of Royal, one glass of sherry and half a pound of pitted raisins
4. Add lemon zest if desired
5. Put in greased baking dishes in the oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pan Negro (Dark Bread)
body:
## Ingredients

- three pounds of flour
- six eggs
- one teaspoon of salt
- one ounce of cinnamon powder
- half an ounce of Chiapa pepper
- one pound of lard
- half a liter of milk
- one large tablespoon of Royal
- half a cup of panela
- one ounce of ginger

## Directions

1. The night before, put half a cup of panela to boil with one ounce of well-pounded ginger
2. When it reaches the right point, remove the ginger
3. Strain the honey well and mix it with the flour and all the other ingredients well combined
4. Put in greased baking dishes in the oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pan para Té (Tea Bread)
body:
## Ingredients

- one pound of flour
- half a large cup of yeast
- half a pound of lard
- half a pound of sugar
- half a teaspoon of salt
- ten eggs

## Directions

1. Put in a dish one pound of flour, half a large cup of yeast, half a pound of lard, half a pound of sugar, half a teaspoon of salt and ten eggs
2. Knead for half an hour
3. Put in greased molds, let it rise
4. After twelve hours when it has risen, put in a hot oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Panecitos Turcos (Turkish Little Breads)
body:
## Ingredients

- two cups of flour
- one tablespoon of Royal
- four eggs
- one small cup of sugar
- half a cup of milk
- butter

## Directions

1. Beat four eggs as for nougat in two cups of flour with one tablespoon of Royal
2. Beat the yolks with one small cup of sugar
3. When everything is well beaten mix with the flour and half a cup of milk
4. Grease some papers very well with butter and put them on tin plates
5. Put two tablespoons of the batter on these and put in a hot oven
6. When cool, put cream or whatever you wish on top and stack them one on top of another to whatever height you wish
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Panecitos Turcos (Turkish Little Breads)
body:
## Ingredients

- two cups of flour
- one tablespoon of Royal baking powder
- four eggs
- one small cup of sugar
- half a cup of milk
- butter

## Directions

1. Beat the four eggs as for nougat, beating the yolks with one small cup of sugar
2. Mix all well with the flour and half a cup of milk
3. Butter some papers very well and place them on pewter plates
4. Put two tablespoons of the batter on these and place in a hot oven
5. When cool, place cream or whatever is desired on top and stack one on top of another to reach the desired height
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Panes con Aceite (Oil-Filled Breads)
body:
## Ingredients

- pickles, very fresh
- fine oil
- salt
- pepper powder
- oregano powder
- fresh cheese or dry cheese powder
- green chile

## Directions

1. Chop pickles finely
2. Mix with fine oil, salt, pepper powder, and oregano powder
3. Cut a small cap off a French roll and remove all the crumb
4. Soak the roll with one spoonful of oil
5. Fill with the chopped mixture
6. Top with a slice of fresh cheese or one spoonful of dry cheese powder
7. Place half a green chile on top
8. Cover with the cap that was removed
9. Serve
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Panes con Salsa (Bread with Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- four roasted tomatoes
- one guaque chile cooked or one pasilla chile fried
- one sprig of thyme
- oil
- salt
- meat (ham, goose liver, or other previous varieties)
- cold loin, pork leg, or sausage (optional)

## Directions

1. Grind four roasted tomatoes with one cooked guaque chile or one fried pasilla chile and one sprig of thyme
2. Fry in one spoonful of oil
3. Season with salt
4. Spread one spoonful of this sauce on bread
5. Add a slice of any of the previous meats, or if desired, a slice of cold loin, pork leg, or sausage
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Panitos Americanos (American Little Breads)
body:
## Ingredients

- one pound of flour
- one glass of milk
- half a pound of butter
- one teaspoon of salt
- one large tablespoon of Royal

## Directions

1. Mix one pound of flour with one glass of milk and half a pound of butter, one teaspoon of salt and one large tablespoon of Royal
2. Stir very well without kneading
3. Spread with a rolling pin
4. Cut with a mold of whatever shape you wish
5. Put in a very hot oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Panque (Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 0.5 pound sugar
- 0.5 pound butter
- 12 egg yolks
- 12 egg whites

## Directions

1. Work together very well 0.5 pound of sugar with 0.5 pound of butter and 12 egg yolks
2. After half an hour of beating, add the 12 well-beaten egg whites
3. Place in a mold greased with butter and bake in the oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Panque de Seda (Silk Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 0.5 pound butter
- 0.5 pound powdered sugar
- 10 egg yolks
- 0.5 pound sifted cornstarch
- 10 egg whites
- 1 small glass of rum
- 1 ounce pitted raisins

## Directions

1. Beat 0.5 pound of butter with 0.5 pound of powdered sugar and 10 egg yolks
2. When well beaten, add 0.5 pound of sifted cornstarch
3. When well worked, add the 10 egg whites, 1 small glass of rum, 1 ounce of pitted raisins
4. Place in a mold greased with lard and into the oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Panqueques (Pancakes)
body:
## Ingredients

- five and one quarter ounces of flour
- one egg
- half cup of milk
- water if milk is not available
- a pinch of salt
- sugar
- oil, lard or butter

## Directions

1. Mix very slowly so it does not become lumpy
2. Have a skillet with hot oil, lard or butter
3. Fry the size desired
4. Put sugar on top and burn with a hot iron
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Papas a la Chilena (Potatoes in Chilean Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- Potatoes, cooked with salt
- Butter, one spoon
- Garlic and parsley, very finely chopped
- Oil, one spoon

## Directions

1. Cook potatoes with salt
2. When cooked and cold, peel and cut into slices
3. Spread a pan with a spoon of butter
4. Chop some garlic and parsley very fine
5. Fry in a spoon of oil
6. Place a layer of potatoes and another of this fried mixture and so alternating the layers
7. Place in the oven or over two fires
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Papas a la Cordobesa (Potatoes in Cordovan Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- Potatoes, cooked with salt and peeled
- Butter
- Bread powder, ground
- Castilian pepper
- Cheese powder, plenty
- Milk, half a cup

## Directions

1. Cook potatoes with salt and peel them
2. When cold, slice them
3. Spread a pan with butter
4. Place a layer of potatoes, another of ground bread powder with Castilian pepper and mixed with plenty of cheese powder, another of potatoes and so on, alternating
5. Cover with half a cup of milk and place in the oven or over two fires
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Papas a la Japonesa (Potatoes in Japanese Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- Potatoes, sliced and cooked with salt
- Castilian peppers, three
- Cloves, four
- Butter
- Pickled vegetables, chopped
- Hard-boiled eggs, pieces
- Parsley, chopped
- Pepper powder
- Black chorizo, sliced
- Cooked ham, pieces
- Tomatoes, three or four roasted
- Chile de pasa, pitted and soaked
- Garlic clove
- Water, half a cup
- Salt
- Dry cheese powder

## Directions

1. Cook potatoes sliced with salt, three Castilian peppers and four cloves
2. Remove carefully when cooked so they do not break
3. Place in a casserole a layer of butter, a layer of potatoes, another of chopped pickled vegetables with pieces of hard-boiled egg, chopped parsley, pepper powder, slices of black chorizo, pieces of cooked ham, another layer of potatoes and so on alternating layers, making sure the last is potatoes
4. Grind three or four roasted tomatoes with a pitted and soaked chile de pasa and a garlic clove
5. Dissolve this in half a cup of water
6. Add salt and with this cover the potatoes so they boil two or three times
7. Empty carefully onto the platter and cover with dry cheese powder
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Papas a la Ligera (Light Potatoes)
body:
## Ingredients

- butter or margarine
- onion
- water
- potatoes
- salt
- bay leaves
- pepper
- parsley
- cheese

## Directions

1. Fry chopped onion in butter or margarine
2. Add water and put in the peeled potatoes with salt and two bay leaves
3. When cooked, remove with great care
4. Serve with pepper powder, chopped parsley and grated cheese
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Papas a la Vernate (Potatoes Vernate Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- butter
- potatoes
- Parmesan or dry cheese powder
- broth or milk

## Directions

1. Coat a pot with butter, put a layer of well peeled and sliced potatoes, a layer of Parmesan or dry cheese powder
2. Continue putting layers like the previous ones as far as desired
3. Moisten with broth or milk, put in the oven and remove when cooked
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Papas a la Vienesa (Potatoes in Viennese Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- Large potatoes, cooked
- Butter, one spoon, melted
- Pepper powder
- Parsley, chopped
- Salt
- Parmesano cheese powder

## Directions

1. Cook large potatoes
2. Keep in hot water until the moment of serving
3. Cut into wheels
4. Have a spoon of melted butter with pepper powder, chopped parsley and salt
5. Place the potatoes, very hot, in this
6. Cover with parmesano cheese powder
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Papas a la Vienesa (Potatoes Viennese Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- Large potatoes
- One tablespoon butter, melted
- Pepper powder
- Parsley, chopped
- Salt
- Parmesan cheese powder

## Directions

1. Cook large potatoes
2. Keep them in hot water until the moment of serving
3. Cut them into slices
4. Have one tablespoon of melted butter with pepper powder, chopped parsley and salt ready
5. Put the potatoes, while very hot, into this mixture
6. Cover with parmesan cheese powder
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Papas Asturianas (Asturian Potatoes)
body:
## Ingredients

- Potatoes, peeled
- Salt
- Water
- Parsley, chopped
- Hard-boiled eggs, sliced
- Butter, washed and cut into pieces
- Butifarra, sliced

## Directions

1. Peel the potatoes, removing all the dark parts with the tip of the knife
2. Place in a dish with salt and a little water
3. Cook on very low heat
4. Once cooked, remove very carefully so they do not fall apart
5. Serve with chopped parsley, slices of hard-boiled egg, pieces of washed butter and slices of butifarra
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Papas con Camarones (Potatoes with Shrimp)
body:
## Ingredients

- potatoes
- salt
- butter
- tomato
- onion
- annatto
- shrimp
- cheese
- parsley

## Directions

1. Cook the potatoes with salt, peel and break them well
2. Put them in a pan with butter, tomato and chopped onion and a light color of annatto
3. Have two ounces of shrimp peeled and cooked for each pound of potatoes
4. When everything is well fried, add plenty of cheese
5. Serve with chopped parsley
6. They are also suitable for traveling and can be eaten cold
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Papas con Pescado (Potatoes with Fish)
body:
## Ingredients

- Cooked potatoes
- Butter or lard, one spoon
- Cooked fish, cut into pieces
- Tomato, roasted and ground
- Garlic clove
- Shrimp (optional alternative)

## Directions

1. Cook and partition the potatoes
2. Spread a pan with a spoon of butter or lard
3. Place a layer of potatoes, one of cooked fish cut into pieces and one of roasted tomato ground with a garlic clove
4. Alternate the layers making sure the last is potato
5. Then place in the oven or over two fires to give a light boil
6. If desired, shrimp can be used instead of fish
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Papas con Queso (Potatoes with Cheese)
body:
## Ingredients

- Potatoes, well cooked
- Butter
- Tomato
- Onion and garlic, chopped
- Achiote
- Cheese, plenty
- Butter, washed or fresh

## Directions

1. Well cooked potatoes are mashed
2. Place in a pan with butter, tomato, chopped onion and garlic and a little achiote
3. Add plenty of cheese
4. Put on a platter and place washed or fresh butter all around the edge
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Papas con Vino (Potatoes with Wine)
body:
## Ingredients

- butter
- onions
- red wine or dry sherry
- potatoes
- water

## Directions

1. Put butter in a serving dish
2. Add one or two chopped onions and a glass of red wine or dry sherry
3. Put the potatoes in sliced or whole, with the necessary water for them to cook
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Papas en Adobo (Potatoes in Adobo Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- Large or small potatoes
- Salt
- Cooked tomato
- Guaque or dry chile
- Garlic clove
- Oregano
- Achiote
- Small onion head, roasted
- French bread, soaked
- Water

## Directions

1. If potatoes are large, peel and cook them chopped; if small, peel and cook them whole with salt
2. Grind cooked tomato with a guaque or dry chile, a garlic clove, a little oregano, a piece of achiote, a roasted small onion head, and a piece of soaked French bread
3. Dissolve this mixture with a little water and fry it
4. Add the potatoes to this sauce and serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Papas en Ayahuaxté (Potatoes in Ayahuaxté Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- Pepitoria, half an ounce
- Chiapa peppers
- Castilian peppers
- Tortilla or tamalito, cold
- Water
- Salt
- Potatoes, cooked and chopped
- Cooked tomatillo
- Bread, soaked
- Cooked string beans, izote flower, cauliflower (optional)
- Castilian pepper and cinnamon (alternative)

## Directions

1. Toast half an ounce of pepitoria
2. Grind with some Chiapa peppers and some Castilian peppers, a cold tortilla or tamalito
3. Dissolve with a little salted water
4. Add the cooked and chopped potatoes
5. Serve cold
6. If you want it hot, fry the mixture grinding in a little cooked tomatillo and a piece of soaked bread
7. To this you can also add cooked string beans, izote flower, cauliflower, all with the same mixture
8. If you prefer, grind only Castilian pepper and cinnamon without the Chiapa, with a little spice to taste
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Papas en Blanco (Potatoes in White Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- potatoes
- salt
- butter
- tomato
- onion
- bread flour
- water
- parsley

## Directions

1. Cook the potatoes with salt
2. Peel and slice them and fry in a pan with very little butter, peeled tomato and chopped onion
3. Dissolve a teaspoon of bread flour in a little water
4. Add it to the mixture with water so a thin sauce remains
5. Put the potatoes in this
6. Serve hot with chopped parsley
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Papas en Leche (Potatoes in Milk)
body:
## Ingredients

- Potatoes, peeled
- Milk
- Salt
- Butter, cooked, one spoon

## Directions

1. Peel the potatoes, taking care that they remain very white
2. Place in a dish and cover with milk
3. Add a few grains of salt and a spoon of cooked butter
4. When done, serve hot with its broth
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Papas en Mantequilla (Potatoes in Butter)
body:
## Ingredients

- Raw potatoes, peeled
- Butter
- Salt

## Directions

1. Peel the raw potatoes
2. Spread with butter and salt
3. Place in a dish and in a very gentle oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Papas en Pescado (Potatoes in Fish Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- large potatoes
- butter
- garlic
- parsley
- salt
- oil
- Parmesan cheese

## Directions

1. Cook large potatoes, peel and cut them into slices
2. Put in a pan one tablespoon of butter, add garlic and finely chopped parsley, salt and a teaspoon of oil
3. Put the potatoes in this, mixing them lightly so they do not break
4. Serve with plenty of Parmesan cheese powder
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Papas en Salsa de Tomate (Potatoes in Tomato Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- Potatoes
- Salt
- Lard
- Tomato, peeled
- Onion, chopped
- Bread flour
- Water
- Parsley, chopped

## Directions

1. Cook the potatoes with salt
2. Peel them and cut into slices
3. Fry in a pan with very little lard, peeled tomato and chopped onion
4. Dissolve a teaspoon of bread flour
5. Add to the mixture with water so that a thin sauce forms
6. Add the potatoes
7. Serve hot with chopped parsley
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Papas Guisadas (Stewed Potatoes)
body:
## Ingredients

- Potatoes, cooked and peeled
- Fried tomato and chopped onion
- Achiote
- Cheese
- Parsley, chopped

## Directions

1. Cook and peel the potatoes
2. Place in a pan with fried tomato and chopped onion
3. Add a little achiote for color
4. When the potatoes are well broken down, serve with cheese and chopped parsley
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Papas Holandesas (Dutch-Style Potatoes)
body:
## Ingredients

- potatoes
- salt
- onion, chopped
- butter
- egg yolk
- parsley, chopped
- white sauce
- lemon juice, a few drops

## Directions

1. Cook the potatoes with salt and chopped onion
2. Place them whole or cut in a serving dish
3. Prepare a little butter, an egg yolk, chopped parsley, a little white sauce, a few drops of lemon juice and place over the fire without letting it boil
4. Cover the potatoes with this mixture
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Papas Rellenas (Stuffed Potatoes)
body:
## Ingredients

- Potatoes, raw or cooked
- Pork, cooked and chopped
- Tomato
- Onion
- Garlic clove, chopped and peeled
- Vinegar
- Pepper powder
- Bread powder, half a spoon
- Salt
- Butter
- Cheese or cooked brains mixed with chopped parsley and pepper powder
- Egg

## Directions

1. Peel the potatoes and open a hole in them
2. Prepare the filling with cooked and chopped pork, fried with tomato, onion, a chopped and peeled garlic clove
3. Add a little vinegar, pepper powder and half a spoon of white bread powder
4. Fill the potatoes with this mixture, seasoned with salt
5. Cover the hole with a little potato from what was removed
6. Spread with butter and salt and place in the oven
7. They can be filled with cheese, or with cooked brains mixed with chopped parsley and pepper powder
8. If the potatoes are cooked they can be fried, and if not, wrapped in egg to serve with fried tomato sauce
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Papas Rellenas (Stuffed Potatoes)
body:
## Ingredients

- potatoes
- pork meat
- tomato
- onion
- garlic
- vinegar
- pepper
- bread powder

## Directions

1. Peel the potatoes raw or cooked and open a hole in them
2. Prepare the filling with blanched and chopped pork meat
3. Fry this with tomato, onion and a clove of peeled and chopped garlic
4. Add a little vinegar, pepper powder and half a tablespoon of white bread powder
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Papas Suflés (Potato Puffs)
body:
## Ingredients

- large potatoes
- oil
- butter

## Directions

1. Peel large potatoes and cut them into slices the thickness of chalk
2. Have very hot oil in a pan and put the potatoes in it
3. As soon as they are soft without browning, remove them
4. Have plenty of hot butter in a serving dish
5. Put the potatoes in after they have been five minutes in the air
6. Make sure the potatoes do not touch so they will puff up
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Parfait de Ciruela (Plum Parfait)
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 ounces plum pulp
- half a glass of cream
- 1 egg
- three-quarters ounce of sugar
- 1 lemon

## Directions

1. Pass the cooked plums through a strainer
2. Put the sugar with the plum over the fire until it forms a ball
3. Beat until cold
4. Beat the cream and mix it with the previous mixture, as well as the well-beaten egg and lemon juice
5. Put in a mold for four or five hours in ice
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pasta de Hojaldre No. 2 (Puff Pastry No. 2)
body:
## Ingredients

- flour (1 pound)
- egg yolks (2)
- egg white (1)
- water (as needed)
- butter, melted (0.5 pound)

## Directions

1. Mix the flour with 2 egg yolks, 1 egg white, and enough water to make a soft dough.
2. Sprinkle flour on a work table and roll out the dough with a rolling pin.
3. Have 0.5 pound of butter melted and ready.
4. Spread some of the melted butter on the dough and fold the four corners together.
5. Roll out again with the rolling pin and add more butter.
6. Repeat this operation 3 or 4 times total.
7. This pastry can be filled with many different things.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pasta de Hojaldre No. 2 (Puff Pastry No. 2)
body:
## Ingredients

- one pound of flour
- two egg yolks
- one egg white
- water as needed
- half a pound of butter, melted

## Directions

1. To one pound of flour add two egg yolks, one egg white and the necessary water so the dough becomes soft
2. Sprinkle flour on a board, stretch the dough with the wooden pin
3. Have half a pound of butter melted, spread this on the dough and close the four corners, roll again with the wooden pin and add more butter, repeating this operation
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Paste de Camote (Sweet Potato Paste)
body:
## Ingredients

- yellow sweet potato (1 pound)
- sugar (1.5 pounds)
- milk, cooked (2 glasses)

## Directions

1. Cook the sweet potato until tender, strain and weigh it.
2. Mix the sweet potato with 2 glasses of cooked milk.
3. Place on fire and cook until it reaches the point of ante (a thick, spreadable consistency).
4. For each pound of sweet potato, use 1.5 pounds of sugar.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pastel (Cake with Nuts and Dates)
body:
## Ingredients

- five egg yolks
- one cup of sugar
- one tablespoon of flour
- one teaspoon of Royal baking powder
- one cup of chopped walnuts
- one cup of chopped dates
- a little vanilla
- five egg whites

## Directions

1. Mix the egg yolks with sugar, flour, Royal, the walnuts and the dates
2. Add a little vanilla
3. Finally, add the five beaten egg whites
4. Grease a mold with lard
5. Pour the batter in and put it in the oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pastel Americano (American Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 7 egg yolks
- 0.5 pound sugar
- 0.5 pound butter
- 1 pound flour, sifted
- 1 cup milk
- 1 tablespoon Royal baking powder
- 7 egg whites

## Directions

1. Beat 7 egg yolks with 0.5 pound of sugar and 0.5 pound of butter
2. After half an hour of beating, add 1 pound of sifted flour
3. Beat for five minutes with 1 cup of milk
4. Add 1 tablespoon of Royal and the well-beaten egg whites
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pastel Colombiano (Colombian Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 egg yolks
- 4 ounces butter
- 4 ounces powdered sugar
- 6 egg whites
- 5 ounces salpor or bread flour
- 1 teaspoon Royal baking powder

## Directions

1. Beat 6 egg yolks with 4 ounces of butter and 4 ounces of powdered sugar
2. When well beaten, mix in the 6 egg whites with 5 ounces of salpor or bread flour
3. Add 1 teaspoon of Royal
4. Place in a mold greased with lard and into the oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pastel con Jerez (Cake with Sherry)
body:
## Ingredients

- cazueleja de marquesote
- ante de coco y piña
- media botella de jerez seco
- dos onzas de azúcar
- masa de pastel turco

## Directions

1. Se parte en pedazos delgados una cazueleja de marquesote
2. Se pone en un platón una capa de esto y una capa de ante de coco y piña, otra de marquesote y así se van alternando las capas, procurando que la última sea de marquesote
3. Se endulza media botella de jerez seco con dos onzas de azúcar hecha miel de punto
4. Con esto se baña el pastel
5. Se cubre con una masa hecha de pastel turco, sacada en la piedra de moler o haciéndola de las figuras que se quiera
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pastel de Arroz (Rice Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- half pound rice
- four eggs
- four ounces Parmesan cheese
- one glass cream
- biscuit powder
- butter
- ham
- tomato sauce
- ground meat or chicken

## Directions

1. Prepare the rice as usual; when it is cold, mix in half pound of rice, four eggs, four ounces of Parmesan cheese, one glass of cream, and a little biscuit powder.
2. Coat a mold with butter and biscuit powder.
3. If the mold has a hollow center, place a glass or jar in the middle, coated with butter.
4. Place in a bain-marie; when set, remove the glass and fill the hollow with ham mixed with tomato sauce and ground meat or chicken, all well seasoned.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pastel de Arroz (Rice Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- rice
- half a pound of rice
- 4 eggs
- 4 ounces of Parmesan cheese
- 1 glass of cream
- cracker crumbs
- butter
- a glass or jar for the center

## Directions

1. Prepare the rice as usual; when cold, mix half a pound of rice, 4 eggs, 4 ounces of Parmesan cheese, 1 glass of cream, and a little cracker crumbs
2. Butter a mold and dust with cracker crumbs
3. If the mold has no center hole, place a glass or jar in the center
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pastel de Calabaza o Ayote Tierno (Young Squash Pastry)
body:
## Ingredients

- squashes, chopped
- a little water
- onion
- tomato
- one clove of garlic, chopped
- one tablespoon of butter
- salt to taste
- ground bread powder with cinnamon
- one small clove
- Castilian peppers
- half a teaspoonful of vinegar
- puff pastry dough
- lard for frying

## Directions

1. Chop the squashes and place in a dish with a little water; add onion, tomato, one chopped clove of garlic, one tablespoon of butter and salt to taste
2. When cooked and without water, add ground bread powder with cinnamon, one small clove, some Castilian peppers, half a teaspoonful of vinegar
3. Remove from the fire and have a puff pastry dough prepared
4. Cut to the desired size, stretch with the wooden pin, fill with the squash, fold, crimp and place in the oven
5. If desired with more flavor, fry in hot lard
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pastel de Capas (Layered Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- pasta de hojaldre
- ante de membrillo

## Directions

1. Se prepara una pasta de hojaldre
2. Se sacan las pastas del tamaño del platón, sobre una hojalata
3. Se ponen a cocer al horno
4. Cuando esté cocido se pone una capa de esto, una capa de ante de membrillo
5. Se cubre con otra capa de hojaldre y otra de membrillo y así sucesivamente hasta cubrirla con una capa de la misma masa cruda, haciéndole sus laborcitas
6. Se pone al horno a que se cueza
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pastel de Ciruela (Plum Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound pitted plums
- 1 pound sugar
- 1 glass of water
- 1 pound flour
- 5 eggs
- a pinch of salt
- 0.5 pound butter

## Directions

1. Put 1 pound of pitted plums in 1 pound of sugar with 1 glass of water until it reaches the point of "ante" (soft ball stage)
2. Meanwhile, work 1 pound of flour with 5 eggs, a pinch of salt and 0.5 pound of butter
3. Knead for half an hour and let rest for a quarter hour
4. Then stretch with a rolling pin and cut the dough to the size of the plate in which the cake will be made
5. Place on the plate very well adjusted, put in the oven and as soon as it bakes without taking color, remove it and place the plum on top
6. Take out some thin strips very straight and make on the plate a weave like a petate pattern
7. Put in the oven, when it browns remove and serve
