source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pastel de Conejo (Rabbit Pie)
body:
## Ingredients

- one rabbit
- salt
- lard and butter
- ham pieces
- pepper powder
- one teaspoon flour
- one glass white wine or sherry
- broth
- rabbit livers
- puff pastry dough
- olives
- capers
- truffles and mushrooms (if available)
- salchichón slices
- Extremadura chorizo with fat
- hard-boiled egg slices

## Directions

1. Clean the rabbit well, cut it into pieces, and fry in lard and butter with salt
2. When it takes color, add ham pieces, pepper powder, and one teaspoon of flour
3. When browned, add one glass of white wine or sherry and a little broth
4. Once cooked, remove the rabbit and chop the livers that should be precooked, adding them to the sauce until it reduces to one quarter
5. Prepare a puff pastry dough, roll it with a pin, and use to cover a baking pan
6. Place in the oven to cook without browning
7. Layer the stewed rabbit at the desired height, adding olives, capers, truffles and mushrooms if available, salchichón slices, pieces of Extremadura chorizo with their fat, and hard-boiled egg slices
8. Cover with the sauce and top with another thin layer of puff pastry, decorating with small designs
9. Place in the oven to brown
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pastel de Fresa (Strawberry Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- bastantes rodajas de marquesote
- mantequilla
- muy buen coñac
- almíbar de fresa o de durazno
- dos claras de huevo
- un poco de azúcar

## Directions

1. Se hacen bastantes rodajas de marquesote
2. Se unta un molde de mantequilla
3. Se ponen rodajas de marquesote en todo el rededor
4. Se baña bien con muy buen coñac
5. Se le pone almíbar de fresa o de durazno
6. Se le pone encima una capa de mantequilla fresca
7. Se cubre con otra capa de marquesote
8. Se embetunan con dos claras de huevo batidas con un poco de azúcar
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pastel de Fresa (Strawberry Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- marquesote (sponge cake)
- fresh ripe strawberries
- one glass of whipped cream with sugar

## Directions

1. Break the marquesote and place it on a flat plate
2. Cover it completely with whole ripe strawberries
3. On top pour a glass of cream beaten with sugar
4. Cover with the remaining marquesote
5. Cover with more cream and adorn with ripe strawberries
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pastel de Frutas (Fruit Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- About 15 chilacayotes
- 15 figs
- 10 oranges
- 15 coconut candies
- Candied lemons if available
- Three ten-cent yolk pastries
- Raisins

## Directions

1. Chop about 15 chilacayotes, 15 figs, 10 oranges, 15 coconut candies, and candied lemons if available very finely
2. Chop three ten-cent yolk pastries
3. Butter a mold
4. Place a layer of chopped bread
5. Place a layer of chopped sweets with raisins
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pastel de Frutas (Fruit Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 15 chilacayotes
- 15 figs
- 10 oranges
- 15 coconut candies
- candied lemons (if available)
- 3 egg yolk breads (at ten centavos each)
- butter or lard for greasing
- raisins, pitted
- 1 liter of milk cooked with cream
- 3 whole eggs
- 3 egg yolks
- 4 ounces sugar
- 1 tablespoon vanilla or 1 glass of sherry

## Directions

1. Chop about 15 chilacayotes, 15 figs, 10 oranges, 15 coconut candies and if available some candied lemons; chop everything very finely
2. Chop three egg yolk breads
3. Place in a mold greased with lard, alternating layers: a layer of chopped bread, a layer of sweets with pitted raisins, another layer of bread, and continue alternating the layers, ensuring the last layer is bread
4. In 1 liter of milk cooked with cream, add 3 whole eggs and 3 egg yolks, 4 ounces of sugar, and 1 tablespoon of vanilla or 1 glass of sherry
5. Beat very well and pour this mixture over the cake
6. This should be done at night to put it in the oven the next day, which will take two hours to bake
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pastel de Grosella (Currant Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- one cup of flour
- one quarter teaspoon of Royal baking powder
- a pinch of salt
- one cup of currant (canned)
- three quarters cup of sour cream
- one tablespoon of sugar
- one quarter teaspoon of nutmeg powder

## Directions

1. Mix everything very well
2. Put in a buttered mold
3. Place in the oven for half an hour
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pastel de Jugo de Limón (Lemon Juice Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- half pound flour
- two eggs
- salt
- four ounces butter or lard
- three lemons
- six egg yolks
- sugar
- six egg whites

## Directions

1. Make puff pastry dough with half a pound of flour, two eggs, a pinch of salt, and four ounces of butter or lard; knead well and roll out with a rolling pin.
2. Put a very thin layer on a pan or plate and bake in the oven just until cooked.
3. Beat four ounces of butter with the juice of three lemons, put on heat, and gradually add six tablespoons of sugar and six egg yolks without stopping to stir.
4. When thickened, cover the pastry with this mixture.
5. Beat the six egg whites as for turrón, add three tablespoons of powdered sugar and the zest of three lemons, cover the cream with this and bake in the oven until golden.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pastel de Jugo de Limón o de Naranja (Lemon or Orange Juice Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 ounces of butter
- juice of 3 large lemons or juice of 3 oranges
- 6 tablespoons of sugar
- 6 egg yolks
- baked pastry crust or American pie dough
- 6 egg whites
- 3 tablespoons of powdered sugar
- zest of 3 fruits of whichever was used for the cream

## Directions

1. Beat 4 ounces of butter with the juice of 3 lemons or 3 oranges
2. Place over heat, adding one at a time 6 tablespoons of sugar and 6 egg yolks alternately, stirring constantly
3. Continue until thickened
4. Use a pre-baked pastry crust or pie dough mold
5. Pour the mixture into the crust
6. Beat the 6 egg whites as if for nougat with 3 tablespoons of powdered sugar and the zest of 3 fruits
7. Place lightly in the oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pastel de la T. (T. Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 8 egg yolks
- 0.5 pound sugar
- 0.5 pound butter
- 8 egg whites
- 1 tablespoon cream
- 0.5 pound fine yucca flour, sifted
- 0.5 pound bread flour
- 1 teaspoon Royal baking powder
- 1 ounce chopped raisins and almonds
- cornstarch

## Directions

1. Beat 8 egg yolks with 0.5 pound of sugar and 0.5 pound of butter
2. When well beaten, mix with the 8 egg whites that will have been beaten like for nougat
3. Add 1 tablespoon of cream, 0.5 pound of fine sifted yucca flour, 0.5 pound of bread flour, 1 teaspoon of Royal and 1 ounce of chopped raisins and almonds
4. When everything is well mixed, add a dash of cornstarch
5. Place in a mold greased with lard and bake
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pastel de Leche (Milk Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- Half pound of butter
- Four ounces of ground sugar
- Three egg yolks
- Half pound of sifted flour
- Half cup of milk
- One teaspoon of Royal

## Directions

1. Beat half pound of butter with four ounces of ground sugar and three egg yolks
2. After ten minutes of beating, add half pound of sifted flour, half cup of milk, and one teaspoon of Royal
3. Mix well
4. Pour into a buttered mold
5. Put in a hot oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pastel de Manzana (Apple Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- apples
- apricot
- one pound of sugar
- two ounces of melted butter
- three eggs
- a little butter
- half a pound of flour
- a pinch of salt

## Directions

1. Cook a little apple with apricot, strain and mix with one pound of sugar and two ounces of melted butter
2. Take a round pan, place a glass in the middle and arrange the fruit all around
3. Make a dough with three eggs, a little butter, half a pound of flour and a pinch of salt
4. Place in the oven and when browned, flip it over
5. Serve cold or hot, as desired
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pastel de Manzana (Apple Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- manzanas
- poca agua
- azúcar blanca
- una cucharada de mantequilla lavada
- almendras
- pasas
- duraznos en almíbar

## Directions

1. Se cuecen las manzanas con poca agua
2. Cuando estén cocidas se sacan y se deja que escurran
3. Luego se cuelan y lo que pese de manzana eso se le pone de azúcar blanca
4. Se pone al fuego a que dé punto de ante
5. Cuando esté se deja enfriar
6. Luego se le revuelve una cucharada de mantequilla lavada
7. Se forman los pastelitos y se rellenan con almendras, pasas picadas y duraznos en almíbar
8. Se cubre con la misma pasta
9. Se ponen al horno diez minutos
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pastel de Odemburgo (Oldenburg Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- Twelve egg whites
- Twelve egg yolks
- Half pound of butter
- Half pound of powdered sugar
- One pound of sifted flour
- One full teaspoon of Royal
- One teaspoon of vanilla
- Lemon zest if desired
- Raisins
- Chopped almonds
- Sweet bread powder

## Directions

1. Beat twelve egg whites as for nougat
2. Beat twelve egg yolks separately with half pound of butter and half pound of powdered sugar
3. When everything is well beaten, combine the two mixtures
4. Add one pound of sifted flour, one teaspoon of Royal, one teaspoon of vanilla, lemon zest if desired, raisins, and chopped almonds
5. Pour into a mold buttered and dusted with sweet bread powder
6. Put in a hot oven
7. When it rises, cover with paper and after ten minutes insert a knife; if it comes out clean it is done
8. If for tea, serve plain; otherwise serve with syrup or chocolate cream
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pastel de Papa (Potato Pie)
body:
## Ingredients

- chicken
- tomato
- garlic
- onions
- bay leaf
- thyme
- cloves
- pepper
- cinnamon
- orange juice
- salt
- two pounds potato
- four ounces butter
- milk
- sweet bell pepper
- peas
- olives
- capers
- Parmesan cheese

## Directions

1. Prepare the chicken as a stew with tomato, garlic, onions, bay leaf, thyme, cloves, pepper and cinnamon, all in powder form.
2. Use orange juice instead of vinegar and add salt.
3. Prepare a good potato purée by cooking two pounds of potato in little water, passing them through a strainer while hot, and mixing with four ounces of butter, salt and milk so it is not too watery.
4. In a buttered baking dish, place the chicken with strips of peeled sweet bell pepper and some cooked peas, and if desired, olives and capers.
5. Cover with the remaining purée, sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and place in the oven to brown.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pastel de Pasas (Raisin Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 0.5 pound butter
- 0.5 pound sugar
- 4 eggs
- 0.5 pound flour, sifted
- 1 glass of milk
- 0.5 pound flour
- 0.5 glass of sherry
- 1 teaspoon Royal baking powder
- 0.5 pound raisins, figs, chilacayote and candied lemons, chopped

## Directions

1. To 0.5 pound of butter add 0.5 pound of sugar, 4 eggs (white and yolk) and beat very well
2. Then mix in 0.5 pound of sifted flour, beat very well
3. Add 1 glass of milk, then add another 0.5 pound of flour with 0.5 glass of sherry
4. When everything is well mixed, add 1 teaspoon of Royal, 0.5 pound of chopped raisins, figs, chilacayote and candied lemons
5. Pour everything into a mold greased with lard and place in the oven very hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pastel de Plátano (Banana Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- one cup of well-ground banana
- one half cup of butter
- one cup of sugar
- one tablespoon of Royal baking powder
- two beaten eggs
- three tablespoons of sour milk
- one tablespoon of vanilla
- one half cup of flour

## Directions

1. Beat the butter and sugar until it becomes sandy
2. Add the eggs and salt
3. Add the flour sifted with the Royal baking powder
4. Add the milk and finally the banana
5. Place in a greased mold and put in a hot oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pastel de Taza (Cup Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- One cup of milk
- One cup of butter
- Two cups of powdered sugar
- Two cups of flour
- Five egg yolks
- Three egg whites
- One teaspoon of Royal
- One teaspoon of vanilla

## Directions

1. Beat sugar with butter until very thick
2. Add flour little by little
3. Add milk
4. Add one egg yolk and beat for five minutes
5. Add another egg yolk and beat five minutes more
6. Repeat with the remaining three yolks, beating five minutes each time
7. Finally add three beaten egg whites as for nougat, one teaspoon of sifted Royal, and one teaspoon of vanilla
8. Pour into a buttered mold
9. Put in a hot oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pastel de Viena (Viennese Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- Four cups of flour
- Two cups of sifted sugar
- One cup of milk with cream
- One cup of melted butter
- Nine egg yolks

## Directions

1. Place all ingredients in a bowl
2. Mix everything well and beat
3. Pour into a buttered mold
4. Put in a hot oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pastel del Norte (Northern Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1.5 pounds flour
- 0.5 pound butter or melted lard
- 0.5 pound sugar
- 1 small glass of cognac
- 9 eggs, beaten like for nougat
- 1 teaspoon Royal baking powder

## Directions

1. To 1.5 pounds of flour add 0.5 pound of melted butter or lard, 0.5 pound of sugar, 1 small glass of cognac, 9 eggs beaten like for nougat, and 1 teaspoon of Royal
2. Place in greased molds and bake in the oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pastel Holandés (Dutch Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- Apples (one pound, well cored)
- Sugar (half a pound)
- Pitted raisins (two ounces)
- Figs and candied lemons (if available)
- Flour (one pound)
- Butter (half a pound)
- Sugar (four ounces)

## Directions

1. Peel one pound of apples, well cored, and split them lengthwise.
2. Add half a pound of sugar, two ounces of pitted raisins, figs and candied lemons if available, one pound of flour, and half a pound of butter.
3. Mix very well with the hand without kneading, with four ounces of sugar well mixed.
4. Butter a mold and put a thin layer of this dough in it; bake briefly in the oven without browning it.
5. On top of this place the fruit and cover with the rest of the dough but sprinkled, not evenly.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pastel para Té (Tea Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 0.5 pound peeled almonds
- 8 egg yolks
- 0.5 pound sugar
- 4 egg whites
- 6 ounces cornstarch

## Directions

1. Grind 0.5 pound of peeled almonds dry
2. Beat 8 egg yolks with 0.5 pound of sugar and 4 egg whites, like for nougat
3. When very thick, mix together
4. Mix in the almonds and 6 ounces of cornstarch
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pastel para Té (Tea Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- media libra de almendra pelada en seco
- ocho yemas
- media libra de azúcar
- cuatro claras de huevo
- seis onzas de almidón cernido
- media cucharadita de Royal
- mantequilla

## Directions

1. Se muele media libra de almendra pelada en seco
2. Se baten ocho yemas con media libra de azúcar y cuatro claras de huevo, como para turrón
3. Cuando esté bien espeso, se revuelven
4. Se le mezcla la almendra y seis onzas de almidón cernido
5. Se le agrega media cucharadita de Royal
6. En moldecitos pequeños untados de mantequilla o cajitas de papel se ponen al horno
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pastel Serafín (Serafín Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- Nine ounces of powdered sugar
- Nine ounces of flour
- Nine ounces of butter
- One teaspoon of vanilla
- Four whole eggs

## Directions

1. Place powdered sugar, eggs, and vanilla in a copper pot
2. Place over gentle heat or double boiler
3. Beat the contents of the pot until it reaches a foamy appearance and has doubled in volume
4. Add sifted flour carefully, adding melted butter
5. Pour this batter into a mold buttered and dusted with flour
6. Put in a hot oven to bake quickly
7. Pour some of the batter into small fluted molds, similarly buttered and floured
8. Place on a bed of ash and put in the oven
9. When baked, place the cake on a platter with the small molds around it
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pastel Turco (Turkish Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- una libra de harina de salpor
- dos huevos con clara y yemas
- cuatro onzas de azúcar seca y molida
- cinco onzas de manteca
- manjar blanco, picado de carne o de verdura

## Directions

1. A una libra de harina de salpor se le ponen dos huevos con clara y yemas, cuatro onzas de azúcar seca y molida, cinco onzas de manteca
2. Se soba media hora
3. Se hacen unas tortillitas del tamaño que se quiera
4. Se rellenan de manjar blanco, de picado de carne o de verdura como el de los chiles, sólo que se hace más dulce
5. Se cubre con otra y se hace la moldura que se quiera
6. Si no, se sacan las pastas en la piedra de moler, procurando que el colocho salga muy delgado
7. Luego sobre una hojalata se ponen al horno
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pastelitos de Almendra (Almond Small Cakes)
body:
## Ingredients

- media libra de almendra pelada y seca
- cuatro onzas de azúcar cernida
- ocho huevos
- mantequilla

## Directions

1. Se muele media libra de almendra pelada y seca
2. Se le mezclan cuatro onzas de azúcar cernida
3. Se le revuelven ocho huevos batidos como para marquesote
4. Bien mezclado todo se pone en moldecitos untados de mantequilla o cajitas de papel al horno caliente
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pastelitos de Naranja (Orange Small Cakes)
body:
## Ingredients

- dos huevos
- cuatro onzas de azúcar
- media libra de harina
- dos onzas de almendra pelada y molida en seco
- un cuarto de onza de polvo de canela molida
- unos diez clavitos de especia
- una cucharadita de levadura
- rayo de naranja
- dos onzas de manteca o mantequilla

## Directions

1. Se baten muy bien dos huevos con cuatro onzas de azúcar
2. Se les mezcla media libra de harina, dos onzas de almendra pelada y molida en seco, un cuarto de onza de polvo de canela molida con unos diez clavitos de especia, una cucharadita de levadura
3. Se amasa todo muy bien con un poquito de rayo de naranja
4. Se tiende con el bolillo
5. Se cortan las figuras como se quiera
6. Se tapan y al siguiente día se embetunan con huevo batido
7. Se ponen al horno mezclándoles dos onzas de manteca o mantequilla
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pastelitos de Nata (Cream Small Cakes)
body:
## Ingredients

- media libra de harina
- media cucharadita de sal
- media cucharadita de Royal
- dos onzas de mantequilla
- la cuarta parte de un vaso de natas
- huevo

## Directions

1. Se pone media libra de harina, media cucharadita de sal, media cucharadita de Royal, dos onzas de mantequilla y la cuarta parte de un vaso de natas
2. Se amasa
3. Se tiende con el bolillo
4. Se cortan las figuras
5. En hojalatas se embetunan con huevo
6. Se meten al horno
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pastelitos Fritos (Fried Small Pastries)
body:
## Ingredients

- una libra de harina
- cinco huevos
- un poquito de sal
- un poquito de agua tibia
- media libra de mantequilla
- manjar blanco o picado de carne
- polvo de azúcar cernida
- achiote

## Directions

1. A una libra de harina se le ponen cinco huevos, un poquito de sal y un poquito de agua tibia
2. Se amasa muy bien para que quede una masa no muy dura
3. Se deja reposar media hora
4. Se tiende con el bolillo
5. Se tiene derretida media libra de mantequilla, se le unta a la masa y se le espolvorea harina
6. Se cieña de las cuatro puntas y se vuelve a tender con el bolillo
7. Se le vuelve a poner mantequilla y harina y se hace esta operación cinco o seis veces
8. Por último se tienden y se cortan los pastelitos del tamaño que se quiera
9. Se rellenan de manjar blanco o de picado de carne
10. Se doblan en forma de un librito y se fríen en manteca muy caliente
11. Se sacan y se les echa polvo de azúcar cernida encima
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pata con Alcaparras (Leg with Capers)
body:
## Ingredients

- one leg, well cleaned and cooked with salt
- one tablespoon of butter
- onion
- tomato, peeled and chopped
- one tablespoon of capers
- ten or twelve pitted olives
- salt
- a little of the broth in which the leg cooked

## Directions

1. Well cleaned and cooked, the leg is cut into pieces, separating the bones
2. Put in a pan one tablespoon of butter; add onion and peeled, chopped tomato
3. Into this add the leg with one tablespoon of capers, ten or twelve pitted olives and add salt and a little of the broth in which the leg cooked
4. Let it boil about ten minutes and serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Patas a la Cordobesa (Feet Córdoba Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- feet
- cloth
- flour
- beaten egg
- lard
- vinegar
- dry sherry
- sesame seeds, toasted
- Castilian pepper
- clove
- tomato
- cinnamon
- water

## Directions

1. Cook the feet.
2. Dry them very well with a clean cloth.
3. Coat with flour and then in beaten egg.
4. Fry in hot lard and then leave on very low heat.
5. In the same pan, leave a little lard, add a little vinegar and one large tablespoon of dry sherry.
6. Grind half an ounce of toasted sesame with about four Castilian peppercorns, two cloves and a tomato, with a little cinnamon.
7. Dissolve with a little water and bring to a boil with the rest.
8. Baste the feet with this sauce.
9. Serve hot.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Patas a la Española (Spanish-Style Feet)
body:
## Ingredients

- Feet
- half pound of chickpeas
- two heads of garlic
- two onions
- bunch of parsley
- mint
- piece of ham
- peppercorns
- three cloves
- piece of cinnamon
- two or three cumin seeds
- piece of ginger
- piece of nutmeg
- oil
- teaspoon of paprika powder
- broth
- slices of chorizo

## Directions

1. Cook the feet with about half a pound of chickpeas, two heads of garlic, two onions, a bunch of parsley, mint and a piece of ham
2. When everything is well cooked, grind some peppercorns, about three cloves, a piece of cinnamon, about two or three cumin seeds, a piece of ginger and a piece of nutmeg
3. Fry this in a little hot oil with a teaspoon of paprika powder
4. Add a little of the same broth and put in the feet with the chickpeas, slices of chorizo, the ham divided up, and serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Patas a la Italiana (Feet Italian Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- feet
- salt
- bay leaves
- clove
- pepper
- parsley sprig
- lard
- bread powder
- Parmesan cheese powder
- butter or melted lard

## Directions

1. Clean the feet well.
2. Cook with salt, two bay leaves, clove, pepper and a parsley sprig.
3. When cooked, cut them into pieces, removing all the bones.
4. Grease a pan with lard and add bread powder.
5. Layer with pieces of feet, then Parmesan cheese powder, then more feet pieces, then bread powder.
6. Drizzle with a little melted lard or butter.
7. Put in the oven for ten minutes; if there is no oven, it can be placed over two fires.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Patas a la Italiana (Italian-Style Feet)
body:
## Ingredients

- Feet
- salt
- butter
- white bread, ground
- black pepper
- clove
- Parmesan cheese, grated

## Directions

1. Cook the feet with salt
2. When they are well cooked, butter a platter and put a layer of ground white bread with pepper and clove
3. Place a layer of chopped feet on top, then a layer of grated Parmesan cheese, then another of feet and another of bread, alternating in this way, making sure the last layer is cheese
4. Sprinkle with a tablespoon of lard and butter and put in the oven for about ten minutes
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Patas a la Marinera (Sailor-Style Feet)
body:
## Ingredients

- Feet
- salt
- thyme
- chopped parsley
- slices of chorizo or sausage and ham
- toasted bread
- garlic cloves
- Castilian peppercorns
- tablespoon of paprika powder
- broth from cooking

## Directions

1. Split the feet and put them to cook with salt, thyme and chopped parsley
2. When they are almost cooked, add slices of chorizo or sausage and ham
3. Grind a little toasted bread with a garlic clove, a few Castilian peppercorns and a tablespoon of paprika powder
4. Fry this, dissolving it with a little of the same broth, and add the feet with the chorizo and ham
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Patas a la Mexicana (Mexican-Style Feet)
body:
## Ingredients

- Feet
- salt
- vinegar
- two bay leaves
- black pepper powder
- roasted tomatoes
- onions in vinegar

## Directions

1. After the feet are cooked with salt, prepare a little vinegar with two bay leaves, black pepper powder and salt
2. Place the feet in this mixture, pressing them with a weight, and after three or four hours place them on the platter
3. Have some roasted tomatoes that are not too finely ground, add a little of the vinegar in which the feet were soaked and cover the little feet with this sauce
4. Add pickled onions and serve cold
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Patas a la Mexicana (Pig's Feet Mexican Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- cooked pig's feet
- salt
- vinegar
- two bay leaves
- pepper powder
- roasted tomatoes
- onions in vinegar

## Directions

1. After cooking with salt, prepare a little vinegar with two bay leaves, pepper powder and salt
2. Put the feet in this pressing with a weight, and after three or four hours place on a platter
3. Have some roasted and not very ground tomatoes, add a little of the vinegar in which the feet were and with this sauce cover the feet, adding pickled onions
4. Serve cold
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Patas a la Vinagreta (Feet Vinaigrette Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- Feet
- salt
- tender lettuce

## Directions

1. Prepare exactly as the previous recipe, except do not add sauce
2. Serve with tender lettuce
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Patas en Adobo (Feet in Adobo Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- feet
- salt
- miltomate
- tomato, cooked
- cumin
- Castilian pepper
- garlic clove
- achiote
- guaque chile
- piece of French bread, fried
- lard
- broth

## Directions

1. Cook the feet with salt.
2. When well cooked, chop them, removing all the small bones.
3. Grind miltomate and cooked tomato, cumin, Castilian pepper, a garlic clove, a little achiote, a guaque chile and a piece of fried French bread.
4. Fry in a little lard, thinning it with the same broth.
5. Add the feet to this mixture.
6. Serve hot.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Patas en Adobo (Pig's Feet in Adobo)
body:
## Ingredients

- well cooked pig's feet
- some cooked tomato
- oregano
- cumin
- a soaked bread piece
- a small piece of achiote

## Directions

1. Well cooked feet are minced
2. Grind some cooked tomato, oregano, cumin, a soaked bread piece and a small piece of achiote
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Patas en Huevo (Feet in Egg Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- feet
- cloth
- flour
- beaten egg
- lard
- tomato
- dry or fresh chile
- onion heads
- salt

## Directions

1. Cook the feet well.
2. Dry them with a cloth.
3. Coat in flour and then in beaten egg.
4. Fry in hot lard.
5. Cook two tomatoes, a dry or fresh chile, two heads of onion and salt.
6. When well cooked, mash it.
7. Baste the feet with this sauce.
8. Serve hot.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Patas en Huevo (Feet in Egg)
body:
## Ingredients

- Feet
- flour
- beaten egg
- lard or butter
- peeled and chopped tomato
- onion
- water
- salt
- bread powder
- achiote
- tomatoes
- peeled onions
- green chiles

## Directions

1. After the feet are well cooked, dry them, coat them in flour, then wrap them in beaten egg and place in the oven to remove the fat
2. In a little lard, fry some peeled and chopped tomato with onion
3. Add a little water, salt and bread powder ground with a little achiote, and bathe the feet with this
4. Alternatively, cook some tomatoes with peeled onions, green chiles and salt, break this up well while hot and serve with the feet
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Patas en Pepitoria (Pig's Feet in Pepitoria Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- cooked pig's feet
- flour
- egg
- lard
- sesame seeds
- a little pepitoria
- roasted tomatillo
- one pepper
- a small piece of cinnamon
- two cloves

## Directions

1. Dry the cooked feet and coat in flour
2. Beat the egg, first the white then the yolk
3. Wrap the feet and fry in hot lard
4. When golden, remove and put in the oven to drain all the fat
5. Grind a little sesame seeds, a little pepitoria and roasted tomatillo with one pepper, a small piece of cinnamon and two cloves
6. Thin with a little water
7. Fry and add the feet for a light boil
8. Serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Patas en Revolcado de Pimienta de Chiapas (Feet in Chiapas Pepper Coating)
body:
## Ingredients

- feet
- salt
- miltomate, toasted
- Chiapas peppers
- zambo chile, toasted
- piece of French bread, soaked
- broth
- lard
- potatoes

## Directions

1. Cook the feet well with salt.
2. Chop them, removing all the small bones.
3. Grind a bit of toasted miltomate with ten to fifteen Chiapas peppers, a toasted zambo chile and a piece of soaked French bread.
4. Dissolve all this with a little of the broth in which the feet were cooked.
5. Fry in a little lard.
6. Add the feet to this mixture.
7. Serve with plain potatoes.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Patas Guisadas (Stewed Feet)
body:
## Ingredients

- feet
- salt
- water
- chickpeas
- garlic head
- onion heads
- parsley sprigs
- mint sprigs
- ham
- chorizo
- paprika

## Directions

1. Clean the feet well.
2. Cut into pieces and cook with salt, sufficient water and half an ounce of chickpeas (which should have been soaked the day before).
3. When the feet and chickpeas are almost cooked, add a head of garlic, two heads of onion, two sprigs of parsley, one sprig of mint, ham and chorizo in slices.
4. If available, add one tablespoon of paprika.
5. Let it simmer until everything is well cooked.
6. Before serving, remove the garlic, parsley, onion and mint.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Patas Guisadas (Stewed Pig's Feet)
body:
## Ingredients

- pig's feet halved
- carrot
- minced ham
- parsley sprigs
- glass of white wine
- pepper powder
- a teaspoon fried flour
- butter

## Directions

1. Cook the feet halved in half and add a carrot, minced ham piece, parsley sprigs, a glass of white wine and pepper powder
2. When cooked add a small teaspoon of flour fried in butter
3. When serving remove all the vegetables
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Patas Migadas (Feet with Crumbs)
body:
## Ingredients

- feet
- lard
- tomato, peeled and chopped
- onion
- garlic clove
- white bread
- pepper powder
- parsley, chopped
- vinegar

## Directions

1. After cooking the feet, cut them into pieces of desired size.
2. Put a pan on the fire with lard.
3. Add peeled and chopped tomato, onion and a garlic clove.
4. When half fried, add the feet with a little white bread, pepper powder, a little chopped parsley and a teaspoon of vinegar.
5. Serve dry.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pato Chileno (Chilean Duck)
body:
## Ingredients

- duck
- parsley
- garlic
- onion
- bay leaf
- thyme
- tomato
- three spices powder
- cinnamon
- clove
- pepper
- one glass of wine
- one glass of vinegar

## Directions

1. Clean the duck well and place it on ice, preferably for two or three days.
2. Then plunge it into boiling water for five minutes, remove it, dry it well.
3. Fry it in oil until it takes on color.
4. Add parsley, crushed garlic, onion, bay leaf, thyme, peeled and chopped tomato, three spices powder, cinnamon, clove, and pepper.
5. Add one glass of wine and one of vinegar.
6. When the duck is cooked, strain the sauce and serve hot.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pato con Nabo (Duck with Turnip)
body:
## Ingredients

- duck
- turnip
- sugar
- achiote
- salt
- parsley
- onion
- garlic
- bay leaf

## Directions

1. Clean the duck and place in a pan to fry
2. When it takes color, remove it
3. In the same fat, fry the turnip cut into small pieces
4. When the turnip takes color, remove it and add one tablespoon of sugar
5. Make a seasoning paste with achiote, salt, parsley, onion, half a head of garlic, and a bay leaf
6. Place the duck in this mixture and when it is tender, add the turnips, taking care that they do not fall apart
7. Serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pato con Nabo Blanco (Duck with White Turnip)
body:
## Ingredients

- duck
- two spoonfuls of lard
- salt
- water
- two bay leaves
- two onion heads
- pepper powder
- three white turnip roots
- half a teaspoon of burned sugar

## Directions

1. Clean and cut the duck and fry in two spoonfuls of lard with salt
2. When it takes color, cover with water
3. Add two bay leaves, two onion heads, and pepper powder
4. When it has boiled for half an hour, add three peeled and cut white turnip roots
5. Add half a teaspoon of burned sugar
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pato con Zanahoria (Duck with Carrot)
body:
## Ingredients

- four spoonfuls of butter
- duck
- salt
- four peeled and cut carrots
- one spoonful of flour fried in butter
- water
- pepper powder

## Directions

1. Fry well-cleaned and cut duck in four spoonfuls of butter with salt
2. When it takes a golden color, add four peeled and cut carrots and one spoonful of flour fried in butter
3. Cover with water and a little pepper powder
4. Let cook and serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pato en Salsa de Huevos (Duck in Egg Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- one duck
- salt
- one tablespoon lard or butter
- two garlic cloves
- two onions
- a little parsley
- three roasted tomatoes
- about ten Castilian peppercorns
- three hard-boiled egg yolks
- a piece of bread fried in lard
- broth from cooking the ducks
- slices of cooked ham
- one tablespoon oil

## Directions

1. After cleaning the duck well, cook it with salt
2. Once cooked, remove it and place it in a pan over heat with a tablespoon of lard or butter
3. Chop two garlic cloves, two onions, and a little parsley and add to the lard
4. Grind three roasted tomatoes, about ten Castilian peppercorns, three hard-boiled egg yolks, and a piece of bread fried in lard
5. Mix everything in the same broth in which the ducks were cooked
6. Pour into the pan with slices of cooked ham and one tablespoon of oil
7. Add the whole duck or as many as desired to cook in this sauce
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pato en Salsa de Huevos (Duck in Egg Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- Cleaned duck
- Salt
- 1 tablespoon of lard or butter
- 2 cloves of garlic
- 2 onions
- A little parsley
- 3 roasted tomatoes
- About 10 Castilian peppers
- 3 hard-boiled egg yolks
- 1 piece of bread fried in butter
- Broth in which the duck was cooked

## Directions

1. After the duck is well cleaned, cook it with salt
2. Once cooked, remove it and place it in a pan on the fire with a tablespoon of lard or butter
3. Chop 2 cloves of garlic, 2 onions and a little parsley and add to the butter
4. Grind, for one duck, 3 roasted tomatoes, about 10 Castilian peppers, 3 hard-boiled egg yolks and a piece of bread fried in butter
5. Dissolve everything in the same broth in which the duck was cooked
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pato Relleno (Stuffed Duck)
body:
## Ingredients

- Four ounces of prune
- Ten or twelve apples
- Two ounces of almond
- Sweet bread powder
- Pepper powder
- Salt
- Three raw egg yolks
- Duck, deboned if desired
- Butter
- Two onion heads
- Two bay leaves
- One sprig of thyme
- One cup of vinegar
- One glass of white wine

## Directions

1. Cook four ounces of prune; peel ten or twelve apples, removing all seeds and chop them well
2. Peel and chop two ounces of almond, mix well with the pitted prune and add sweet bread powder, a little pepper powder, salt and three raw egg yolks
3. Mix everything well and fill the duck which should be deboned beforehand if desired, or fill it as is
4. Rub well with butter, salt, pepper powder, two onion heads, two bay leaves, one sprig of thyme, one cup of vinegar
5. Place in the oven; if desired cover with water, one glass of white wine, salt and some bay leaves
6. When cooked, brush with butter and place in the oven to brown
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pato Relleno (Stuffed Duck)
body:
## Ingredients

- one duck
- duck meat from the thickest parts
- duck livers
- two pounds pork loin
- salt
- onion
- chopped parsley
- three or four mushrooms (if available)
- butter
- onions
- two bay leaves

## Directions

1. Bone the duck as you would a turkey
2. Remove some meat from the thickest parts and chop it together with the livers and two pounds of pork loin
3. Season with salt, onion, and chopped parsley; if mushrooms are available, chop three or four and add
4. Mix everything together well
5. Stuff the duck with this mixture and sew it closed with thick thread
6. Coat well with butter and place in a pan with quartered onions and two bay leaves
7. Place in the oven, basting frequently so it does not dry out
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Patos a la Holandesa (Ducks à la Hollandaise)
body:
## Ingredients

- Cleaned ducks
- 1/4 ounce of saltpeter
- 1 glass of water
- 1 tablespoon of salt
- Onion
- Garlic, crushed
- Lard or butter
- Broth
- Powder of pepper
- Thyme
- Laurel
- Onion
- Leeks
- 1 sprig of mint
- 1 sprig of parsley
- 1 glass of white wine

## Directions

1. After the ducks are well cleaned, prepare 1/4 ounce of saltpeter in a glass of water with a tablespoon of salt
2. Bathe the duck inside and out with this mixture
3. Place it in a dish with crushed onion and garlic
4. Leave it in this infusion overnight
5. The next day, remove it and fry it in lard or butter
6. When it takes color, add the rest of the infusion and a little broth, powder of pepper, thyme, laurel, onion, leeks, a sprig of mint, a sprig of parsley and a glass of white wine
7. Let it boil for about two hours
8. Place it on a platter and serve with the same sauce strained
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Patos en Vino (Ducks in Wine)
body:
## Ingredients

- Cleaned ducks
- Oil
- Salt
- Half a bottle of white, red or sherry wine
- Powder of cinnamon
- Pepper
- Clove
- Laurel
- Thyme
- Water
- Tender lettuces

## Directions

1. Well cleaned ducks are fried in oil and salt
2. When they have taken on a golden color, add half a bottle of white, red or sherry wine, whichever is preferred, powder of cinnamon, pepper, clove, laurel and thyme
3. Cover completely with water and salt
4. Let them boil
5. When they are reduced, brown them and serve with tender lettuces
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Paté (Pâté)
body:
## Ingredients

- one hen
- twelve ounces of veal
- nine ounces of pork
- two ounces of cooked ham
- one small can of liver pâté
- three tablespoons of cognac
- two tablespoons of oil
- four eggs
- salt
- pepper powder
- nutmeg
- thyme
- bay leaf
- water

## Directions

1. Debone the hen leaving only the skin.
2. Grind the hen meat with twelve ounces of veal and nine ounces of pork.
3. Place in a container and add two ounces of chopped cooked ham, one small can of liver pâté, three tablespoons of cognac, two tablespoons of oil, and four beaten eggs.
4. Mix everything with salt, pepper powder, and nutmeg.
5. Season the hen's breast well with salt, pepper powder, and cognac.
6. Place on the skin the mixture, the breast, and on top the rest of the meat.
7. Close and sew or tie it, giving it the shape of a small piece.
8. Place in cloth with water, salt, a sprig of thyme and one of bay leaf for two hours.
9. If the hen is tender, dry and press it.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Paté de Hígado (Liver Pâté)
body:
## Ingredients

- one pound of beef liver
- one half pound of pork liver
- three cooked egg yolks
- one cup of milk
- two ounces of butter
- pepper powder
- chopped onion
- salt
- a little Worcestershire sauce

## Directions

1. Grind one pound of beef liver and one half pound of pork liver
2. Add three cooked egg yolks, one cup of milk and two ounces of butter, sufficient pepper powder, finely chopped onion, salt and a little Worcestershire sauce
3. Place in a dish in a water bath
4. This is good for making sandwiches
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pavo Trufado (Truffled Turkey)
body:
## Ingredients

- turkey, boned
- vinegar
- dry wine
- salt
- nutmeg
- cinnamon
- 3 and a half pounds of pork loin, ground
- powdered pepper
- powdered toasted bay leaf
- 4 ounces of fresh ham
- chopped truffles
- a pinch of saltpeter
- a little ginger water
- olives
- capers
- onion stems
- bay leaf
- thyme
- parsley
- mint
- leek

## Directions

1. After boning the turkey, bathe it with vinegar and add dry wine, salt, nutmeg, and cinnamon, all ground
2. For the filling: grind 3 and a half pounds of pork loin and add vinegar, salt, sufficient powdered pepper, powdered toasted bay leaf, 4 ounces of fresh ham, chopped truffles, a pinch of saltpeter, and a little ginger water
3. Leave in brine the day before; the next day fill the turkey and add olives and capers
4. Cook in sufficient water with onion stems, bay leaf, thyme, parsley, mint, and leek, and wrap in cloth
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pescado a la Catalana (Fish Catalan Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- fish
- flour
- lard
- oil
- three large onion heads, sliced thin
- one small bunch of parsley, finely chopped
- two large tomatoes, peeled and finely chopped
- three roasted and ground tomatoes
- one can of peppers, finely chopped
- one tablespoon of capers
- one dried chile, seeded (optional for heat)
- a little water
- pepper powder
- one teaspoon of vinegar
- salt to taste
- olives
- one pepper, sliced lengthwise

## Directions

1. After the fish is well cleaned, coat it in flour and fry it in sufficient hot lard.
2. If the fish is very large, cut it into pieces.
3. When well fried, remove it.
4. In a pan with sufficient oil, fry three large onion heads sliced very thin, one small bunch of finely chopped parsley, two large peeled and finely chopped tomatoes, three roasted and ground tomatoes, one can of finely chopped peppers, and one tablespoon of capers.
5. If desired for spice, grind one seeded dried chile and add it.
6. Fry everything well in oil.
7. Add a little water, making sure it is neither too thin nor too thick.
8. Add a little pepper powder, one teaspoon of vinegar and salt to taste.
9. Place the fish on a platter and coat well with this sauce.
10. Serve hot; it can be simmered for a few minutes in a baking dish or if desired, also placed in the oven.
11. When placing on the platter, be careful not to break it.
12. Pour the sauce over it and garnish with olives, capers and one pepper sliced lengthwise.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pescado a la Cordobesa (Fish Cordobese Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- fish
- salt
- butter
- oil
- onion
- tomato
- garlic
- parsley
- pimientos morrones (red peppers)
- pepper powder
- potato

## Directions

1. After cleaning the fish well, season with salt.
2. Place on paper well spread with melted butter.
3. Fry in hot oil until golden.
4. Remove the fish.
5. In the same oil fry parboiled onion heads, peeled tomato, chopped garlic and parsley.
6. When half fried, add a jar of chopped red peppers and pepper powder, well seasoned with salt.
7. Cover the fish with this mixture.
8. When serving, sliced cooked potato can be added.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pescado a la Francesa (Fish French Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- fish
- salt
- flour
- pepper powder
- cinnamon
- lard
- vinegar
- bay leaves
- olive oil

## Directions

1. After cleaning the fish well, season with salt.
2. Coat in flour mixed with pepper powder and cinnamon.
3. Fry in very hot lard until golden.
4. Remove the fish and place on a platter.
5. Bathe with one cup of vinegar heated with two bay leaves.
6. Add pepper powder and half a cup of fine olive oil with salt.
7. Cover and let rest until the following day.
8. Serve with very thin onion slices and peeled lemon slices.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pescado a la Ligera (Light Fish)
body:
## Ingredients

- fish
- oil
- tomato
- onion
- parsley
- oregano powder
- thyme powder
- bread
- Castilian pepper
- sherry
- vinegar
- olives
- capers

## Directions

1. After cleaning the fish well, fry in oil.
2. Remove the fish.
3. In the same oil fry peeled tomato, onion and chopped parsley, oregano powder and thyme powder with a piece of fried bread ground fine, and some Castilian peppers.
4. Dissolve in a small glass of sherry and one of vinegar.
5. Add to the frying mixture.
6. Add olives and capers.
7. Bathe the fish with this sauce.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pescado a la Marinera (Fish Sailor Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- butter
- onion
- parsley, chopped
- fish, clean
- salt
- pepper powder
- one cup clear broth

## Directions

1. Coat a cazuela (cooking pot) with butter, onion, and chopped parsley.
2. Place on the fire and when everything takes on color, add the clean fish with salt and a little pepper powder.
3. Add one cup of very clear broth.
4. Let it boil over two fires (double boiler) without the fish falling apart.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pescado a la Provenzal (Fish Provençal)
body:
## Ingredients

- fish
- oil
- carrot
- onion
- garlic
- parsley
- thyme
- salt
- white wine

## Directions

1. After cleaning the fish well, place in a dish with one tablespoon of oil.
2. Add slices of peeled carrot, onions, chopped garlic and parsley and a sprig of thyme.
3. Season with salt and one glass of white wine.
4. When serving, remove the thyme.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pescado a la Tirolesa (Fish Tyrolean Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- fish
- salt
- oil
- garlic
- onion
- tomato
- Castilian pepper
- French mustard

## Directions

1. After cleaning the fish well, fry whole or in pieces with salt.
2. Remove without allowing it to brown.
3. In the same oil fry finely chopped garlic and onions.
4. Grind three or four roasted tomatoes with one garlic clove, some Castilian peppers and one small teaspoon of French mustard.
5. Add the fish to this mixture for a very light boil.
6. Serve hot.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pescado a la Valenciana (Fish Valencian Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- butter
- tomato, peeled
- parsley
- garlic
- onion
- green chile
- olives
- capers
- clove powder
- cinnamon
- pepper
- salt
- fish, clean
- bread powder
- one cup water

## Directions

1. Coat a dish well with butter.
2. Add peeled tomato, parsley, garlic, onion, green chile, olives, and capers, all chopped.
3. Mix in clove powder, cinnamon, and pepper in small quantity, well mixed with salt.
4. Place the clean fish on top of all this.
5. Cover with the same sauce, a little bread powder, and one cup of water.
6. Place in the oven or over two fires.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pescado a la Veneciana (Fish Venetian Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- fish, clean
- salt
- white bread powder
- onion, chopped
- parsley, chopped
- pepper powder
- clove
- thyme powder
- butter
- white paper
- half cup vinegar
- half cup oil

## Directions

1. After cleaning, cut the fish into pieces.
2. Add salt and coat with white bread powder.
3. Chop plenty of onion and parsley and add pepper powder, clove, and thyme powder.
4. Place a cazuela with white paper well coated with butter.
5. Alternately layer fish and the chopped mixture, ensuring the last layer is fish.
6. Finally, add half a cup of vinegar and half a cup of oil.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pescado con Alcaparras (Fish with Capers)
body:
## Ingredients

- onion
- oil
- chile de pasa (dried chile)
- lard
- oregano
- capers
- water
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Fry onions cut into quarters in oil.
2. When fried, grind a seeded and soaked dried chile and two dried chiles toasted in lard with a little oregano and ten or twelve capers.
3. Dissolve with a little water and one tablespoon of vinegar.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pescado con Almendras (Fish with Almonds)
body:
## Ingredients

- fish
- water
- salt
- almonds
- pepitoria (pumpkin seeds)
- Castilian pepper
- cloves
- cinnamon
- bread
- lard
- oil

## Directions

1. Cook the fish in little water, in pieces or whole, with salt, taking care it does not break apart.
2. Toast one ounce of almonds and a little pumpkin seeds.
3. Grind everything with Castilian peppers, three cloves, a small piece of cinnamon and a small piece of fried bread in lard.
4. Dissolve everything in a little of the water in which the fish was cooked, seasoned with salt.
5. Add the fish and fry in one tablespoon of oil with a light boil.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pescado con Tomate (Fish with Tomato)
body:
## Ingredients

- garlic cloves, crushed
- oil
- tomato, peeled and chopped
- french bread, fried and ground
- fish, clean
- one tablespoon vinegar
- pepper powder
- oregano powder
- cooked green chile

## Directions

1. Crush some garlic cloves and fry in oil with peeled chopped tomato and a piece of fried and ground french bread.
2. Add the clean fish with one tablespoon of vinegar, pepper powder, oregano powder, and a cooked green chile.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pescado en Escabeche (Fish in Escabeche)
body:
## Ingredients

- fish
- water
- sour orange juice
- salt
- flour
- lard
- vinegar
- oil
- pepper powder
- oregano powder
- thyme powder
- onion
- garlic

## Directions

1. Clean the fish well and cut into pieces.
2. Parboil with a little water and sour orange juice with salt.
3. Remove and dry with cloth.
4. Coat in flour and fry in hot lard.
5. Once fried, remove and place in a dish keeping pieces separate.
6. Bathe with one cup of vinegar mixed to taste with oil, salt, pepper powder, oregano powder, and thyme powder, chopped onion and garlic.
7. Place over heat for a very light boil.
8. Cover and let rest until the following day.
9. Add a small glass of vinegar and oil and give it another light boil.
10. Serve with onion slices.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pescado en Mantequilla (Fish in Butter)
body:
## Ingredients

- butter
- chopped onion
- fish, clean, whole or cut
- salt
- pepper powder
- chopped parsley
- one cup water
- a little vinegar
- a little white bread powder

## Directions

1. In a cazuela or fish pan, place butter and chopped onion.
2. Add the clean fish, whether whole or cut.
3. Cover with more butter, chopped onion, salt, pepper powder, and chopped parsley.
4. Add one cup of water with a little vinegar and a little white bread powder.
5. Let it cook over two fires.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pescado en Salsa de Alcaparras (Fish in Caper Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- oil
- six roasted and ground tomatoes
- one garlic clove
- pepper powder
- parsley
- capers, chopped
- cooked and chopped onions
- salt
- one tablespoon flour, fried in butter
- water
- fish, clean
- one teaspoon vinegar

## Directions

1. Fry six roasted and ground tomatoes in oil with one garlic clove.
2. Add pepper powder, parsley, chopped capers, cooked and chopped onions, salt, and one tablespoon of flour fried in butter.
3. Add a little water.
4. Place the clean fish in this and let it boil for half an hour.
5. When serving, add one teaspoon of vinegar.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pescado en Salsa de Almendra (Fish in Almond Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- four to six garlic cloves
- oil
- parsley
- green chile
- one ounce peeled and toasted almond
- french bread, golden in butter
- water
- pepper powder
- clove
- cinnamon
- fish, clean
- chopped olives
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Brown four to six garlic cloves in oil.
2. Chop parsley and a green chile and fry with the garlic.
3. Grind one ounce of peeled and toasted almond with a piece of french bread golden in butter.
4. Dissolve with a little water and add to the frying mixture with a little pepper powder, clove, and cinnamon in small quantity.
5. Place the very clean fish on top with some chopped olives and a little vinegar.
6. Let it boil over two fires.
7. When serving, remove the garlic cloves.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pescado en Salsa de Chile (Fish in Chile Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- fish
- salt
- flour
- oil
- chile de pasa (dried chile)
- onion
- water
- vinegar

## Directions

1. After cleaning the fish well, season with salt.
2. Coat in flour and fry in oil.
3. When fried, remove the fish.
4. In the same lard, fry two seeded and soaked dried chiles, ground with a large onion head.
5. Dissolve this mixture in a little water and one tablespoon of vinegar.
6. Bathe the fish with this sauce.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pescado en Salsa de Pickles (Fish in Pickle Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- fish
- bread powder
- lard
- oil
- tomato
- onion
- garlic
- pickles in mustard
- fried bread
- vinegar
- water

## Directions

1. Clean the fish well and coat in bread powder.
2. Wrap in paper well spread with lard and fry in very hot oil.
3. When golden, remove the paper and place the fish on a platter.
4. In the same oil, fry peeled tomato, onion and finely chopped garlic.
5. Chop some pickles in mustard, adding a little of the same sauce with a piece of fried bread, ground and dissolved in a little vinegar and water.
6. Cover the fish with this mixture.
7. Serve hot or cold.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pescado Fresco con Salsa Cocida (Fresh Fish with Cooked Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- water
- salt
- two tomatoes, peeled and halved
- two onions, peeled and quartered
- green chile or one dried chile, seeded
- sliced peeled potatoes
- fresh fish, whole or cut as desired

## Directions

1. Place a little salted water in a dish
2. Add the two peeled and halved tomatoes, two peeled onions quartered, green chile or dried chile without seeds, and sliced peeled potatoes
3. When half cooked, add the fresh fish whole or cut as desired, being careful it does not fall apart
4. After a quarter hour of boiling, mash the tomato and onion
5. Serve with its hot broth, noting that if dried chile is used, remove it at the first boils to prevent it from falling apart
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pescado Fresco con Salsa Cocida (Fresh Fish with Cooked Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- water
- salt
- tomato
- onion

## Directions

1. Place in a dish a little water with salt, two peeled and halved tomatoes, two peeled and halved onions.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pescado Frito (Fried Fish)
body:
## Ingredients

- fish, well washed
- salt
- flour
- oil or lard
- crushed garlic cloves
- one cup vinegar
- one cup oil
- green chile
- chopped onion
- hard-boiled egg pieces
- pepper powder
- oregano powder
- chopped lettuce

## Directions

1. After washing the fish well, cut into pieces of desired size.
2. Add salt and coat with flour.
3. Fry crushed garlic cloves in hot oil or lard.
4. When well browned, place the fish on a platter.
5. Bathe with a sauce made of one cup of vinegar, one cup of oil, a green chile, and finely chopped onion with hard-boiled egg pieces.
6. Scald the onion with boiling water.
7. Add pepper and oregano powder, and chopped lettuce around the edge.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pescado Frito (Fried Fish)
body:
## Ingredients

- fish
- salt
- flour
- oil or lard
- garlic
- vinegar
- chile verde (green chile)
- onion
- hard-boiled egg
- pepper powder
- oregano powder
- lettuce

## Directions

1. After washing the fish well, cut it into pieces of desired size.
2. Season with salt and coat in flour.
3. Fry crushed garlic in hot oil or lard.
4. When the fish is well browned, place it on a platter.
5. Bathe the fish with a sauce made of one cup of vinegar, another of oil, a green chile and finely chopped onion and pieces of hard-boiled egg.
6. Wash the onion with boiling water.
7. Add pepper powder and oregano powder.
8. Arrange chopped lettuce around the fish.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pescado París (Paris Fish)
body:
## Ingredients

- fish
- vinegar
- salt
- oregano
- pepper powder
- bay leaves
- egg
- oil

## Directions

1. Slice the cleaned fish and place in a serving dish with vinegar, salt, oregano, pepper powder, and bay leaves.
2. The next day, remove the fish and coat in beaten egg (white and yolk).
3. Fry in hot oil.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pescado Relleno (Stuffed Fish)
body:
## Ingredients

- green chile
- tomato, peeled
- parsley, chopped
- four to six egg yolks, well cooked
- clove
- pepper
- capers
- olives
- cooked vegetables: chayote, potatoes, carrots, green beans, peas, and fava beans
- one teaspoon vinegar
- oil
- fish

## Directions

1. Fry a green chile, peeled tomato, and chopped parsley.
2. Dissolve four to six well-cooked egg yolks with clove and pepper, capers, olives, cooked and chopped vegetables such as chayote, potatoes, carrots, green beans, tender peas, and fava beans.
3. Mix everything well with one teaspoon of vinegar.
4. Fill the fish with this mixture.
5. Place on an oiled paper on a baking sheet in the oven to brown.
6. Serve with salad or sauce of choice.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pescado Saboyano (Savoyard Fish)
body:
## Ingredients

- fish, clean
- oil
- salt
- fine white bread powder
- melted butter
- paper
- garlic
- onion
- parsley
- tomato, peeled and chopped
- one teaspoon vinegar
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. After cleaning the fish well, dry it thoroughly so no water remains.
2. Place a frying pan with oil.
3. Rub the fish with salt and coat with fine white bread powder.
4. Wrap in paper well coated with melted butter and place in hot oil.
5. When golden, remove it.
6. In the same oil, fry garlic, onion, parsley, peeled chopped tomato, and one teaspoon of vinegar, or if preferred, just a little lemon juice.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pescado Supremo (Supreme Fish)
body:
## Ingredients

- fish
- salt
- lemon juice
- egg
- oil
- dried mulato chile or pasilla chile
- vinegar
- parsley
- celery
- hierbabuena (spearmint)
- cilantro
- onions
- garlic

## Directions

1. Slice the fish after cleaning it well.
2. Season with salt and lemon juice and let sit ten minutes.
3. Pass through water and then through beaten egg with salt.
4. Fry in oil.
5. Place the fried slices on a serving platter.
6. Toast dried mulato or pasilla chile, grind it, and dissolve in one cup of vinegar, one of oil, and a little water.
7. Chop parsley, celery, spearmint, cilantro, onions, and garlic.
8. Cover the fish with this mixture and place over low heat.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pescados en Salsa (Fish in Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- water
- salt
- two onion heads
- fish, clean and scaled
- four to six roasted tomatoes
- oil
- onion heads, chopped
- oregano powder
- one teaspoon vinegar
- olives
- onions in vinegar

## Directions

1. Place water, salt, and two onion heads in a dish.
2. Put the very clean and scaled fish in this.
3. When the fish is cooked without falling apart, grind four to six roasted tomatoes.
4. Fry chopped onion heads in oil.
5. Add the tomato with oregano powder, one teaspoon of vinegar, and salt.
6. Place a layer of this sauce on the platter.
7. Place the fish on top and cover with another layer of sauce.
8. Garnish with olives and onions in vinegar.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pichones (Squabs)
body:
## Ingredients

- Young, tender squabs, plucked and cleaned
- Butter
- 1 sprig of parsley
- 2 cloves of garlic
- Salt
- 1 sprig of thyme
- 1 tablespoon of bread powder

## Directions

1. Place the plucked and cleaned squabs in a dish with butter, a sprig of parsley, two cloves of garlic, salt, a sprig of thyme and a tablespoon of bread powder
2. Cover with water
3. Let them boil for ten minutes
4. To serve, remove all the vegetables
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pichones al Horno (Squabs Roasted in the Oven)
body:
## Ingredients

- Cleaned squabs
- Salt
- Powder of oregano
- 1 glass of white wine
- Onion, chopped
- 2 bay leaves
- 1 sprig of thyme
- Parmesan cheese powder

## Directions

1. After the squabs are well cleaned, rub them inside and out with salt and powder of oregano
2. Place them in a dish with a glass of white wine, chopped onion, 2 bay leaves and a sprig of thyme
3. Put in a hot oven, basting them every five minutes
4. After one hour, cover the squabs with plenty of Parmesan cheese powder until they are golden
5. Serve as desired
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pichones Compuestos (Stuffed Squabs Prepared)
body:
## Ingredients

- Squabs
- Lard or butter
- Garlic
- Onion
- Parsley, chopped
- Broth in which the squabs have been cooked
- 1 tablespoon of well-fried flour
- Powder of pepper
- Clove
- 1 glass of white wine
- A little vinegar
- 6 to 8 blanched and chopped almonds
- Capers

## Directions

1. Fry garlic, onion, and chopped parsley in lard or butter
2. Add a little of the broth in which the squabs have been cooked, a tablespoon of well-fried flour, a little powder of pepper and clove, a glass of white wine, a little vinegar, 6 to 8 blanched and chopped almonds and some capers
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pichones con Almendras (Squabs with Almonds)
body:
## Ingredients

- Raw squabs
- Salt
- Lard or butter
- 1 glass of white wine
- Clove
- Pepper
- Cinnamon
- 4 to 6 cloves of garlic
- 2 ounces of ground and blanched almonds

## Directions

1. Fry the raw squabs with salt in lard or butter
2. When they are fried, add a glass of white wine, clove, pepper and cinnamon
3. Let them boil for half an hour if they are tender, or longer if not
4. In a separate pan with a little lard, fry 4 to 6 cloves of garlic until golden and remove them
5. Add to the butter about 2 ounces of ground and blanched almonds
6. Place the squabs in this sauce to serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pichones en Vino (Squabs in Wine)
body:
## Ingredients

- Cleaned squabs
- 1 glass of red wine (for five squabs)
- A piece of cinnamon
- A few cloves
- Castilian pepper
- 2 bay leaves
- 1 sprig of thyme
- Salt
- 1 tablespoon of butter per squab
- Water
- Bread, fried in butter

## Directions

1. Place the cleaned squabs in a dish according to the quantity
2. For five squabs, add a glass of red wine, a piece of cinnamon, a few cloves, Castilian pepper (whole if preferred, but powder is preferable), 2 bay leaves, a sprig of thyme, salt and a tablespoon of butter per squab
3. Cover with water
4. After they are well cooked, remove them and carefully remove all the bones
5. Place each squab on a piece of paper spread with butter in a warm oven
6. To serve, place each on a slice of bread well fried in butter
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pichones Guisados (Stewed Squabs)
body:
## Ingredients

- squabs
- hot lard
- two garlic cloves
- two peeled and chopped tomatoes
- a little chopped parsley
- saffron
- salt
- pepper powder
- one spoonful of toasted flour

## Directions

1. Fry well-cleaned squabs in a pan with hot lard
2. When they take color, remove them
3. In the same fat, fry two garlic cloves, two peeled and chopped tomatoes, and a little chopped parsley
4. Place the squabs in a pot and pour this sauce over them
5. Cover with a little saffron, salt, pepper powder, and one spoonful of toasted flour
6. Let simmer on very gentle heat
7. If the squabs are tender, one hour of cooking is sufficient; if not, cook longer
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pichones o Palomas Rellenas (Stuffed Squabs or Pigeons)
body:
## Ingredients

- Squabs
- Hot water
- Almonds, blanched and chopped
- Tomato
- Onion, chopped
- 1 tablespoon of vinegar
- 1 tablespoon of dry sherry
- Capers
- Olives, chopped
- 1 teaspoon of white bread powder ground with cinnamon, pepper and clove
- Butter
- Salt
- String
- 1 glass of vinegar
- 1 glass of sherry
- 1 to 2 tablespoons of butter
- Bay leaves
- 1 sprig of thyme

## Directions

1. Scald the squabs with hot water; if they are very tender, simply pluck them without wetting them
2. Bone them by opening them along the backbone, removing the meat carefully so as not to tear it
3. Cut off the wings leaving the legs, removing the center bone with great care
4. Chop all the giblets of the squab with blanched and chopped almonds
5. Partially fry this with tomato and chopped onion
6. Add a tablespoon of vinegar, a tablespoon of dry sherry, capers and chopped olives, a teaspoon of white bread powder ground with cinnamon, pepper and clove
7. Stuff the squabs with this mixture after having rubbed them inside and out with butter and salt
8. Sew them with string not too thick
9. Place them in a dish with a glass of vinegar, a glass of sherry, 1 or 2 tablespoons of butter, chopped onion, bay leaves and a sprig of thyme
10. Increase the preparation according to the quantity of squabs
11. These squabs are properly for banquets to avoid the bad appearance presented by squabs with bones
12. Alternatively, prepare a filling with very finely chopped vegetables, parboiled with salt, fry peeled and chopped tomato with onion and a clove of garlic, add the vegetables with pieces of ham and sausage cut lengthwise, add bread powder with spices as before, cook and serve the same as the others
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pierna a la Africana (African Leg of Pork)
body:
## Ingredients

- leg of pork
- vinegar
- salt
- ground tomatillos
- ground onion
- water

## Directions

1. Prepare the leg the same way as the previous recipe
2. Grind plenty of tomatillos and onion
3. Leave the leg in this infusion for three days
4. Then put it to cook, adding water in small quantity as needed
5. Take care to turn it frequently until it is cooked
6. Serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pierna a la Casera (Lamb Leg, Homestyle)
body:
## Ingredients

- lamb leg
- ham
- salt
- pepper
- onions
- raw potatoes
- thyme branch
- bay leaves
- tomatoes
- clove
- parsley bundle
- garlic head
- water

## Directions

1. Pound the leg and insert ham larding throughout with long strips that go from side to side
2. Place in a baking dish with salt, 3 or 4 onions, slices of raw potatoes, a branch of thyme, 3 bay leaves, 4 tomatoes cut in half, clove, pepper, a bundle of parsley, and a head of peeled garlic
3. Cover with water and simmer for three hours on low heat, turning it frequently so it cooks evenly
4. When cooked, place in the serving platter and strain the sauce well through a filter over it
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pierna a la Chilena (Chilean Leg of Pork)
body:
## Ingredients

- leg of pork
- vinegar
- salt
- beer, one liter
- tomatoes, raw and ground

## Directions

1. Take a leg of pork and rub with vinegar and salt
2. Let sit overnight
3. The next day, add one liter of beer and bring to a boil
4. When it has boiled sufficiently, add ground raw tomatoes
5. Serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pierna a la Jardinera (Pork Leg with Vegetables)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pork leg
- 3 chile pods without seeds
- 3 roasted tomatoes
- 1 garlic clove
- salt
- all kinds of cooked and minced vegetables
- butter
- salt
- vinegar
- minced onion
- 2 bay leaves

## Directions

1. Cut or lift a layer from where the leg has the most meat; if possible, 2 or 3 layers
2. Grind 3 chile pods without seeds with 3 roasted tomatoes and 1 garlic clove
3. Season with salt and coat the first layer with this sauce on both sides
4. Have all kinds of cooked and minced vegetables ready and fill with this
5. Coat the second layer with the sauce and add more vegetables
6. Continue in this manner until finished
7. Sew together with thick thread
8. Rub very well with butter, salt and vinegar
9. Add minced onion and 2 bay leaves
10. Place everything in a well-covered pan and leave overnight
11. The next day, put it in the oven for two hours
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pierna a la Ligera (Light Leg of Lamb)
body:
## Ingredients

- leg of lamb
- salt
- half an ounce of saltpeter
- 1 bottle of vinegar
- cloves
- pepper
- bay leaf
- basil
- thyme
- onion
- garlic
- leeks
- orange leaves
- bitter orange juice
- sweet orange juice
- water or red wine and sherry
- egg
- flour

## Directions

1. Beat the leg well with salt and half an ounce of saltpeter
2. Place in a dish with vinegar, cloves, pepper, bay leaf, basil, thyme, onion, crushed garlic, leeks, orange leaves, bitter and sweet orange juice
3. Cover with water or red wine and sherry
4. On the second day, place over heat for three hours
5. When done, coat with beaten egg mixed with flour and place in the oven to brown
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pierna de Marrano al Horno (Roasted Pork Leg)
body:
## Ingredients

- parsley, ground
- onion stems
- powdered pepper
- salt
- 1 glass of vinegar

## Directions

1. Grind plenty of parsley and onion stems with powdered pepper
2. Leave the pork leg in this brine for a day and a night
3. The next day, place in the oven with 1 glass of vinegar
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pierna de Marrano en Leche (Pork Leg in Milk)
body:
## Ingredients

- a little butter
- one sprig of parsley
- one pork leg
- salt to taste
- one to one and a half liters of milk

## Directions

1. Put a little butter and one sprig of parsley in a pan over low heat.
2. Place the pork leg in it to brown, with salt to taste.
3. As soon as it is well browned, add one to one and a half liters of milk in the same pan.
4. Cook over low heat, basting with the same juices.
5. When cooked, remove from heat.
6. Serve hot or cold, with each slice accompanied by a spoonful of the juices in which the leg was cooked.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pierna de Marrano Fría (Cold Pork Leg)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 boned pork leg
- 1 pound salt
- 1/2 ounce saltpeter
- pepper powder
- cloves
- bay leaves
- thyme
- oregano
- 1 bottle red wine
- 1 tablespoon salt
- water

## Directions

1. Bone the leg and rub it with 1 pound of salt and 1/2 ounce of saltpeter until incorporated
2. Press it for one night
3. The next day place it in a wide pan and sprinkle with pepper powder, cloves, bay leaves, thyme and oregano, all in powder form
4. Keep it this way for three days, turning it daily
5. On the fourth day, cook it in a pan with 1 bottle of red wine and 1 more tablespoon of salt, covered with water
6. Let it boil for three hours, turning it over
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pierna de Marrano Guisada (Braised Pork Leg)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pork leg
- parsley
- pepper powder
- cloves
- butter or lard
- tomato slices, peeled
- garlic
- 3 bay leaves
- thyme
- 1 glass water
- salt
- 1 glass dry sherry

## Directions

1. Lard the leg with parsley, pepper powder and cloves
2. Place in a pan greased with butter or lard; the leg may be whole or in slices
3. Add peeled tomato slices, garlic, 3 bay leaves, thyme and 1 glass of water with salt
4. When more than cooked through, add 1 glass of dry sherry and place in the oven or over two fires
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pierna de Marrano Mechada (Stuffed Pork Leg)
body:
## Ingredients

- plenty of peeled garlic, minced
- chorizo
- parsley
- tomato
- spearmint
- 1 green chile
- pepper powder
- salt
- oregano powder
- 2 onion heads
- 2 bay leaves
- breadcrumb powder
- a small amount of dried cheese powder
- 1 cup vinegar

## Directions

1. Mince plenty of peeled garlic, chorizo, parsley, tomato, spearmint and 1 green chile
2. Season with sufficient pepper powder, salt and plenty of oregano powder
3. Lard the leg with this mixture after rubbing it on all sides
4. Place it in a pan with 2 onion heads, 2 bay leaves, pepper powder, breadcrumb powder, a small amount of dried cheese powder and 1 cup of vinegar
5. Put it in the oven for two hours, basting it with its juices frequently so it does not dry out
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pierna de Marrano Rellena (Stuffed Pork Leg)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pork leg
- mustard from pickles
- pickled vegetables
- pimientos morrones (roasted red peppers)
- ham, parboiled and sliced
- chorizo slices
- salami slices
- tender peas, cooked
- mixed cooked vegetables
- salt
- 1 ounce butter
- pepper powder
- oregano powder
- 2 onion heads
- 2 garlic cloves
- 1 cup vinegar
- 1 cup dry sherry

## Directions

1. Cut the leg where it is thickest and make 2 or 3 layers without breaking them
2. Coat each layer with mustard from pickles
3. Slice the pickled vegetables and pimientos morrones lengthwise
4. Place a layer of these with slices of parboiled ham
5. Cover the next layer with the same mustard
6. Add a layer of chorizo slices, salami slices and cooked tender peas
7. Cover the last layer with mustard, pickles lengthwise and all kinds of cooked vegetables
8. Sew each layer together with thick thread
9. Place in a pan, rub well with salt, coat with 1 ounce of butter, pepper powder, plenty of oregano powder, 2 onion heads, 2 garlic cloves, 1 cup of vinegar and 1 cup of dry sherry
10. Put it in the oven for two hours, basting it with its juices constantly
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pierna Guisada (Braised Leg of Mutton)
body:
## Ingredients

- leg of mutton
- ham strips
- salt
- pepper
- vinegar
- parsley
- bay leaves
- clove
- thyme
- leeks
- spearmint
- onion
- water
- rose-colored aspic

## Directions

1. Lard the leg with ham strips, salt and pepper
2. Place in a dish with vinegar, pepper, parsley, bay leaves, clove, thyme, leeks, spearmint and onion pieces
3. Leave in this brine, turning it every day, for four days
4. After four days, cook covered with water
5. Once cooked, remove and let cool
6. The next day, cover with an aspic that has a rose color
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pierna Mechada (Larded Leg of Venison)
body:
## Ingredients

- venison leg
- chopped parsley
- clove powder
- ham
- chopped garlic
- lard or butter
- onion
- butter

## Directions

1. Lard the leg with chopped parsley, clove powder, ham, and chopped garlic
2. Place in a pan coated with lard or butter with onion
3. Cover and let brown very slowly, basting with butter
