source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pierna Mechada (Stuffed Leg of Mutton)
body:
## Ingredients

- leg of mutton
- spearmint
- garlic cloves
- green chile
- oregano powder
- pepper powder
- parsley
- salt
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Chop together plenty of spearmint, two garlic cloves and green chile
2. Mix with oregano powder, pepper powder, chopped parsley and salt
3. Lard the leg on all sides with this mixture
4. Rub with salt and vinegar
5. Place in the oven for three hours
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pierna Mechada al Horno (Oven-Roasted Stuffed Leg)
body:
## Ingredients

- parsley
- spearmint
- 1 green chile
- pepper powder
- oregano powder
- salt
- 1 cup vinegar
- 1 cup red wine
- butter
- breadcrumb powder
- pepper
- cloves
- cinnamon

## Directions

1. Mince parsley, spearmint and 1 green chile
2. Season with pepper powder, plenty of oregano powder and salt
3. Lard the leg on all sides with this mixture and rub with plenty of salt
4. Coat with 1 cup of vinegar and 1 cup of red wine
5. Coat generously with butter and sprinkle with breadcrumb powder, pepper, cloves and cinnamon
6. Put in the oven for two hours
7. Serve with salad
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pios (Sponge Dessert)
body:
## Ingredients

- Twelve egg whites
- Twelve egg yolks
- Six ounces of ground and dry sugar
- One pound of sifted flour
- Butter for greasing
- Crema de Leche (milk cream filling)

## Directions

1. Beat twelve egg whites and yolks with six ounces of ground and dry sugar
2. When well beaten, fold in one pound of sifted flour
3. Pour into a greased small dish, leaving some space
4. Bake in the oven
5. As soon as it is cooked, flip it over
6. Cut into three-finger height pieces
7. Cover on top with milk cream filling
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Plumcake
body:
## Ingredients

- Seven and a half ounces of flour
- Six ounces of sifted sugar
- Four ounces of currants
- Six ounces of pitted and seedless raisins
- Four ounces of melted butter
- Four ounces of candied peel like fig, orange, chilacayote
- One teaspoon of gum arabic powder
- Four egg whites
- Four egg yolks
- A pinch of salt

## Directions

1. Mix the flour, sifted sugar, currants, raisins, melted butter, candied peel, and gum arabic powder
2. Beat the four egg whites
3. Mix the egg yolks with a pinch of salt and combine with the dry ingredients
4. Mix everything together
5. Pour into a greased mold
6. Place in the oven to bake
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Plátanos en Gloria (Plantains in Glory)
body:
## Ingredients

- Plantains
- Lard
- Hot water
- White panela or four ounces of sugar
- Cinnamon strips
- White honey

## Directions

1. Fry the plantains as before, wash them one or two times with hot water to remove the fat
2. Place in a dish and cover with hot water, add a piece of crushed white panela, cinnamon strips, or if not four ounces of sugar instead of the panela
3. When it begins to set, add a small glass of white honey and let it caramelize
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Plátanos en Mantequilla (Bananas in Butter)
body:
## Ingredients

- bananas
- one half ounce of butter per banana
- one ounce of sugar per banana
- one tablespoon of vanilla

## Directions

1. Place the bananas in a dish
2. Open them in the middle without splitting them completely
3. Put to each banana one half ounce of butter and one of sugar and one tablespoon of vanilla
4. If there is an oven place them in the oven, if not in gentle heat
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Plátanos en Mole (Plantains in Mole)
body:
## Ingredients

- Plantains
- Lard
- Half ounce of pepitoria
- Half ounce of sesame
- One guaque or dried chile
- Three sweet breads
- Two ripe tomatoes
- Five cloves
- Castilian peppers
- Cinnamon
- Achiote
- Water
- Salt
- Sugar

## Directions

1. Fry the plantains cut in pieces in lard
2. Toast half ounce of pepitoria, half ounce of sesame, one guaque or dried chile, three sweet breads and two ripe tomatoes
3. Grind with about five cloves, some Castilian peppers, a piece of cinnamon and a piece of achiote
4. Mix well ground with water, fry in one tablespoon of lard, place the plantains in this without boiling too much so they don't look bad, adding salt and sugar to taste
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pollo con Nabo Blanco (Chicken with White Turnip)
body:
## Ingredients

- one spoonful of lard or butter
- one garlic clove
- two onions, chopped
- two ground tomatoes
- one spoonful of flour fried in butter
- chicken broth
- two white turnip roots, cooked and diced
- cooked chicken

## Directions

1. Brown one garlic clove and two chopped onions in one spoonful of lard or butter
2. When it takes color, add two ground tomatoes and one spoonful of flour fried in butter
3. Dissolve this in a little broth in which the chicken was cooked
4. Add two cooked white turnip roots chopped into cubes
5. Place the cooked chicken, whole or cut as desired
6. Serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pollos a la Bordelesa (Chickens Bordeaux Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- chicken livers
- ham
- parsley
- onion
- pepper powder
- butter
- salt
- thick thread
- oil

## Directions

1. Chop the chicken livers with ham, parsley and onion
2. Add pepper powder
3. Remove all bones from the chickens
4. Rub with butter and salt
5. Stuff with the previous mixture adding four ounces of ham cut lengthwise
6. Sew with thick thread
7. Rub with a spoonful of oil
8. Place in a dish in the oven or wrap in paper spread with butter, and place on a rotisserie over very low heat
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pollos a la Francesa (Chicken French Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- chickens
- flour
- butter or oil
- salt
- 4 or 5 roasted tomatoes
- 3 cloves of garlic
- raw onion
- 1 glass of Muscatel wine

## Directions

1. Clean the chickens and cut them into quarters
2. Soak for a quarter hour and dry very well
3. Roll in flour and fry in butter or oil with salt
4. Roast 4 or 5 tomatoes and 3 cloves of garlic, chop raw onion
5. Fry everything in the fat in which the chickens were fried with 1 glass of Muscatel wine
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pollos a la Marengo (Chicken Marengo)
body:
## Ingredients

- chicken
- one glass of white wine
- one glass of oil
- little powder of pepper
- juice of one lemon
- butter or lard
- little chopped parsley
- little fried flour

## Directions

1. After cleaning the chicken, quarter it
2. Place the chicken in an infusion made as follows: in a pot put one glass of white wine, one glass of oil, a little powder of pepper and the juice of one lemon
3. Leave the chicken in the infusion for one night
4. The next day, put a pot with a little butter or lard on the fire
5. When hot, add the chicken with all the broth in which it was kept the night before
6. When half cooked, add a little chopped parsley and a little fried flour
7. Let it boil until cooked and serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pollos a la Marinera (Chickens Mariner Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- chicken
- oil or butter
- white wine
- parsley
- salt
- pepper powder
- butter
- cheese powder

## Directions

1. Clean the chicken well and place in a dish to brown in oil or butter
2. When it takes on color, add a glass of white wine, a sprig of parsley, salt and pepper powder
3. After boiling fifteen minutes, place in a dish in the oven
4. Add butter and cover with cheese powder until it browns
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pollos a la Mexicana (Chickens Mexican Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- chickens
- salt
- French bread
- milk
- liver and gizzard of the chickens cooked
- ham
- cooked brain
- butter
- nutmeg powder
- thyme powder
- tomato slices
- onion slices

## Directions

1. Cook the chickens with salt
2. Soak French bread in milk and chop it with the cooked liver and gizzard of the chickens, a piece of ham and a cooked brain, chopping carefully so it does not fall apart
3. Fry all this in a spoonful of butter
4. Add nutmeg powder and thyme powder
5. Use this mixture to stuff the chicken
6. Rub with butter and salt
7. Place in the oven with tomato and onion slices
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pollos a la Tirolesa (Chicken Tyrolean Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- chickens
- oil, lard or butter
- salt
- pepper powder
- 1 glass of sherry
- champagne (if available)
- 1 cup of water
- 3 or 4 ground tomatoes
- 2 or 3 cooked artichoke hearts
- truffles

## Directions

1. Cut chickens into pieces
2. Fry them in oil, lard or butter with salt and pepper powder
3. When they turn golden, add 1 glass of sherry, and another of champagne if available
4. When it has consumed half of the liquid, add 1 cup of water
5. Add 3 or 4 ground tomatoes
6. Add 2 or 3 cooked artichoke hearts and a bit of truffles
7. Let it boil for half an hour
8. Serve as a truly exquisite dish
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pollos a la Valenciana (Chickens Valencian Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- chickens
- oil or butter
- salt
- six to eight heads of onion
- two ounces of raw ham
- two cloves of garlic
- two black chorizos
- bay leaf
- saffron water
- water
- pimentón
- rice
- butter

## Directions

1. Clean the chickens well and fry them in oil or butter with salt
2. Add six to eight chopped heads of onion, two ounces of raw ham, two cloves of garlic and two chopped black chorizos, a bay leaf, a little saffron water and clear water until the chickens are covered
3. When cooked, remove the chickens and add a teaspoon of pimentón to the same broth
4. If there are two chickens, wash a pound of rice and fry it well, then add to the broth in which the chickens were cooked, cover so it comes out fluffy, ensuring the water only covers the rice; if there is more, remove some to prevent the rice from becoming mushy
5. Let boil fifteen minutes
6. Keep the chickens spread with butter in the oven
7. As soon as the rice is ready, place the chicken on the platter with the rice, ham and chorizo around it
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pollos a la Valenciana (Valencian Chickens)
body:
## Ingredients

- chickens
- oil
- two carrots
- flour
- water
- red wine
- bay leaf
- parsley
- garlic
- mint
- mushrooms
- six to eight heads of onion
- bread

## Directions

1. Clean the chickens well and place in a dish with oil to take on color
2. Add two chopped and halved carrots and a spoonful of flour
3. Cover half with water and half with red wine, a bay leaf bundle, a sprig of parsley, a clove of garlic, a sprig of mint and if there are mushrooms, add some raw and chopped, and six to eight heads of onion
4. Let consume
5. When serving, remove all the herbs and at the edge of the platter place very thin slices of fried bread
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pollos con Aceitunas (Chicken with Olives)
body:
## Ingredients

- cooked chickens
- oil, lard or butter
- about 10 olives
- 10 roasted almonds
- broth
- 1 tablespoon of vinegar

## Directions

1. Cut the cooked chickens into quarters
2. Fry them in oil, lard or butter
3. When they turn golden color, add about 10 olives
4. Add 10 roasted almonds ground with a little broth and 1 tablespoon of vinegar
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pollos con Alcaparras (Chicken with Capers)
body:
## Ingredients

- lard
- tomato
- onion
- parsley, chopped
- capers, finely chopped
- a little water
- a little flour
- a little water
- chicken quarters, cooked
- salt to taste

## Directions

1. Heat a pan with lard.
2. Make a fried mixture of tomato, onion in slices, and chopped parsley.
3. When half fried, add the finely chopped capers and a little water.
4. Thicken with a little flour dissolved in a little water.
5. Add the chicken quarters that have been previously cooked.
6. Season with salt to taste and serve hot.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pollos con Ostras (Chicken with Oysters)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 chicken
- salt
- pepper
- oysters
- butter
- 2 egg yolks, cooked
- 1 sprig of thyme
- 1 bay leaf
- 1 teaspoon of starch or 1 teaspoon of flour fried in butter
- water

## Directions

1. Rub the chicken with salt and pepper
2. Stuff it inside and outside with oysters
3. Rub with butter
4. Place in a hermetically sealable vessel
5. Cook in a water bath for two hours
6. Remove and collect the juice it has released
7. Fry in a dish with a little lard
8. Add 3 cooked and chopped egg yolks
9. Add 1 sprig of thyme and 1 bay leaf
10. Add 1 teaspoon of starch or 1 teaspoon of flour fried in butter
11. Add water to make a very thin sauce
12. Let it boil twice
13. Pour this sauce over the chicken and serve
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pollos con Pasas (Chicken with Raisins)
body:
## Ingredients

- chickens
- oil or butter
- 8 ground raisins
- pepper
- 2 cloves
- water
- 2 onion heads, chopped

## Directions

1. Clean and cook the chickens well
2. Fry them in oil or butter
3. When they turn color, add about 8 ground raisins mixed with pepper and about 2 cloves
4. Dissolve with a little water
5. In the chicken fat, fry 2 chopped onion heads
6. Put all the ground mixture in this
7. Add the chicken and let it boil 2 or 3 times
8. Serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pollos con Piña (Chicken with Pineapple)
body:
## Ingredients

- chickens
- onion heads, peeled
- ground pineapple
- sausage
- 1 tablespoon of butter
- water
- 1 small glass of vinegar

## Directions

1. Clean the chickens well
2. Put them in a casserole with peeled onion heads, ground pineapple and sausage
3. Add 1 tablespoon of butter
4. When half fried, add a little water and 1 small glass of vinegar
5. Let it cook until the liquid is consumed
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pollos en Crema (Chicken in Cream)
body:
## Ingredients

- chickens
- butter
- half a liter of cream per chicken (or 1 glass of cream if cooked)
- salt
- pepper

## Directions

1. After cleaning the chickens, brown them in butter just until they color
2. Add half a liter of cream for each chicken with salt and a little pepper
3. Alternatively, they can be made with cooked chickens; for 1 chicken use 1 glass of cream
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pollos en Mantequilla (Chickens in Butter)
body:
## Ingredients

- raw chickens
- butter
- salt
- Parmesan cheese powder

## Directions

1. Clean the raw chickens well
2. Rub them with butter, salt and Parmesan cheese powder
3. Place in a cazuela in the oven at two fires
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pollos en Mole Verde (Chicken in Green Mole)
body:
## Ingredients

- chickens
- salt
- lard
- squash seed
- about 12 grains of popcorn
- green chile
- a little parsley

## Directions

1. Cook the chickens with salt
2. Fry a bit of squash seed in lard with about 12 grains of popcorn
3. Grind with a little salt until very fine
4. Grind 1 green chile and a little parsley
5. Dissolve in the same broth
6. Fry and add the chicken pieces
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pollos en Nogada de Almendra (Chickens in Almond Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- chickens
- ten to fifteen fried almonds
- two roasted tomatoes
- guaque or dried chile peppered
- liver of the chickens cooked
- small piece of cinnamon
- ten Castilian peppers
- a little saffron
- water
- green lettuce
- pickles

## Directions

1. Clean the chickens well and fry them
2. When they take on color, grind ten to fifteen fried almonds, two roasted tomatoes, one guaque or dried chile without seeds, the cooked liver of the chickens, a small piece of cinnamon and ten Castilian peppers, and a little saffron
3. Dissolve this with a little water and add to the chickens
4. Let cook
5. Serve with green lettuce and pickles
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pollos en Salsa (Chicken in Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- chickens
- salt
- roasted tomatoes
- oregano
- bread fried in lard
- ten fried almonds
- handful of toasted and peeled melon seeds

## Directions

1. Cook the chickens with salt
2. Grind the roasted tomatoes with a little oregano and a small piece of bread fried in lard, ten fried almonds, and a handful of toasted and peeled melon seeds
3. Dissolve this mixture in the same broth
4. Add the chicken pieces cut into quarters to the mixture
5. Serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pollos en Salsa (Chicken in Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- chickens
- salt
- roasted tomatoes
- a little oregano
- a small piece of fried bread in lard
- 10 roasted almonds
- a handful of roasted and peeled melon seeds

## Directions

1. Cook the chickens with salt
2. Grind roasted tomatoes with a little oregano and a small piece of bread fried in lard
3. Add 10 roasted almonds
4. Add a handful of roasted and peeled melon seeds
5. Dissolve this with the same broth
6. Add the chickens cut into quarters and serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pollos Encebollados (Chicken with Onions)
body:
## Ingredients

- chickens
- salt
- pepper
- half a cup of oil
- half a cup of vinegar
- half a cup of white wine or sherry
- 4 raw tomatoes
- 3 heads of onion
- 3 bay leaves

## Directions

1. After washing the chickens, add salt and pepper
2. Place in a pot and add half a cup of oil, half a cup of vinegar, half a cup of white wine or sherry, 4 raw tomatoes, 3 heads of onion, and 3 bay leaves
3. Cook over low heat
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pollos Entomatados (Tomato Chickens)
body:
## Ingredients

- chickens
- lard
- four cloves of garlic
- two tomatoes
- parsley
- salt
- pepper powder
- saffron water
- toasted flour

## Directions

1. If tender, brown them whole; if not, in pieces
2. In the same lard, brown four cloves of garlic
3. When they take on color, add two chopped and peeled tomatoes, chopped parsley, and salt
4. Add pepper powder, a little saffron water and a spoonful of toasted flour
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pollos Fritos (Fried Chickens)
body:
## Ingredients

- chickens
- oil or lard
- salt
- hot water
- 2 bay leaves
- mashed garlic
- cinnamon powder
- clove
- pepper
- half cup of vinegar
- chopped and blanched onion
- hot water
- green lettuce

## Directions

1. Clean the chickens well and fry them in oil or lard with salt
2. When they turn color, cover with hot water, salt, 2 bay leaves, mashed garlic, cinnamon powder, clove and pepper
3. When the liquid is consumed, add half cup of vinegar
4. Add a little chopped onion that has been blanched in hot water
5. Let it boil and serve with green lettuces
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pollos Mechados (Larded Chickens)
body:
## Ingredients

- chickens
- ham
- pepper powder
- nutmeg
- two cloves of garlic
- peeled tomato
- parsley
- oil
- two roasted tomatoes
- capers
- fried bread
- onion
- water
- salt

## Directions

1. Lard the chickens with ham, pepper powder, nutmeg, two cloves of garlic, peeled tomato and chopped parsley
2. Brown them in oil and when they take on color, add two roasted tomatoes, some capers, a piece of fried bread, sufficient chopped onion
3. Dissolve with water and salt and add to the chickens
4. If they are very tender, let them simmer half an hour; if not, one hour
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pollos Rellenos (Stuffed Chickens)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 wide dried chiles
- 1 garlic clove
- a small piece of cinnamon
- 1 pound of pork
- tomato
- onion
- 1 teaspoon of vinegar
- salt
- butter
- 2 or 3 tablespoons of vinegar
- 2 bay leaves
- thyme

## Directions

1. Remove seeds from 3 wide dried chiles
2. Toast and grind them with 1 garlic clove and a small piece of cinnamon
3. Parboil 1 pound of pork and chop it
4. Put in a pan with tomato and peeled and chopped onion
5. Add the ground chile mixed with 1 teaspoon of vinegar seasoned with salt
6. Mix everything
7. Stuff raw chickens that have been previously rubbed with salt and butter with this mixture
8. Place them in a dish with 2 or 3 tablespoons of vinegar, 2 bay leaves, thyme and chopped onion
9. Take to the oven, basting them with their own juice so they don't dry out
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pollos Saboyanos (Savoyard Chickens)
body:
## Ingredients

- chickens
- oil
- salt
- ham
- slices of sausage
- slices of onion
- two cloves of garlic
- fifteen fried almonds
- two roasted and ground tomatoes
- water
- dry sherry
- a piece of French bread fried and ground
- ten raisins (optional)

## Directions

1. Clean the chickens well and fry them in oil with salt
2. When they take on color, add the chopped ham, slices of sausage, slices of onion, two finely chopped cloves of garlic, and fifteen fried almonds
3. Add two roasted and ground tomatoes
4. Cover with water, salt, and a glass of dry sherry
5. When it is half-cooked, add a piece of French bread fried and ground
6. Add ten raisins if desired
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pollos Secos (Dry Chicken)
body:
## Ingredients

- chickens
- water
- salt
- parsley
- leeks
- thyme
- 2 bay leaves
- 1 sprig of mint
- 1 tablespoon of lard or butter
- plenty of peeled and chopped tomato
- raw tomatillo
- 3 peeled garlic cloves
- 1 green chile
- pepper powder
- cinnamon
- chopped almonds
- raisins
- olives
- capers
- 1 tablespoon of vinegar
- 1 jigger of dry sherry

## Directions

1. Clean the chickens well and boil them with water, salt, parsley, leeks, thyme, 2 bay leaves and 1 sprig of mint
2. When cooked, remove and cut into regular-sized pieces
3. Put a pan on the fire with 1 tablespoon of lard or butter
4. Chop plenty of peeled tomato and raw tomatillo
5. Add 3 peeled garlic cloves and 1 green chile, all chopped
6. Add salt, pepper powder and cinnamon
7. Add chopped almonds, raisins, olives, whole capers and 1 tablespoon of vinegar
8. Mix everything well and remove from fire
9. Grease a casserole with butter
10. Alternate layers of chicken pieces and sauce, finishing with a layer of sauce on top
11. Put on fire and when it boils, add 1 jigger of dry sherry
12. Place over two fires to reduce
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Polvorones (Shortbread Cookies)
body:
## Ingredients

- twelve ounces of sifted flour
- six ounces of sifted sugar
- six ounces of lard

## Directions

1. Place the sifted flour, sifted sugar, and lard on a table
2. Mix very well until the dough is silky
3. Roll out with a rolling pin
4. Cut into desired shapes
5. Place on a hot oven to cook quickly
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Polvorones (Spanish Shortbread Cookies)
body:
## Ingredients

- half a pound of ground bread
- half a pound of bread flour
- four ounces of lard
- three ounces of sugar
- one eighth of an ounce of baking soda
- one teaspoonful of cinnamon powder
- a little milk

## Directions

1. Mix half a pound of ground bread with half a pound of bread flour, four ounces of lard, three ounces of sugar, one eighth of an ounce of baking soda, one teaspoonful of cinnamon powder and a little milk
2. Knead and then stretch with the wooden pin and cut with the mouth of a glass or cup
3. Place on baking sheets in the oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Ponche (Punch)
body:
## Ingredients

- Apricots (a quantity)
- Sugar
- Apollinaris (one bottle)
- Maraschino (a little)
- White wine (one bottle)
- Champagne (one bottle)
- Ice
- Grapes or cherries

## Directions

1. Cook a quantity of apricots.
2. When cooked and cold, strain them.
3. Add sugar according to the quantity desired.
4. Add one bottle of Apollinaris, a little maraschino, one bottle of white wine, and one of champagne.
5. Add pieces of ice and serve with grapes or cherries.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Potage de Garbanzos (Chickpea Stew)
body:
## Ingredients

- Chickpeas
- Water
- Lye water
- Ham slices
- Chorizo slices
- Tender green beans
- Güisquil pieces
- Carrot, peeled and split lengthwise
- Cabbage
- Salchichón slices
- Peeled tomato
- Onion, chopped

## Directions

1. Soak chickpeas in sufficient water the night before cooking
2. The next day, put a little lye water on the fire
3. Add the chickpeas and let them boil for ten minutes, then lower heat and let cool a bit
4. Wash with cold water and put in very clean water on even heat
5. When cooked, remove the chickpeas
6. In the broth in which they cooked, cook slices of ham, slices of chorizo, tender green beans split lengthwise, pieces of güisquil, carrot peeled and split lengthwise, and cabbage
7. When everything is well cooked, mix it with the chickpeas along with salchichón slices and a fried preparation of peeled tomato and chopped onion
8. With the chickpeas, it should only give one boil so everything comes out whole, and serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Potato Cakes (Tortas de Papa)
body:
## Ingredients

- Potatoes
- Eggs
- Cheese
- Shrimp
- Salt
- Butter

## Directions

1. After cooking the potatoes, peel and grind them.
2. For half a pound of potatoes, mix in three eggs and a piece of cheese.
3. If available, add one ounce of shrimp, peeled and blanched.
4. Season with salt.
5. Form the cakes and fry in hot butter over low heat.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Potato Omelette (Tortilla de Papa)
body:
## Ingredients

- Potato
- Salt
- Oil or Butter
- Eggs

## Directions

1. Cook the potato and fry it with salt in one or two tablespoons of oil.
2. Stir so it breaks up.
3. For four ounces of potato, beat three eggs (white first and then yolk).
4. Mix the potato with this beaten mixture forming the omelette the size desired.
5. Fry in hot butter.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Puding de Durazno (Peach Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- salpor flour (0.5 cup)
- bread flour (0.5 cup)
- Royal baking powder (1 teaspoon)
- sugar (2 tablespoons)
- butter (1 tablespoon)
- milk (1 cup)
- eggs (3)
- nutmeg (a pinch)
- salt (a pinch)
- seedless raisins (0.5 cup, halved)
- peach pieces (1 cup)

## Directions

1. Beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
2. Mix in the egg yolks.
3. Add the salpor flour, bread flour, Royal, sugar, butter, milk, nutmeg, and salt.
4. Fold in the halved raisins and peach pieces.
5. Mix everything well.
6. Pour into a greased mold and bake in the oven.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Puerros a la Vinagreta (Leeks Vinaigrette)
body:
## Ingredients

- leeks
- salt
- water
- vinegar
- oil
- pepper powder

## Directions

1. Slice the leeks without the stems
2. Blanch in salted water
3. When done, arrange in a salad bowl with a little vinegar, oil, salt to taste
4. Add pepper powder if desired
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Pulpetas de Carne (Meat Rolls)
body:
## Ingredients

- meat
- pork loin, in strips
- white ham, in strips
- salt
- vinegar
- wine
- lemon juice
- nutmeg powder
- sherry wine
- egg
- onion, chopped
- lard
- red wine or sherry
- water, sufficient
- tomato
- pepper
- clove
- cinnamon

## Directions

1. Cut meat into slices and soften with a mallet
2. Cut strips of pork loin and white ham
3. Season with salt, vinegar, wine, lemon juice, nutmeg powder, sherry wine, egg, and chopped onion
4. Fill the meat slices with this mixture and sew closed with thread
5. Place in a little lard and when it takes on golden color, add red wine or sherry and sufficient water
6. Add tomato, pepper, clove, and cinnamon
7. When cooked, strain the sauce through a filter and serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Puré de Papas (Potato Puree)
body:
## Ingredients

- Potatoes, cooked in little water with salt
- Butter, half a pound for three pounds of potatoes
- Milk, half a cup
- Salt, one quarter of a teaspoon
- Parsley, chopped

## Directions

1. Cook potatoes in very little water with salt
2. Peel with great care, removing all dark spots
3. Grind in a meat grinder which should be very clean
4. For three pounds of potatoes, if fine puree is desired, add half a pound of butter, half a cup of milk and one quarter of a teaspoon of very white salt
5. Mix everything very well
6. If desired, serve just like this with chopped parsley
7. If not, place on the stove to brown, but be careful to leave it very firm so it does not spread
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Puré de Papas a la Española (Potato Puree in Spanish Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- Cooked potatoes
- Butter, one spoon
- Meat juice, two spoons
- Cheese powder, two ounces
- Parsley sprigs

## Directions

1. Grind the cooked potatoes
2. Fry in a spoon of butter, two spoons of meat juice and two ounces of cheese powder
3. Serve with parsley sprigs, giving it the desired shape
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Píerna de Carnero (Leg of Mutton)
body:
## Ingredients

- Leg of mutton
- Vinegar
- Salt
- Pepper powder
- Butter
- Water
- Potatoes

## Directions

1. One day before, place the leg with a little vinegar, salt and pepper powder
2. The next day place in the oven well brushed with butter; if desired cover with water
3. When cooked, brown and serve with boiled potatoes
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Quesadilla de Arroz o Harina de Salpor (Rice or Salpor Flour Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- flour, rice, salpor, or bread flour (1 pound)
- butter or lard (1 pound)
- salt (a pinch, if butter is unsalted)
- powdered sugar (10 ounces)
- eggs (9)

## Directions

1. Work 1 pound of flour with 1 pound of butter or lard until well combined.
2. If the butter lacks salt, add a small amount.
3. Let rest for half an hour.
4. After this time, mix in 10 ounces of powdered sugar.
5. Add the 9 eggs one by one, working the mixture well with each addition.
6. After everything is very well worked, place in small greased baking dishes.
7. If desired, sprinkle a little flour on top before placing in the oven.
8. Bake in the oven.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Quesadillas
body:
## Ingredients

- twenty ounces fine rice flour
- twelve ounces powdered sugar
- half pound grated and well-aired cheese
- half cup cream from milk
- half pound butter
- seven eggs

## Directions

1. Mix twenty ounces of fine rice flour with twelve ounces of powdered sugar, half a pound of grated and well-aired cheese, half a cup of cream from milk, and half a pound of butter.
2. Add the seven eggs one by one, kneading for five minutes with each egg.
3. Put in a lard-coated casserole and bake in the oven.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Quesadillas de Arroz (Rice Cakes)
body:
## Ingredients

- One pound of butter
- One pound of rice flour or salpor flour
- One pound of ground sugar

## Directions

1. Beat one pound of butter with one pound of rice flour or salpor flour and one pound of ground sugar
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Quesadillas de Arroz (Rice Cakes)
body:
## Ingredients

- One pound of butter
- One pound of rice flour or salpor flour
- One pound of ground sugar
- One tablespoon of lard
- Two whole eggs
- Salt to taste
- Nine egg yolks
- Nine egg whites
- Ground sugar and flour for topping (optional)

## Directions

1. Beat one pound of butter with one pound of rice flour and one pound of ground sugar until very well beaten
2. Add one tablespoon of lard with two whole eggs; add salt if needed
3. Beat for half an hour
4. Add nine egg yolks and beat five minutes more
5. Fold in nine well-beaten egg whites gently, stirring very well but not kneading
6. Pour into greased small dishes
7. Place in the oven; if desired, sprinkle with ground sugar and flour on top
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Queso de Marrano (Pork Cheese)
body:
## Ingredients

- pig's head
- feet
- bay leaves
- thyme sprig
- salt
- Castilian pepper
- parsley sprig
- broth
- pepper powder or parsley, chopped

## Directions

1. Clean the head well.
2. Cook with the feet, two bay leaves, a thyme sprig, salt, some Castilian pepper and a parsley sprig.
3. When well cooked, chop everything finely, ensuring no bones remain; discard brains and bones.
4. Put all the chopped meat in a pan with a little of the broth in which the head was cooked.
5. When well heated, add pepper powder or chopped parsley.
6. Pour into a clean cloth and press.
7. The next day serve as desired.
8. If desired, cook a beef foot with salt, and when well cooked, chop it and mix with the head before pressing.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Queso de Marrano en su Misma Piel (Pork Cheese in its Own Skin)
body:
## Ingredients

- pig's head
- salt
- pepper powder
- dried thyme powder
- parsley, chopped
- bay leaf powder
- dry sherry
- lemon juice
- lemon zest
- nutmeg powder

## Directions

1. Cut the head in half.
2. Remove the brains and debone very carefully, keeping the skin very intact.
3. Chop all the meat.
4. Cut the ears carefully so as not to tear the skin.
5. Chop some sweetbreads.
6. Mix with pepper powder, dried thyme powder, chopped parsley, bay leaf powder and salt.
7. When well mixed, add a glass of dry sherry, the juice of a lemon, the grated zest and a little nutmeg powder.
8. When well mixed, place on the skin and sew it closed with thread.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Queso de Marrano en su Misma Piel (Pork Head Cheese in Its Own Skin)
body:
## Ingredients

- Pork head
- Pork brains
- Pork ears
- Pork sweetbreads
- Pepper powder
- Dried thyme powder
- Parsley
- Bay leaf powder
- Salt
- Dry sherry
- Lemon juice and zest
- Nutmeg powder
- Bay leaves
- Thyme
- Leeks

## Directions

1. Split the head in half and remove the brains and bones, being careful to keep the skin intact
2. Chop all the meat
3. Cut the ears very carefully so the skin does not break
4. Chop some sweetbreads
5. Mix the chopped meat with pepper powder, dried thyme powder, parsley, bay leaf powder, and salt
6. Mix in one cup of dry sherry, lemon juice, lemon zest, and a small piece of nutmeg powder
7. Place the mixture on the skin and sew it closed with thick thread
8. Cook in water with bay leaves, thyme, a bundle of leeks, and salt for three hours
9. Place in a tin mold and press with a stone to give it a pleasant shape
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Rabioli (Ravioli)
body:
## Ingredients

- one pound flour
- three eggs
- salt
- butter
- cooked and chopped brain
- cooked and chopped spinach
- finely chopped chicken
- ground pork and spinach (alternative filling)
- one pound beef
- ripe and finely chopped tomato
- grated cheese

## Directions

1. Knead one pound flour with three eggs and a bit of salt
2. After kneading well, fill small molds with the following filling: heat butter in a pan and fry the cooked and chopped brain, cooked and chopped spinach, and finely chopped chicken
3. Alternatively, the filling can be made with finely chopped pork and spinach
4. After filling, seal well and poach
5. Place on a platter and cover with tomato sauce made as follows: cut one pound beef into small pieces and fry in lard until all the juices are released
6. When well fried, add plenty of ripe and finely chopped tomato
7. Let it boil a few times and use this to cover the ravioli, being careful to remove the meat
8. Sprinkle grated cheese on top
9. Place in the oven to brown and serve hot or cold
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Rabiolis (Fried Meat Pastries)
body:
## Ingredients

- one cup flour
- one tablespoon oil or lard
- one eighthth of an ounce salt
- one egg (beaten)
- one tablespoon sweet wine
- brain with salt, pepper powder, and chopped parsley (for filling)
- plenty of lard (for frying)
- tender lettuce leaves
- roasted and ground tomato sauce
- ten capers
- salt
- one teaspoonful oil

## Directions

1. Mix everything very well
2. Roll out with a rolling pin two or three times, spreading lard on each fold
3. On the final rolling, cut out small circles with the rim of a glass
4. Prepare a filling of brain with salt, pepper powder, and chopped parsley
5. Fill the circles with this mixture
6. Fold and seal the edges very well
7. Heat plenty of lard in a frying pan until very hot
8. Fry the pastries until golden
9. Place on a platter on tender lettuce leaves
10. Serve alone if desired, or with a sauce made from roasted and ground tomato mixed with about ten capers; season with salt and fry in one teaspoonful of oil
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Rabiolis (Ravioli)
body:
## Ingredients

- flour, one pound
- eggs, three
- salt
- brains, cooked and chopped
- spinach, cooked and chopped
- pepper powder
- butter
- beef or chicken pieces
- onion, chopped
- garlic clove, one
- tomatoes, about ten, peeled and chopped
- salt
- parmesan or Zacapa cheese powder

## Directions

1. Knead one pound of flour with three eggs and a little salt until well worked
2. Cut into small squares of desired size
3. Prepare a filling with cooked chopped brains, double the amount of cooked chopped spinach, a little pepper powder, fried in butter
4. Fill the dough squares, pinch the edges, and drop into boiling salted water
5. Boil for a quarter hour
6. Prepare a sauce by frying pieces of beef or chicken until golden without burning
7. Add a little chopped onion with a garlic clove and about ten peeled and chopped tomatoes
8. Place the ravioli in a platter, cover with sauce, and sprinkle with parmesan or Zacapa cheese powder
9. Serve as is or put in the oven for a quarter hour
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Rabiolis a la Italiana (Italian Ravioli)
body:
## Ingredients

- half pound bread flour
- two eggs
- one eighth of an ounce salt
- two tablespoons melted butter
- two cooked spinaches (well drained)
- cooked and chopped ham
- one ounce bone marrow
- one cooked brain (chopped)
- salt, pepper powder, cloves, and cinnamon to taste
- two tablespoons grated Flemish or Parmesan cheese
- flour (for dusting)
- two tablespoons lard
- one cup very good broth
- two tablespoons powder of toasted bread (well ground)
- six Castilian peppercorns
- two cloves
- one small piece of cinnamon
- one teaspoonful butter

## Directions

1. Knead all the flour, eggs, salt, and melted butter together
2. Roll out with a rolling pin
3. Grease the work surface with lard; repeat this operation two or three times
4. Cut out small circles of desired size
5. Prepare filling: cook and drain spinaches, chop them
6. Mix with chopped cooked ham, one ounce of bone marrow, and one chopped cooked brain
7. Add salt, pepper powder, cloves, and cinnamon
8. Mix in two tablespoons of grated Flemish or Parmesan cheese
9. Fill the circles with this mixture
10. Seal in the shape of pastries
11. Dust lightly with flour and cover with a clean cloth; let sit overnight
12. The next day, place in a frying pan with two tablespoons of lard on very low heat
13. Cover and turn carefully
14. When cooked, remove and let drain
15. In another frying pan, put one cup of very good broth with two tablespoons of powder of toasted and well-ground bread, six Castilian peppercorns, two cloves, and one small piece of cinnamon
16. Add one teaspoonful of butter
17. Place the pastries in this broth to give one gentle boil
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Rabiolis a la Italiana (Italian-Style Ravioli)
body:
## Ingredients

- one pound of flour
- three eggs
- three ounces of butter
- a little milk
- half a teaspoon of salt
- meat or brain and spinach for filling
- egg white
- salt
- tomato
- dried chili pepper
- onion heads
- garlic heads
- oil
- parmesan cheese
- mushrooms (optional)

## Directions

1. The day before, moisten one pound of flour with three eggs, three ounces of butter, a little milk, and half a teaspoon of salt
2. Knead very well leaving a dough that is neither hard nor watery
3. The following day, stretch it as thin as possible and cut the ravioli
4. Fill them with meat or brain and spinach
5. Seal the ravioli with egg white
6. Put them in a pot with boiling salted water
7. Prepare a sauce by cooking tomato with a dried chili pepper, two onion heads, and two ground garlic heads
8. Strain and add this sauce to oil where two other garlic heads have been fried until golden, then remove them
9. Fry the sauce in this oil
10. Place the ravioli in a dish, cover with the sauce and sprinkle with grated parmesan cheese
11. If desired, put in the oven for a quarter hour to brown, or serve just hot
12. If desired, mushrooms can also be added
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Rabiolis con Caldillo de Estofado (Ravioli with Stewed Meat Broth)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1.5 pounds flour
- 2 eggs
- 1 ochavo of salt
- 1 tablespoon lard
- melted butter for layering
- 1 pound pork
- peeled and chopped tomato
- onion
- 1 clove garlic
- 1 tablespoon good vinegar
- salt
- powder of pepper
- clove
- cinnamon
- chopped olives
- capers
- lard for frying
- tender lettuce leaves
- potatoes, cooked and sliced
- butter for frying potatoes
- bread powder
- stewed lamb broth

## Directions

1. Knead flour, eggs, salt, and lard very well
2. Flatten with a rolling pin and brush with melted butter, then fold; repeat this process three or four times
3. Flatten very thin and cut into small rounds
4. Chop one pound of pork with peeled and chopped tomato, onion, and garlic
5. Add one tablespoon of good vinegar, salt, powder of pepper, clove, and cinnamon
6. When half-cooked, remove from heat and add chopped olives and capers
7. Fill the rounds with this mixture and fold edges like empanadas
8. Fry in very hot lard
9. Arrange on a platter with tender lettuce leaves and potato slices fried in butter with bread powder
10. Cover the ravioli with stewed lamb broth
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Rabioos de Picado (Minced Pork Pastries)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1.5 pounds bread flour
- 2 tablespoons lard
- 2 eggs
- 1 ochavo of salt
- 1 teaspoon sherry (if dough is too stiff)
- 0.5 pound pork, partially cooked
- 1 tablespoon lard for frying the filling
- peeled and chopped tomato
- onion
- 1 clove garlic
- powder of pepper
- clove
- cinnamon
- small piece of white bread
- 1 tablespoon dry sherry
- lard for frying
- cooked tomato sauce
- 1 dried chile pepper, seeded and soaked
- 1 teaspoon oil for frying the sauce

## Directions

1. Knead the flour, lard, eggs, and salt very well for half an hour; if too stiff, add a teaspoon of sherry
2. Flatten the dough with a rolling pin and cut into rounds like empanadas
3. Chop half a pound of partially cooked pork and fry in one tablespoon of lard with peeled and chopped tomato, onion, and garlic
4. Season the filling with powder of pepper, clove, cinnamon, a small piece of white bread, salt, and one tablespoon of dry sherry
5. Fill the dough rounds and fold edges like empanadas
6. Fry in very hot lard
7. Prepare sauce by frying the seeded and soaked dried chile pepper in one teaspoon of oil with the cooked tomato
8. Serve the pastries hot covered with the sauce
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Ragout (Beef Ragout)
body:
## Ingredients

- good piece of loin
- butter
- flour
- salt
- thyme
- parsley
- bay leaf
- water
- carrot slices
- potato slices

## Directions

1. Take a good piece of loin and slice it
2. Fry the slices in a pan with butter
3. Sprinkle with a little flour and salt to taste
4. Make a bouquet of thyme, parsley, and bay leaf
5. Add sufficient water and the bouquet
6. Add slices of carrot and potatoes
7. Place on very low heat until everything is cooked
8. Remove the bouquet of herbs before serving
9. Serve on a plate garnished with lettuce and serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Recado de Cangrejos (Crab Preparation)
body:
## Ingredients

- crabs
- salt
- small crab claws
- roasted tomatoes
- onion head
- dried chile
- achiote (annatto)
- rice or masa

## Directions

1. Clean the crabs well and remove the small claws.
2. Cook the crabs with salt.
3. Grind the small claws very well with two roasted tomatoes, one onion head, and if desired, a dried chile and a small piece of achiote for color.
4. Grind a little rice or masa to thicken.
5. Serve after boiling well, either thick or thin as desired.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Rellenitos de Plátano (Plantain Fritters)
body:
## Ingredients

- Two plantains
- Cinnamon
- Refried beans
- Sugar
- Lard

## Directions

1. Cook two plantains in steam; when already fried grind with a piece of cinnamon
2. Make small tortillas of the desired size, fill with well-refried and sweetened beans
3. Fold the tortilla and fry in hot lard; serve with powdered sugar on top
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Rellenitos de Plátano (Stuffed Plantain Fritters)
body:
## Ingredients

- two plantains
- a small piece of cinnamon
- beans, well-fried and sweetened to taste
- lard for frying
- powdered sugar

## Directions

1. Cook two plantains by steam
2. When already fried, grind them with a small piece of cinnamon
3. Make small tortillas of the desired size
4. Fill them with beans that have been well-fried and sweetened to taste beforehand
5. Fold the tortilla and fry in hot lard
6. Serve with powdered sugar on top
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Repollo a la Saboyana (Cabbage Savoy Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- cabbage
- salt
- pork loin sliced
- lard or butter
- tomato sauce

## Directions

1. Chop and cook the cabbage in salted water, drain in a colander
2. In a mold put a layer of cabbage and a layer of pork loin made into slices and fried very well with its fat
3. Put another layer of cabbage and continue alternating until the mold reaches the desired height
4. Add one spoonful of lard or butter, put in the oven for one hour and when ready to serve, put a little tomato sauce on top
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Repollo con Cecina (Cabbage with Dried Meat)
body:
## Ingredients

- Cecina (dried meat), cut into pieces, not fatty
- Cabbage
- Salt
- Three roasted tomatoes
- One soaked and seeded pasilla chile
- One tablespoon of lard
- Two onions
- One cup of water
- One tablespoon of white bread powder

## Directions

1. Cook the cecina pieces
2. Cook the chopped cabbage separately with salt
3. Grind three roasted tomatoes with one soaked and seeded pasilla chile
4. Fry two finely chopped onions in one tablespoon of lard
5. Add the ground tomato mixture, one cup of water, salt, and one tablespoon of white bread powder
6. Add the cecina and cabbage
7. Let it boil a few times and serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Repollo con Tomate (Cabbage with Tomato)
body:
## Ingredients

- Cabbage
- Salt
- Garlic
- Oil or lard
- Onion
- Green chile
- Three tomatoes
- Parsley
- Pepper powder
- Water
- Two tablespoons of milk (optional)

## Directions

1. Cook the chopped cabbage with salt and plenty of garlic
2. When cooked, remove and let it drain
3. Fry in one tablespoon of oil or lard the onion and chopped green chile
4. Add three peeled and roasted tomatoes and parsley, all chopped, with pepper powder and a little water
5. Add the cabbage to this mixture
6. If desired, add two tablespoons of milk
7. Serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Repollo en Adobo (Cabbage in Adobo Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- Cabbage
- Salt
- Three roasted tomatoes
- One roasted onion head
- One garlic clove
- A small piece of achiote
- One dry chile
- A piece of French bread, soaked
- One teaspoon of lard

## Directions

1. Cook the chopped cabbage with salt
2. Grind three roasted tomatoes, one roasted onion head, one garlic clove, a small piece of achiote, one dry chile, and a piece of soaked French bread
3. Dissolve this mixture with a little water
4. Season with salt
5. Fry in one teaspoon of lard
6. Add the cabbage to this mixture, making sure it is not too sparse
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Repollo en su Jugo (Cabbage in its own Juice)
body:
## Ingredients

- cabbage
- butter
- onion slices
- salt
- pepper powder
- broth or water

## Directions

1. Chop the cabbage finely and place it to fry in butter with onion slices, salt and pepper powder
2. When fried, let it cook and if it is tough add very little broth or water
3. Place over very gentle heat
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Repollo Guisado (Braised Cabbage)
body:
## Ingredients

- Cabbage
- Salt
- One tablespoon of lard
- Three peeled tomatoes
- Onion
- One garlic clove
- One tablespoon of vinegar
- White bread powder, finely ground with Castilian pepper
- Fresh cheese

## Directions

1. Cook the chopped cabbage as in previous recipes
2. Fry in one tablespoon of lard three peeled tomatoes, onion, and one garlic clove
3. Add the cabbage with one tablespoon of vinegar and a little white bread powder finely ground with Castilian pepper
4. Just before serving, cover with plenty of fresh cheese
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Repollo Guisado (Braised Cabbage)
body:
## Ingredients

- Cabbage
- Water
- Salt
- Cooked meat, half beef and half pork
- Peeled and chopped tomato
- Onion
- Parsley
- One teaspoon of vinegar
- Pepper powder
- Butter

## Directions

1. Chop the cabbage and cook in water with salt
2. Chop some cooked meat (half beef and half pork); fry with peeled and chopped tomato, onion and parsley, one teaspoon of vinegar, pepper powder
3. Butter a pan, place a layer of cabbage and a layer of meat, alternate them, making sure the last one is cabbage
4. Add two tablespoons of melted butter and place in the oven or over two fires
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Repollo Relleno (Stuffed Cabbage)
body:
## Ingredients

- Pork meat, partially cooked
- Tomato
- Onion
- Garlic
- Vinegar
- Salt
- One tablespoon of sherry
- Bread powder, ground with pepper and clove
- Cabbage
- Broth

## Directions

1. Chop the partially cooked pork meat
2. Fry it with a mixture of tomato, onion, and finely chopped garlic
3. Add a little vinegar, salt, one tablespoon of sherry, and bread powder ground with pepper and clove
4. Fill the white part of the cabbage with this mixture
5. Tie the cabbage
6. Place it in a casserole with broth
7. Bake it in the oven
8. When it is cooked, serve it hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Repollo Relleno (Stuffed Cabbage)
body:
## Ingredients

- Cabbage
- Pork, partially cooked, chopped
- Tomato
- Onion
- Garlic, well chopped
- Vinegar, a bit
- Salt
- Sherry, one tablespoon
- Bread powder, ground
- Pepper
- Clove
- Broth

## Directions

1. Chop the partially cooked pork and fry with seasoning of tomato, onion and well chopped garlic.
2. Add a bit of vinegar, salt, one tablespoon of sherry, ground bread powder with pepper and clove.
3. Fill all the white part of the cabbage with this, tie it and place in a cooking pot with broth in the oven.
4. When cooked, serve hot.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Repollos y Relámpagos (Cream Puffs and Éclairs)
body:
## Ingredients

- Water (two glasses)
- Lard (four ounces)
- Salt
- Flour (half a pound, well sifted)
- Eggs (eight to ten, depending on size)
- Flour (four ounces)
- Sugar (four ounces)
- Eggs (three)
- Cooked milk (half a liter)
- Caramel-point honey

## Directions

1. Put a saucepan on the heat with two glasses of water, four ounces of lard, and a pinch of salt.
2. When boiling, add half a pound of well-sifted flour, stir well and put back on the heat.
3. When it no longer sticks to the hand, remove it.
4. When cool, add eggs two by two; if they are large, eight eggs, if small, ten eggs; mix everything well and put it in a cloth bag with its respective tube.
5. On a buttered pan, place small pieces of the desired size; the éclairs are long and the cream puffs are round.
6. Put them in a very hot oven.
7. When cooked, remove them, split them down the middle with scissors and fill with a cream made as follows: put four ounces of flour, four ounces of sugar, three eggs (white and yolk) in a container; mix everything very well with half a liter of cooked milk; when everything is well mixed without lumps, put it on the heat to boil for ten minutes; coat with this cream and have caramel-point honey separate and glaze with this.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Revolcado Chapín (Chapín-Style Stew)
body:
## Ingredients

- pig's head
- lard from the pig's head
- tomato
- tomatillo
- guaque chile
- green chile
- two cold tortillas
- achiote

## Directions

1. Cook the pig's head
2. Let it cool and remove the lard
3. In that same lard, fry a mixture that has been cooked beforehand consisting of plenty of tomato and tomatillo, one guaque chile and one green chile
4. Grind two cold tortillas and a small piece of achiote and add to the mixture
5. Add the pig's head cut into pieces
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Riñones a la Cordobesa (Kidneys Córdoba Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- kidney
- butter or lard
- flour
- onion
- parsley
- broth
- dry sherry

## Directions

1. After washing the kidney, cut it into slices and fry them in butter or lard
2. Remove the kidney and in that same fat fry one tablespoon of flour with onion and parsley, both chopped
3. Add a little broth from the pot so that a thin sauce forms
4. Add one tablespoon of dry sherry and put the kidneys in to give a slight boil, as if they boil too much they become tough
5. Serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Riñones a la Milanesa (Kidneys Milanese Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- kidney
- garlic
- parsley
- salt
- pepper powder
- butter or lard
- potatoes

## Directions

1. Wash the kidney very well and cut it into very thin slices
2. Mince one clove of garlic very thin and parsley very finely, and mix everything very well with a little salt and pepper powder
3. Have a pan on the fire with butter or lard and fry the kidney over very low heat
4. The diners should already be seated at the table so they can eat the dish very hot after it has been on the fire for five minutes
5. Serve with potatoes cooked plain
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Riñones a la Turca (Kidneys Turkish Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- half pound rice
- half liter clear broth
- salt
- nutmeg
- one beaten egg
- butter
- six to eight lamb kidneys
- pepper powder
- flour
- bacon fat
- one cup broth
- one glass sherry
- lemon drops

## Directions

1. Fry the rice and add half a liter of very clear broth, salt, and a little nutmeg
2. Cook over very low heat
3. When done, allow to cool
4. Add one beaten egg to a mold lined with butter and pour in the rice
5. Place in a moderate oven or in a bain-marie
6. Clean six to eight lamb kidneys, cut into pieces, and season with salt, pepper powder, and flour
7. Fry pieces of fat bacon in butter and add the kidneys
8. Add one cup of broth and one glass of sherry
9. Let boil for just a few minutes as they become tough easily
10. Place the rice on a plate and make a hollow in the center
11. Place the kidneys in the hollow, add a few drops of lemon, and serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Riñones con Champiñones (Kidneys with Mushrooms)
body:
## Ingredients

- kidneys
- butter
- parsley
- garlic
- mushrooms
- pepper powder
- salt
- flour
- white wine or dry sherry

## Directions

1. Slice the kidneys and fry them in butter
2. Add parsley, garlic, finely chopped mushrooms, pepper powder and salt
3. When everything is well fried, add one teaspoon of flour dissolved in white wine or dry sherry
4. Put them on the fire without letting them boil much because they become tough
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Riñones con Vino Blanco (Kidneys with White Wine)
body:
## Ingredients

- kidney
- flour
- salt
- pepper powder
- onion
- parsley
- white wine

## Directions

1. Well wash the kidney and cut it into very thin strips
2. Coat the strips in flour with salt, pepper powder, onion and chopped parsley
3. Add one cup of white wine, let it boil and serve immediately
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Riñones en Adobo (Kidneys in Adobo)
body:
## Ingredients

- cooked tomato
- tomatillo
- oregano
- cumin
- Castilian peppercorns
- achiote
- guaque chile
- water
- butter
- kidney
- potatoes

## Directions

1. Grind cooked tomato and tomatillo with a little oregano, a little cumin, some Castilian peppercorns, a small piece of achiote and a guaque chile
2. Dissolve this with a little water and fry it in a little butter
3. Add the kidney chopped into pieces and let it boil for ten minutes
4. Serve hot with slices of cooked potatoes
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Riñón Asado (Roasted Kidney)
body:
## Ingredients

- kidney
- salt
- pepper powder
- butter
- tomato sauce with dried chile

## Directions

1. Wash the kidney very well, removing the skin and fat
2. Split it open, rub it with salt, pepper powder and a little butter and let it sit in this brine for a quarter hour
3. Then place it on the grill, turn it two or three times so it does not become tough and serve it with a good tomato and dried chile sauce
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Rompopo (Eggnog)
body:
## Ingredients

- thirty egg yolks
- one bottle of high-point syrup made with two and a half pounds of well-clarified sugar
- one pound of rum
- two ounces of ground almond

## Directions

1. Beat thirty egg yolks for two hours
2. When they are well thickened, add one bottle of high-point syrup made with two and a half pounds of well-clarified sugar, one pound of rum, and two ounces of ground almond
3. Mix everything well and pour into clean white bottles
4. Cork and serve the following day
5. Alternatively, instead of rum, use one bottle of arrack with half an ounce of cinnamon and the powder of one nutmeg added eight days before use
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Rompopo (Eggnog)
body:
## Ingredients

- Thirty egg yolks
- One bottle of high-point syrup made with two and a half pounds of well-clarified sugar

## Directions

1. Beat thirty egg yolks for two hours
2. When well thickened, add one bottle of high-point syrup made with two and a half pounds of well-clarified sugar
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Rosbif (Roast Beef)
body:
## Ingredients

- a piece of cold meat
- butter or lard
- salt

## Directions

1. Take a piece of cold meat, coat with butter or lard and salt
2. Place in the oven on a roasting pan and baste with its own juice constantly, avoiding that it dries out
3. Serve with tender lettuces and potatoes in white
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Rosbif a la Francesa (French-Style Roast Beef)
body:
## Ingredients

- a very tender piece of meat
- oil
- salt
- pepper
- minced parsley
- two bay leaves

## Directions

1. Take a very tender piece of meat and season a little oil with salt, pepper and minced parsley
2. Coat the loin with this, place in a dish in the oven with two bay leaves, basting it constantly with its juice
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Rosca Africana (African Ring Bread)
body:
## Ingredients

- Four ounces of butter
- Two eggs
- Two ounces of sugar
- Four ounces of well-sifted flour
- Juice of two lemons
- Half glass of milk
- One and a half ounces of yeast
- Four ounces of currants
- Two ounces of raisins
- Sugar and chopped almond for topping

## Directions

1. Beat the butter until it becomes a paste
2. Add the two eggs, two ounces of sugar, and four ounces of well-sifted flour, the lemon juice, half glass of milk, and one and a half ounces of yeast
3. Knead very well for half an hour
4. Add the currants and raisins
5. Place in a very clean cloth, tie, and leave overnight in a container with water
6. The next day, remove and form the ring
7. Top with sugar and chopped almond
8. Place in the oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Roscas de Almendra (Almond Rings)
body:
## Ingredients

- half a pound of peeled almonds
- six ounces of butter
- two ounces of lard
- six egg yolks
- flour

## Directions

1. Grind the peeled almonds in a machine
2. Mix with butter, lard, and egg yolks
3. Add enough flour to form rings
4. Place on trays and bake in the oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Roscas de Almendra (Almond Rings)
body:
## Ingredients

- half a pound of peeled, dry, ground almonds
- six ounces of sifted sugar
- two egg whites beaten until stiff

## Directions

1. Mix the ground almonds with the sifted sugar
2. Add the stiffly beaten egg whites
3. Place in a paper cone or in a small metal tube in cloth
4. Form rings on trays
5. Bake in the oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Roscas de Canela (Cinnamon Rings)
body:
## Ingredients

- One pound of sugar
- Four ounces of peeled and ground almonds
- One teaspoon of cinnamon powder

## Directions

1. Clarify one pound of sugar
2. When it reaches the soft ball stage, remove from heat
3. Add four ounces of peeled and ground almonds
4. Add one teaspoon of cinnamon powder
5. Return to heat for five minutes
6. When cooled, place in a pastry bag to form rings
7. Place on a baking sheet and bake in the oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Roscas de Leche (Milk Rings)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 eggs
- 1 tablespoon of yeast
- 10 ounces of flour
- 8 egg yolks beaten
- 1.5 pounds of powdered sugar
- 1/8 ounce of cinnamon powder
- 0.5 glass of milk
- a little orange blossom water
- a small pinch of salt

## Directions

1. In the morning, put five eggs, one tablespoon of yeast, and ten ounces of flour in a bowl and mix very well
2. In the afternoon, when it has risen well, add eight well-beaten egg yolks, one and a half pounds of powdered sugar, one eighth of an ounce of cinnamon powder, half a glass of milk, a little orange blossom water and a small pinch of salt
3. Let it rest until four o'clock in the morning of the next day
4. Form the rings and place them in a hot oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Roscas de Vino (Wine Rings)
body:
## Ingredients

- one pound of lard
- six ounces of sugar
- one glass of sherry wine
- flour

## Directions

1. Mix the lard, sugar, and sherry wine
2. Add enough flour to form rings
3. Place on trays and bake in the oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Rosquetes (Little Rings)
body:
## Ingredients

- half a pound of flour
- 1 ounce of butter
- 1 ounce of lard
- a little milk

## Directions

1. Mix half a pound of flour, one ounce of butter and one of lard very well with a little milk
2. Make rings
3. Place in the oven
4. When they take color, remove and coat with butter
5. Return to the oven to brown
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Rosquetes (Orange Rosquettes)
body:
## Ingredients

- one pound flour
- twelve egg yolks
- two egg whites
- two sweet oranges, juiced
- three ounces butter

## Directions

1. Mix all ingredients very well and let rest for a moment.
2. Form rings of one ounce each, make an opening in the middle with a sharp knife, put in a hot oven, and coat with stage honey.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Rosquetes (Ring-Shaped Cookies)
body:
## Ingredients

- half a pound of flour
- one ounce of butter
- one ounce of lard
- a little milk
- butter for brushing

## Directions

1. Mix the flour, butter, and lard very well with a little milk
2. Form the rings and place them in the oven
3. When they take color, remove them and brush with butter
4. Return them to the oven to brown
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Rosquetes (Small Rings)
body:
## Ingredients

- one-half pound of flour
- two eggs
- one-half teaspoon of salt
- one teaspoon of Royal
- sugar powder
- lard for frying

## Directions

1. Mix one-half pound of flour with two eggs, one-half teaspoon of salt, and one teaspoon of Royal
2. Knead until very fine
3. Round with the palm of the hand and cut rings of desired size
4. Heat a small amount of lard and fry the rings
5. Remove and while still hot, dust with well-sifted sugar powder
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Rosquetes de Almendra (Almond Rings)
body:
## Ingredients

- half a pound of sugar
- four ounces of peeled and ground almonds
- three eggs
- cinnamon powder

## Directions

1. Clarify half a pound of sugar to a very high point
2. Mix in four ounces of peeled and ground almonds
3. Let it cool down and mix in three eggs and cinnamon powder
4. Form the rings and put in the oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Rosquetes de Avellana (Hazelnut Rings)
body:
## Ingredients

- six ounces of hazelnut
- six ounces of peeled and toasted almonds
- six ounces of sifted sugar
- six egg yolks

## Directions

1. Mix the hazelnuts, almonds, sifted sugar, and egg yolks very well
2. Using a paper cone or small metal tube, form rings on trays
3. Bake in the oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Rosquetes de Avellana (Hazelnut Rings)
body:
## Ingredients

- Six ounces of hazelnut
- Six ounces of peeled and toasted almond
- Six ounces of sifted sugar
- Six egg yolks

## Directions

1. Mix everything very well
2. Form the rosquetes using a paper cone or tin tube onto baking sheets
3. Place in the oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Rosquetes de Jesús (Jesus Rosquettes)
body:
## Ingredients

- one and a half cups milk
- two eggs
- three cups flour
- three ounces butter
- lard
- one cup milk
- one tablespoon cornstarch
- one egg
- sugar
- vanilla

## Directions

1. Mix all ingredients well in a mold coated with lard and bake in the oven.
2. When cooked, cut in half.
3. Prepare a cream made with one cup of milk, one tablespoon of cornstarch, one egg, sugar to taste, and vanilla; put on heat.
4. As soon as it thickens, fill the pastry with this and cover with turrón.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Rosquitas de Almendra (Almond Rings)
body:
## Ingredients

- Half pound of peeled and dry almonds
- One egg white
- Five ounces of powdered sugar

## Directions

1. Grind half pound of peeled and dry almonds
2. Add one egg white and five ounces of powdered sugar
3. Wrap in a damp napkin and leave overnight
4. The next day, place in a pastry bag to form rings
5. Bake in a hot oven
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Royal (Baking Powder)
body:
## Ingredients

- baking soda (4 ounces)
- cream of tartar (8 ounces)
- cornstarch (4 ounces)

## Directions

1. Mix all ingredients very well in dry form.
2. Store in a covered jar.
3. Use in the same way as commercial baking powder.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Rum Omelette (Tortilla al Ron)
body:
## Ingredients

- Eggs
- Sugar
- Butter
- Rum

## Directions

1. Beat four eggs (whites and yolks) with a small teaspoon of sugar.
2. Form the omelette and fry in hot butter.
3. Fold it and cover with white sugar.
4. Pour a glass of rum over it.
5. Set it on fire and serve burning. This can be served as a pancake.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Salchichas Finas (Fine Sausages)
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 pounds meat
- 1/2 ounce salt
- 1/4 ounce clove
- 1/4 ounce cinnamon
- 1/4 ounce Castilian pepper
- 1 small glass generous wine
- 1 small glass vinegar
- thin clean intestines
- lemon

## Directions

1. Grind 6 pounds of meat very finely
2. Add 1/2 ounce salt, 1/4 ounce clove, 1/4 ounce cinnamon, 1/4 ounce Castilian pepper, 1 small glass generous wine, and 1 small glass vinegar
3. Let sit in this infusion for three days
4. Wash thin, clean intestines with lemon
5. Fill the intestines with the meat mixture and tie them to the desired length
6. Place in the open air to dry
7. Serve roasted or fried with rice soup
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Salchichón (Dry Sausage)
body:
## Ingredients

- meat
- salt
- saltpeter
- fat pieces
- peppers
- thick intestines

## Directions

1. Salt the meat with salt and saltpeter and grind very finely
2. Add fat pieces and peppers
3. Fill thick intestines with the mixture, pricking them with a pin
4. Cook the sausages
5. Hang them to smoke
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Salmon (Salmon)
body:
## Ingredients

- peeled and seeded tomato, chopped
- onion, chopped
- parsley, chopped
- vinegar
- abundant oil
- salmon
- very thinly sliced onion

## Directions

1. Place chopped peeled and seeded tomato, onion and parsley in a dish with a little vinegar and abundant oil according to quantity
2. Place the salmon in this mixture, carefully mixing so it does not fall apart
3. Serve with very thinly sliced onion
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Salmon Omelette (Tortilla con Salmón)
body:
## Ingredients

- Eggs
- Salmon

## Directions

1. Beat four eggs, which are sufficient for six persons.
2. Add a piece of shredded salmon.
3. Form the omelette as in the previous recipes.
4. Serve hot.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Salmón (Salmon)
body:
## Ingredients

- salmon
- butter
- salt
- pepper powder
- onion
- parsley, chopped
- nutmeg
- capers
- cooked and ground tomato
- lemon juice to taste

## Directions

1. Place the salmon in a serving dish with a little butter, salt, pepper powder, onion, chopped parsley, a little nutmeg, some capers and cooked ground tomato
2. Mix everything well and place it on the salmon with lemon juice to taste
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Salmón (Salmon)
body:
## Ingredients

- salmon
- butter
- salt
- pepper
- onion
- parsley
- nutmeg
- capers
- cooked tomato
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. In a serving dish, place the salmon with a little butter, salt, pepper powder, onion, chopped parsley, a little nutmeg, some capers and cooked ground tomato.
2. Mix everything well and place on the salmon with lemon juice to taste.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Salmón a la Mayonesa (Salmon Mayonnaise)
body:
## Ingredients

- half pound of butter
- one small glass of oil
- two cooked and ground egg yolks
- two raw egg yolks

## Directions

1. Beat half pound of butter with one small glass of oil, two cooked and ground egg yolks, two raw egg yolks
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Salmón a la Mayonesa (Salmon with Mayonnaise)
body:
## Ingredients

- half a pound of butter
- one small glass of oil
- two cooked egg yolks, ground
- two raw egg yolks
- a little pepper powder
- salt to taste
- a teaspoon of vinegar
- a little tender lettuce, finely chopped
- salmon
- lobster or cooked chicken, chopped

## Directions

1. Beat together half a pound of butter with one small glass of oil, two cooked and ground egg yolks, two raw egg yolks, a little pepper powder and salt to taste.
2. When well beaten, add a teaspoon of vinegar drop by drop.
3. Add a little tender lettuce, finely chopped.
4. Place a layer of salmon on a platter, then a layer of mayonnaise, then a layer of lobster or cooked chicken, chopped.
5. Alternate the layers, making sure the last layer is mayonnaise.
6. Serve decorated with tender lettuce.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Salpicón (Chopped Meat Salad)
body:
## Ingredients

- Cooked and cold badilla meat
- Onion
- Mint
- Tomato
- Green chile
- Salt
- Sour orange juice

## Directions

1. Chop the cooked and cold badilla meat very well, chop onion, mint, tomato, green chile, season with salt and sour orange juice
2. Serve with white rice
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Salsa a la Cordobesa (Cordovan Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- olives
- capers
- almonds
- oil
- vinegar
- salt

## Directions

1. Grind in equal quantities olives and capers, twelve almonds fried in oil
2. Dissolve with vinegar, season with salt, making a thin sauce
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Salsa a la Española (Spanish Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- butter or lard
- onion
- parsley
- bread flour
- salt
- pepper powder
- milk

## Directions

1. In a spoonful of butter or lard fry a chopped onion, parsley, one spoonful of bread flour
2. add salt, a little pepper powder and one cup of milk
3. let it boil ten minutes
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Salsa a la Italiana (Italian Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- six hard egg yolks
- three red bell peppers
- parsley
- onion
- salt
- vinegar
- oil

## Directions

1. Chop six hard egg yolks very finely, three red bell peppers, parsley and onion
2. mix everything with salt, some spoonfuls of vinegar and two spoonfuls of oil
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Salsa a la Portuguesa (Portuguese Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- oil
- four garlic cloves
- three egg yolks
- salt
- lemon juice
- pepper powder

## Directions

1. Put a spoonful of oil in a pan, add four garlic cloves
2. dissolve three egg yolks with salt and a little lemon juice, pepper powder
3. add to the oil and give a slight boil
4. when serving, remove the garlic cloves
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Salsa a la Tártara (Tartar Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- four raw egg yolks
- half a glass of oil
- salt to taste
- a few drops of vinegar
- parsley, finely chopped
- one tablespoon English or French mustard

## Directions

1. Beat four raw egg yolks.
2. Gradually add half a glass of oil.
3. Season with salt to taste.
4. Add a few drops of vinegar and finely chopped parsley.
5. When well beaten, mix in one tablespoon of English or French mustard.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Salsa a la Veneciana (Venetian Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- onion
- parsley
- pepper powder
- salt

## Directions

1. Chop plenty of onion and parsley, add pepper powder and salt
2. mix everything well and serve
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Salsa a la Vinagreta (Vinaigrette Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- parsley
- vinegar
- mustard powder
- fine oil
- salt

## Directions

1. Grind sufficient parsley, add strong vinegar, two spoonfuls of mustard powder and three spoonfuls of fine oil, well seasoned with salt
2. serve with any meat
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Salsa Bechamel (Béchamel Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- two tablespoons butter
- two tablespoons bread flour
- pepper powder
- nutmeg
- one bay leaf
- one tablespoon vinegar
- salt to taste
- two egg yolks

## Directions
