1. Place the butter and bread flour in a pan and stir until it becomes a cream
2. Add pepper powder, nutmeg, and a bay leaf
3. Add one tablespoon of vinegar and salt to taste
4. Remove from heat and add two egg yolks before serving
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Salsa Bechamel (Béchamel Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoons of butter
- 2 tablespoons of bread flour
- pepper powder
- nutmeg
- 1 bay leaf
- 1 tablespoon (of milk, inferred from context)

## Directions

1. Put 2 tablespoons of butter and 2 of bread flour together
2. Stir until it becomes a cream
3. Add pepper powder, nutmeg, and a bay leaf
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Salsa de Chile de Pasa (Dried Chile Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- four dried pasilla chiles
- four roasted tomatoes
- butter
- vinegar
- salt

## Directions

1. Remove seeds from and soak four dried chiles, grind with four roasted tomatoes
2. fry in a small spoonful of butter, add one spoonful of vinegar and salt
3. serves with any meat
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Salsa de Chile Guaque (Guaque Chile Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- green guaque chile
- garlic
- roasted tomatoes
- oregano
- pepper
- vinegar
- water
- salt
- capers

## Directions

1. Cook the green guaque chile; once cooked, grind with a garlic clove, three roasted tomatoes, a bit of oregano, a few peppercorns
2. Dissolve this with a bit of vinegar, water and salt and add some capers
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Salsa de Chile Guaque (Guaque Chile Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- green guaque chile
- one garlic clove
- three roasted tomatoes
- oregano
- peppercorns
- vinegar
- water
- salt
- capers

## Directions

1. Cook the green guaque chile
2. once cooked, grind it with one garlic clove, three roasted tomatoes, a little oregano, and some peppercorns
3. dissolve this with a little vinegar, water and salt
4. add some capers
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Salsa de Chiltepe (Chiltepe Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- six ounces chiltepe
- two pounds tomatillo
- eight cloves garlic
- eight onion heads
- one small bunch fresh cilantro
- vinegar
- salt
- oil

## Directions

1. Toast the tomatillo and all other ingredients.
2. Grind with the cilantro.
3. Mix in good vinegar and salt.
4. Add oil if desired.
5. Store in well-sealed jars.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Salsa de Miltomate (Ground Cherry Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- miltomate
- cumin
- Castilian peppercorns
- French mustard
- butter
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Cook a quantity of miltomate, grind with a little cumin, some Castilian peppercorns, a small piece of French mustard fried in butter
2. dissolve with vinegar and fry in a small spoonful of butter or margarine
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Salsa de Miltomate (Ground Cherry Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- miltomate
- cooked chile zambo
- ten or twelve Chiapa peppercorns
- water
- vinegar
- salt

## Directions

1. Toast a little miltomate, grind with a cooked chile zambo and about ten or twelve Chiapa peppercorns
2. dissolve with a little water, one spoonful of vinegar, salt and serve cold
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Salsa de Mostaza (Mustard Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- mustard
- water
- salt
- vinegar
- oil
- egg yolks
- sugar

## Directions

1. Dissolve the mustard with water, salt, vinegar, oil and about four well-cooked and ground egg yolks
2. If desired, add a bit of sugar
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Salsa de Moyita (Moyita Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- very good broth
- vinegar
- pepper powder
- salt
- garlic
- parsley

## Directions

1. Put in a pot a quantity of very good broth, equal quantity of vinegar, pepper powder, salt, six or eight well-chopped garlic cloves, a bundle of parsley
2. Let boil until the garlic is well cooked
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Salsa de Perejil (Parsley Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- parsley
- vinegar
- salt
- oil
- water

## Directions

1. Grind parsley (only the leaf) in sufficient quantity, dissolve with vinegar, salt, a large spoonful of oil and a little water
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Salsa de Pimientos Morrones (Red Bell Pepper Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- six tomatoes
- six red bell peppers
- oil
- vinegar
- water
- salt

## Directions

1. Cook or roast six tomatoes, grind them with six red bell peppers
2. put a pan on the fire with two spoonfuls of oil
3. fry the tomato in this, adding half a cup of vinegar and half a cup of water, seasoned with salt
4. serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Salsa de Tomate Asado (Roasted Tomato Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- three or four tomatoes
- garlic clove
- cumin
- oregano
- pepper
- water
- salt
- vinegar
- oil

## Directions

1. Roast three or four tomatoes, peel and chop very finely
2. grind one garlic clove and some cumin, oregano, pepper
3. add water, salt, a little vinegar and fry in a hot spoonful of oil
4. if desired it can be served cold
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Salsa Holandesa (Dutch Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- oil
- tomatoes
- onions
- oregano
- cloves
- water
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Put in a pan a large spoonful of oil, add four whole tomatoes, four onions
2. After boiling five minutes, grind the tomato with oregano and two cloves and return to the oil with sufficient water and a bit of vinegar
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Salsa Holandesa (Dutch Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- one large spoonful of oil
- four whole tomatoes
- four onions
- oregano
- two cloves

## Directions

1. Put a large spoonful of oil in a pan
2. add four whole tomatoes and four onions
3. after boiling five minutes, grind the tomato with oregano and two cloves
4. return to the oil with sufficient water and a little vinegar
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Salsa Inglesa (English Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- three hard egg yolks
- oil
- bread flour
- broth
- capers
- pepper powder
- salt
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Chop three hard egg yolks, put two spoonfuls of oil in a pan
2. add one spoonful of bread flour, gradually add broth while stirring until it becomes a thin sauce
3. add the egg yolk and about ten chopped capers, pepper powder, salt and one large spoonful of vinegar
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Salsa para Carnes (Sauce for Meats)
body:
## Ingredients

- beef broth
- white wine
- salt
- pepper powder
- lemon peel
- bay leaf
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Put a glass of broth, half a glass of white wine, salt, pepper powder, a piece of lemon peel, a bay leaf, half a cup of vinegar
2. Let boil for four to six hours and strain
3. Serves for all kinds of meats
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Salsa para Coliflor (Cauliflower Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- cauliflower
- salt
- water
- vinegar
- oil
- three roasted tomatoes
- Castilian pepper
- oregano
- onion
- olives
- capers

## Directions

1. Cook the cauliflower in pieces in salted water and remove it
2. place in half a cup of vinegar and two spoonfuls of oil for two hours
3. grind about three roasted tomatoes with Castilian pepper and a little oregano
4. dissolve this with the same vinegar in which the cauliflower is
5. arrange on a platter and well seasoned with salt, cover the cauliflower with this sauce
6. add onion sliced and blanched with boiling water, olives and capers
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Salsa Rubia (Blonde Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- flour
- oil or butter
- broth

## Directions

1. Toast a little flour until it just colors
2. put a spoonful of oil or butter in a pan
3. add the flour and gradually add broth while stirring constantly
4. serves with any meat
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Salsa Suprema (Supreme Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- oil or lard
- four strained tomatoes
- pepper powder
- salt
- one large spoonful of vinegar
- broth of chicken or good stew
- four egg yolks

## Directions

1. Put a spoonful of oil or lard in a pan
2. add four strained tomatoes, pepper powder, salt, one large spoonful of vinegar and a little chicken broth or good stew broth
3. finally, add four egg yolks to serve as a light sauce
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Salsa Tártara (Tartar Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- nine egg yolks
- three cooked egg yolks
- two tablespoons of oil
- drops of lemon
- five or six onion heads
- capers
- olives
- cooked egg white

## Directions

1. Beat nine egg yolks until they are very stiff
2. Add three cooked egg yolks, well ground or broken with a mortar
3. Continue beating the mayonnaise, adding the oil drop by drop along with drops of lemon
4. When it is well thick, add five or six finely chopped onion heads, capers, olives, and the cooked egg white cut into small pieces
5. This sauce is served with fish and potato salad
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Salsa Xelaju (Xelaju Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- tomato
- three dried chiles
- two garlic cloves
- salt

## Directions

1. Cook sufficient tomato with three dried chiles, grind with about two garlic cloves
2. add salt and mix well
3. serve with potatoes or meat; it is more suitable for traveling
4. if desired, fry small fish and cover with this sauce
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sandwiches con Pavo (Turkey Sandwiches)
body:
## Ingredients

- turkey
- French mustard
- pepper powder
- hard egg yolk
- German bread
- butter
- tomato
- mayonnaise

## Directions

1. Chop the turkey very finely, more than one can of devil ham.
2. Mix with one tablespoon of French mustard, pepper powder, and one hard egg yolk, well crumbled, forming a paste.
3. Cut slices of German bread into rounds.
4. Coat with butter and cover with paste.
5. Place a slice of tomato (without seeds) on top and cover with mayonnaise.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sandwiches de Caviar (Caviar Sandwiches)
body:
## Ingredients

- onion, finely chopped
- caviar
- bread slices
- butter (optional)

## Directions

1. Chop onion finely and mix with caviar
2. Have bread slices already prepared
3. Spread bread with butter if desired, or simply spread with caviar
4. Assemble sandwiches
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sandwiches de Hígado de Ganso (Goose Liver Sandwiches)
body:
## Ingredients

- bread slices
- butter
- goose liver
- cheese (butter cheese, Swiss, or Flanders)
- French mustard (optional)

## Directions

1. Spread bread slices with butter
2. Cover with a layer of goose liver
3. Alternatively, use a thin slice of butter cheese, Swiss cheese, or Flanders cheese instead of butter
4. Or spread with French mustard if desired
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sandwiches de Jamón del Diablo (Deviled Ham Sandwiches)
body:
## Ingredients

- cooked turkey meat, more than one large can of deviled ham
- mustard, one tablespoon
- pepper powder
- hard-boiled egg yolk, one
- bread, round slices
- butter
- tomato, peeled and seedless
- mayonnaise

## Directions

1. Chop the cooked turkey meat which should be more than one large can of deviled ham
2. Mix with one tablespoon of mustard, pepper powder and one hard-boiled egg yolk well crumbled
3. Mix well to form a paste
4. Cut round slices of bread the size of a tomato
5. Spread with butter
6. Put the paste on top, a slice of peeled tomato without seeds and cover with mayonnaise
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sandwiches de Pavo (Turkey Sandwiches)
body:
## Ingredients

- bread slices
- fresh washed butter
- turkey slices
- china paper

## Directions

1. Spread bread slices with very fresh washed butter
2. Place turkey slices one finger thick on top
3. Cover with another bread slice
4. Wrap in china paper
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sangre de Carnero (Lamb Blood)
body:
## Ingredients

- Lamb blood
- Water
- Salt
- Fat pieces and scraps
- Lard
- Tomato
- Onion
- Garlic clove
- Hierbabuena (mint)
- Parsley
- Black pepper powder
- Pickled vegetables
- Capers
- Oregano powder

## Directions

1. Put all the fat pieces and scraps in water with salt
2. After one hour of boiling, add the lamb blood, stirring from the bottom so it does not stick
3. After ten minutes, remove and drain in a colander
4. Put in a pan on the fire with two spoonfuls of lard
5. Add plenty of peeled and minced tomato, onion, a garlic clove, hierbabuena, parsley, the finely minced blood, pickled vegetables, capers, black pepper powder, salt and oregano powder
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Santo Domingo (Santo Domingo Bean and Rice Dish)
body:
## Ingredients

- beans
- two spoonfuls of lard
- salt
- one pound of beans
- six ounces of rice
- water
- one tablespoon of lard
- tomato and onion, chopped
- four bundles of chipilín leaves
- another tablespoon of lard

## Directions

1. Cook the beans as previously described
2. When the beans are half-cooked, add two spoonfuls of lard and salt
3. The day before serving, in a dish combine for one pound of beans: six ounces of rice with water, salt, one tablespoon of lard, tomato and chopped onion
4. Parboil about four bundles of chipilín leaves, remove the water, and add to the rice
5. Take care not to stir it so it does not fall apart
6. Leave it and the next day add the beans when they are already cooked, with another tablespoon of lard
7. Let it boil on very low heat
8. After half an hour of cooking it can be served
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sardinas (Sardines)
body:
## Ingredients

- three green guaque chiles, roasted and peeled
- salt
- lemon juice
- two or three onions
- vinegar
- pepper powder
- sardines with oil
- pickles in mustard
- fried bread slices

## Directions

1. Roast and peel three green guaque chiles
2. Cut them into very thin strips and place with salt and lemon juice
3. Slice two or three onions very thinly and place in this same juice for three hours
4. Remove and place in vinegar with salt and a little pepper powder
5. Arrange alternating layers of this mixture and sardines with their oil on a platter
6. Top with a layer of pickles in mustard
7. Cover the edge of the platter with fried bread slices
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sardine Omelette (Tortilla con Sardinas)
body:
## Ingredients

- Eggs
- Sardines

## Directions

1. Beat the egg as in the others.
2. Prepare one can of sardines for every six eggs.
3. Mix well with the egg.
4. Make the omelette as in the previous recipes.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Scrambled Eggs with Ham (Huevos Revueltos con Jamón)
body:
## Ingredients

- Ham (York or domestic), cooked
- Eggs
- Salt
- Butter

## Directions

1. Chop some ham, whether York or domestic, very well cooked.
2. Mix it with two eggs per person.
3. Season with salt.
4. Add it to a tablespoon of very hot butter.
5. Stir with great lightness so they mix well.
6. Ensure they come out tender but not raw.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sesos a la Milanesa (Brains Milanese Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- calf brains
- salt
- broth from boiled meat (optional)
- egg, beaten
- bread powder
- manteca (lard)
- tender lettuce leaves

## Directions

1. Remove the brains with great care so they do not break
2. Place in a cloth with salt or, if not, in the broth from boiled meat
3. Once cooked, let all the water drain from them
4. Split and coat in beaten egg and then in bread powder
5. Fry in hot manteca over very low heat
6. When well browned, place on a tender lettuce leaf and serve with whatever you wish
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sesos a la Suiza (Swiss Brains)
body:
## Ingredients

- brains
- water
- vinegar
- six eggs
- one glass milk
- two tablespoons flour
- salt
- nutmeg
- green beans

## Directions

1. Place brains in water; after ten minutes, remove the skin and cook in vinegar.
2. When cooked, let cool and slice.
3. Coat a baking pan with butter and place the brain slices in it.
4. Beat six eggs, one glass of milk, and two tablespoons of flour together.
5. Beat the eggs to stiff peaks and then mix in the milk and flour; season with salt and a bit of nutmeg.
6. Cover the brains with this mixture and place in the oven for ten minutes.
7. Serve with string bean salad.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sesos en Huevo (Brains in Egg)
body:
## Ingredients

- brains
- eggs
- salt
- flour
- tomato
- onion
- water
- achiote or flour

## Directions

1. Cook the brains and let them cool, then dry them with a clean cloth.
2. Beat two eggs, first the whites until stiff, then mix in the yolks.
3. Add salt and a little flour to the beaten eggs.
4. Wrap the brain slices in the egg mixture and fry them in hot lard.
5. Fry a peeled and chopped tomato in a little lard, the same as the onion.
6. When fried, add water and breadcrumb powder with a bit of achiote or a little flour dissolved in water, making a thin sauce.
7. Season the sauce with salt and a little pepper.
8. Cover the brains with this sauce and serve hot.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sesos en Huevo (Brains in Egg)
body:
## Ingredients

- brains
- water
- lemon juice
- onion
- parsley
- bay leaf
- salt
- egg
- lard
- fried potatoes
- raw tomato

## Directions

1. Cook the brains in water with lemon juice (half a lemon), onion, parsley, a bay leaf and salt.
2. When cooked, remove them and cut into desired shape.
3. Wrap them in beaten egg and fry in very hot lard over low heat.
4. Serve with fried potatoes, lemon slices, and slices of raw peeled tomato.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sesos en Huevo (Brains in Egg)
body:
## Ingredients

- calf brains, cooked
- eggs (two)
- salt
- flour

## Directions

1. After cooking the brains, let them cool and then dry with a very clean cloth
2. Beat two eggs, first the whites until well stiffened, then beat in the yolks
3. Add salt and a little flour
4. Wrap the brain slices in this mixture and fry in manteca
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sesos en Mostaza (Brains in Mustard Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- calf brains
- salt
- Castilian pepper powder
- french mustard
- vinegar

## Directions

1. After cooking the brains, peel and slice them very evenly
2. Place on a platter and season with salt and a little pepper powder
3. Prepare a sauce by dissolving a little french mustard in a bit of water with a little salt, a little Castilian pepper powder, and a tablespoon of vinegar
4. Bathe the brains with this sauce
5. Serve cold
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sesos en Salsa de Tomate (Brains in Tomato Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- tomato
- guaque chile
- cumin (optional)
- thyme
- achiote (annatto)
- calf brains, cooked and sliced

## Directions

1. Cook a little tomato with a guaque chile
2. Grind, if desired, with a little cumin; if not, with a sprig of thyme and a small piece of achiote
3. Fry this and add the brain, which should already be well cooked and sliced into even slices
4. Serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sesos en Vino (Brains in Wine)
body:
## Ingredients

- calf brains
- salt
- red wine
- water
- thyme sprig
- onions (two)
- bay leaf
- butter
- flour

## Directions

1. Remove the brains with great care so they come out whole
2. Place in a serving dish and cover with equal parts water and red wine, adding salt, a sprig of thyme, two onions, and a bay leaf
3. Let the brains cook in this
4. In hot butter fry a tablespoon of flour and add the broth in which the brain cooked, making sure it becomes a thin sauce
5. Add the brain in slices to this sauce, let it come to a light boil, and serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sesos Encapirotados (Breaded Brains)
body:
## Ingredients

- white bread
- small peppers
- cloves
- salt
- parsley
- lard
- butter
- oil
- lemon

## Directions

1. Make white bread powder with small peppers and cloves.
2. Mix in salt and some chopped parsley.
3. Grease a pan with a little lard.
4. Place a layer of this bread powder, then a layer of cooked and sliced brains, another layer of bread, and another layer of brains, ensuring the last layer is bread.
5. Add a tablespoon of butter, one of oil, and a few drops of lemon.
6. Cook over two fires.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sesos Sobre Canapé (Brains on Canapé)
body:
## Ingredients

- bread
- lard
- butter
- cooked brains
- egg
- breadcrumb powder
- chard
- tomato
- onion
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Fry very thin slices of bread in very hot lard and butter.
2. In this same lard, fry the cooked brain coated in egg and then in breadcrumb powder.
3. When these slices are well fried, place them on the bread slices.
4. Arrange on a platter and around the edge place chard fried in butter with tomato, onion and half a tablespoon of vinegar.
5. Serve hot.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Shrimp and Small Fish Omelette (Tortilla de Camarón y Pescaditos)
body:
## Ingredients

- Dried shrimp
- Small fish
- Eggs
- Butter

## Directions

1. Grind two ounces of dried shrimp and one of small fish.
2. Beat four eggs as in the previous recipes.
3. Mix everything well.
4. Form the omelette in hot butter.
5. Fry over very low heat.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa a la Alemana (German-Style Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- four ounces of flour
- two eggs
- one cup of milk
- a few grains of salt
- one tablespoon of butter
- chicken
- chorizo
- pitted olives
- green chile
- pre-cooked noodles
- broth
- minced parsley
- fried seasoning paste
- pepper powder
- one tablespoon of flour fried in butter

## Directions

1. Take four ounces of flour and mix it with two eggs, one cup of milk, a few grains of salt, and one tablespoon of butter
2. Knead it very well
3. Using a mold or the rim of a glass, cut out small rounds and fill them with chicken, chorizo, chopped olives, and green chile
4. Seal the edges and fry them in very hot butter
5. Place a layer of these tartlets in the soup tureen and a layer of noodles that have been pre-cooked
6. Cover with broth that has been seasoned with minced parsley, fried seasoning paste, pepper powder, and one tablespoon of flour fried in butter
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa a la Chapina (Chapina Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- Broth
- Pepper powder
- Chopped parsley
- Ground meat
- Saffron
- Cumin
- Cinnamon
- Castilian pepper
- Whole egg
- Egg yolk
- Rice (one ounce)
- Eggs
- Flour
- Salt
- Lard

## Directions

1. After preparing the broth well, strain it and add pepper powder and chopped parsley
2. Make small meatballs with the well-ground meat, adding as spices: saffron, cumin, cinnamon and Castilian pepper
3. Mix all this with the meat, adding one whole egg and one yolk
4. In this proportion grind one ounce of well-soaked and dried rice
5. Beat two eggs, first the whites and then the yolks
6. Mix in flour and a little salt
7. Have a pan with well-heated lard ready
8. Drop the egg mixture well mixed with flour by spoonfuls making very small fritters
9. Remove them golden
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa a la Chilena (Chilean-Style Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 fat hen
- 3 cloves spice
- 3 bay leaves
- onions
- butter
- potatoes
- petit pois
- various vegetables

## Directions

1. Clean a fat hen and cook it in very low heat with three cloves spice, three bay leaves and onions well browned in butter
2. When the hen is tender, remove it and add the broth and sufficient potatoes until they fall apart
3. Add a little petit pois and various vegetables in very small pieces
4. Debone the hen and make meatballs from the meat as follows: finely chop an onion head, add a little powdered pepper, two eggs and a little flour or white bread powder, mix very well and make small meatballs
5. Drop them into the broth; as soon as it boils, remove immediately and serve very hot
6. If desired, add a glass of dry sherry
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa a la Chilena (Chilean-Style Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- one fat hen
- eight cloves
- two bay leaves
- three onions browned in butter
- potatoes
- small amount of peas
- carrots
- green beans
- chayote squash
- potato
- parsley
- tomato
- minced onion
- flour or white bread without sweetening
- dry sherry (optional)

## Directions

1. Clean a fat hen well and simmer it over low heat for three hours
2. Add eight cloves, two bay leaves, and three onions browned in butter
3. When the hen is tender, remove it and add enough peeled potatoes to the broth, leaving them until they break down
4. Add a small amount of peas, carrots, green beans, chayote squash, and potato, all cut into very small pieces
5. Debone the hen and mince the meat until it is like ground meat
6. Make a small seasoning mixture of onion and peeled and finely chopped tomato
7. Add the hen meat with a little flour or a little white bread without sweetening
8. Mix very well with a small spoon and form small meatballs by taking them in small quantities and dropping them into the broth
9. As soon as it boils, remove from heat and serve hot
10. If desired, add a small glass of dry sherry
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa a la Italiana (Italian Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- Various vegetables in small pieces
- Water
- Salt
- Bacon (two ounces if available)
- Onion (equal quantity to the bacon)
- Parsley (equal quantity to the bacon)
- Garlic clove (one, minced)
- Cooked or minced meat (half a pound)
- Salt and pepper
- Cooked and ground tomato
- Pasta or rice

## Directions

1. Cook various vegetables in small pieces.
2. When parboiled, change the water and add the necessary salt and two ounces of bacon if available.
3. In a pan, fry equal quantities of onion, parsley, and one minced garlic clove.
4. When the onion is golden, add half a pound of well-cooked or minced meat with salt and pepper.
5. When the meat releases its juices, add sufficient cooked and ground tomato.
6. When this is cooked, add it to the vegetables along with a little pasta or rice and serve hot.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa a la Mexicana (Mexican-Style Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- güisquil (chayote)
- green beans
- tender beans
- noodles
- pasta
- tender peas
- tortillas
- lard
- cheese
- water or broth
- fried seasoning

## Directions

1. Mince güisquil, green beans and tender beans, parboil noodles and pasta, fry small rounds of tender peas; once cooked, drain the water and have tortilla pieces, well fried, prepared
2. Put in a lard-lined pan, one layer of tortilla, one of vegetables, one of cheese and so on successively, making sure the last layer is tortilla
3. Cover with a little hot water with fried seasoning or broth if desired, letting it boil for a quarter hour over very low heat
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa a la Napolitana (Neapolitan Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- Good broth
- All kinds of vegetables
- Mushrooms or champignons
- Chopped parsley
- Pepper powder
- Thyme branch
- Clove
- Bay leaf
- Sausage slices

## Directions

1. Prepare a good broth as before and mince all kinds of vegetables
2. If there are mushrooms, mince them well, and if not use champignons
3. Add chopped parsley and pepper powder
4. Separately, cook a thyme branch, a little clove and a bay leaf
5. Strain this water well and add it to the soup
6. Place some slices of well-cleaned sausage in the tureen
7. Pour the soup and serve very hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa a la Pavesa (Pavesa Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- Good broth, preferably chicken
- French bread slices
- Butter
- Eggs

## Directions

1. Prepare a good broth, preferably chicken broth.
2. Fry slices of French bread in butter.
3. Place them in special pans for this purpose.
4. Cover with the broth and place two eggs on each one, being careful that they do not break but come out whole.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa a la Pavesa (Pavesa Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- good broth, preferably from hen
- French bread
- butter
- eggs

## Directions

1. Prepare good broth, preferably from hen.
2. Fry slices of French bread in butter and put them in special pans for this.
3. Cover with broth and put two eggs on each one, making sure they do not break but come out whole.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa a la Portuguesa (Portuguese Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- Water
- Sheep head
- Fat hen
- Sheep brain
- Chayote
- Green beans
- Carrot
- Potato
- Sheep liver
- Chicken meat
- Sheep tongue
- Fried seasoning
- Pepper powder
- Chopped parsley
- Flour
- Butter
- Saffron water
- French bread slices
- Lard
- Egg

## Directions

1. Prepare a pot with the necessary water according to the number of people dining
2. When it reaches its first boil, drop in a sheep head and a fat hen well prepared
3. Cook a sheep brain
4. Let everything cook for four hours
5. When everything is cooked, remove it
6. Prepare in advance chayote, green beans, carrot, and potato cut into very small pieces
7. When the vegetables are half-cooked, mince all the liver, chicken meat, and sheep tongue and drop it into the broth
8. Before adding the vegetables, strain the broth through a filter
9. Add sufficient fried seasoning, pepper powder, chopped parsley, a little flour fried in butter until well browned, and half a cup of saffron water
10. Prepare small fritters by slicing very small and thin pieces of French bread and frying them in lard
11. Fill them with the brain that will be finely minced with pepper powder and chopped parsley
12. Add a pinch of salt, mix very well and fill a small bread round
13. Cover with another piece of fried bread and wrap in well-beaten egg
14. Fry over very gentle heat
15. Once all fritters are made, drop them into the soup for a light boil, as excessive boiling will break them down
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa Caldosa (Broth-based Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- good broth
- noodles, vermicelli, or any pasta, parboiled
- fried seasoning
- pepper powder
- two eggs
- rice powder
- chopped parsley
- fried flour

## Directions

1. Prepare very good broth
2. Add noodles, vermicelli, or any parboiled pasta to the broth along with fried seasoning and pepper powder
3. Prepare small fritters in advance by beating two eggs (first the white, and when it is stiff add the yolk) with rice powder
4. Fry the fritters in desired size, preferably very small
5. Just before serving, add the fritters to the soup
6. Add chopped parsley and fried flour
7. Serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa Caldosa (Hearty Broth with Meatballs and Fritters)
body:
## Ingredients

- good broth
- one tablespoon of flour fried in lard or butter
- fried seasoning paste of tomato, onion, and garlic
- minced parsley
- half a pound of loin or very tender beef
- small piece of cinnamon
- small amount of cumin
- small amount of saffron
- eight Castilian peppercorns
- two eggs
- two eggs beaten
- one ounce of rice flour
- lard

## Directions

1. Prepare a good broth and add one tablespoon of flour fried in lard or butter, fried seasoning paste of tomato, onion, and garlic, and minced parsley
2. Grind half a pound of loin or very tender beef and mix in a small piece of cinnamon, a small amount of cumin, a small amount of saffron, and eight Castilian peppercorns
3. Grind everything well and mix with two eggs
4. Using the tip of a knife, drop meatballs into the broth
5. Make small fritters with two beaten eggs mixed with one ounce of rice flour
6. Fry them by small spoonfuls in hot lard
7. Just before serving, add them to the broth for a light boil
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa Capirotada (Capirotada Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- mixed vegetables
- potato
- noodles
- pasta
- bread
- lard
- butter
- rice
- cheese
- hard-boiled eggs
- meat broth
- saffron water

## Directions

1. Prepare all kinds of well-minced and cleaned vegetables, potato sliced, parboil noodles and pasta, fry bread slices in lard, have some common rice cooked in lard, line a pan with a little lard or butter
2. Place one layer of rice, one of vegetables, one of fried bread, one of noodles, one of fresh cheese slices, one of hard-boiled egg slices, begin with another layer of rice and so on as before, making sure the last layer is bread slices, fresh cheese and hard-boiled egg slices
3. Add meat broth and a little saffron water just enough to cover the layers, letting it boil for a quarter hour
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Albóndigas (Meatball Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- good broth
- half a pound of ground meat
- cumin
- Castilian pepper
- saffron
- cinnamon stick, finely ground
- three eggs
- fried bread
- chopped parsley
- rice fritters (optional)

## Directions

1. Prepare very good broth
2. Grind meat with cumin, Castilian pepper, saffron, and finely ground cinnamon
3. Mix in three eggs and blend very well
4. Drop meatballs of desired size into the prepared broth
5. Just before serving, add fried bread and chopped parsley
6. If desired, add rice fritters
7. Serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Alverja (Pea Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- sufficient peas
- broth
- fried seasoning
- pepper powder
- fried bread

## Directions

1. Cook sufficient peas
2. When well cooked, grind and strain like a purée
3. Drop into broth that has been prepared beforehand
4. Add fried seasoning and a little pepper powder
5. Serve with fried bread
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Arroz a la Valenciana (Valencian Rice Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound rice
- oil
- tomato
- onion
- 1 clove garlic
- bell peppers
- 1 tender fat chicken
- saffron water
- pepper
- green peas
- olives
- capers
- sardines
- hard-boiled eggs

## Directions

1. Pass the rice through a strainer so it comes out very whole, weigh one pound of rice and wash it lightly, better if washed a day before; if it is local rice, wash it, if it is bomb rice only clean it and fry it in oil
2. When fried, add sufficient fried seasoning of peeled tomato, onion, one clove of garlic and a small jar of finely chopped bell peppers
3. Meanwhile, have parboiled a tender fat chicken, add the chicken pieces and broth in which it was cooked
4. Add one cup of saffron water and pepper powder, and if desired, some green peas
5. Use no more than one liter of water per pound of rice, cover and let it boil over very low heat so the rice comes out fluffy, do not stir
6. When cooked, after about half an hour, place on a platter and top with olives, capers, sardines and hard-boiled egg slices
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Arroz a la Valenciana (Valencian Style Rice Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- rice
- oil
- fried seasoning of peeled tomato, onion, garlic and roasted peppers
- one young fat chicken
- chicken broth

## Directions

1. Pass the rice through a colander so it comes out very whole
2. Weigh one pound of rice and wash lightly, better if washed the day before
3. If local rice, wash it; if of the bomba variety only clean it and fry in oil
4. When fried add sufficient fried seasoning made from peeled tomato, onion, one garlic clove and a small can of finely chopped roasted peppers
5. Have pre-simmered one young fat chicken beforehand
6. Add the chicken pieces and the broth in which it was cooked
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Arroz Comun (Common Rice Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- rice
- lard
- garlic clove
- ripe tomato
- saffron water
- achiote

## Directions

1. Wash the rice very well without soaking and remove excess water
2. For one pound of rice use half a pound of lard and one garlic clove
3. Fry very well without browning
4. When fried add a piece of ripe tomato and then cover with saffron water
5. Make on very low heat so the rice comes out fluffy
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Arroz con Apazote (Rice Soup with Epazote)
body:
## Ingredients

- rice
- water
- salt
- saffron water
- fried seasoning
- epazote (apazote)

## Directions

1. Prepare the rice as in the previous recipe without saffron
2. When the rice is cooked add a sprig of epazote that has been washed with very hot water so it gives a very light boil
3. When serving, leave the epazote if desired or remove it
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Arroz con Camarones (Rice Soup with Shrimp)
body:
## Ingredients

- rice
- water
- salt
- saffron water
- fried seasoning of tomato, onion and garlic
- two ounces of peeled shrimp
- one teaspoon of lard

## Directions

1. Wash the rice very well without soaking
2. Add to a pot with sufficient water to cover the rice
3. Add salt, a bit of saffron water, fried seasoning made from tomato, onion and finely chopped garlic
4. Add two ounces of peeled shrimp and one teaspoon of lard
5. Boil with only one light stir so the rice does not break apart
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Arroz con Repollo (Rice Soup with Cabbage)
body:
## Ingredients

- cabbage
- tomato
- onion
- 1 clove garlic
- hen broth
- cinnamon stick
- 1 bay leaf
- 1 sprig parsley
- rice
- hen pieces
- 3 ounces shrimp
- pepper
- saffron water
- parsley

## Directions

1. Parboil some cabbage, and once parboiled, have the fried seasoning of tomato, onion and one clove of garlic ready
2. In this seasoning, add the cabbage and chicken broth that will have been cooked beforehand with a cinnamon stick, a bay leaf and a sprig of parsley
3. Add all of this to the rice, which should already be fried as in the previous recipes
4. Add the hen pieces and about three ounces of well-cleaned shrimp, with pepper powder and a little saffron water, cover the rice and let it reduce over very low heat
5. Serve with chopped parsley
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Arroz con Salsa de Tomate (Rice Soup with Tomato Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 ounces rice
- 2 eggs
- salt
- 4 to 6 tomatoes
- 6 Castilian peppers

## Directions

1. Soak three ounces of rice; when well soaked, wash and grind it, moistening with a little water or milk if desired
2. Once ground, add two eggs (white and yolk), mix very well with a little salt
3. Fry the mixture in small curdles, as small as possible
4. Grind four or six tomatoes with six Castilian peppers
5. In a pan, layer the fried rice cakes and sauce alternately
6. Bring to a boil for ten minutes and serve
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Arroz Molido (Ground Rice Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- three ounces of rice (for ten persons)
- three eggs
- one small glass of milk
- salt
- tomato
- onion
- one clove of garlic
- broth
- pepper powder
- chopped parsley

## Directions

1. Soak three ounces of rice for two hours in water
2. Remove and let it air dry
3. Grind it very finely
4. Mix in three eggs (white and yolk), one small glass of milk, and salt
5. Make fritters of desired size and fry them
6. Fry tomato, onion, and one clove of garlic
7. Add broth and pepper powder to this fried mixture
8. Add the fritters to the broth
9. When it comes to a boil, add chopped parsley
10. Serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Cabeza de Carnero (Sheep Head Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- Sheep head
- Sheep feet
- Sheep offal
- Cooked ham
- Cooked egg yolks
- Castilian peppers
- Cloves
- Cinnamon
- Nutmeg powder
- Raw eggs
- Flour or bread powder
- Salt
- Chopped parsley
- Lard
- Broth
- Fried seasoning
- Butter
- Toasted bread slices
- Dry sherry

## Directions

1. Cook a sheep head, feet, and offal
2. Once everything is well cooked, remove it and mince the brains with everything else
3. Mix in finely minced cooked ham
4. Stir in three cooked and ground egg yolks with Castilian peppers, two cloves, a small piece of cinnamon, and a little nutmeg powder
5. Mix in two raw eggs, a little flour or sweetless bread powder, salt to taste and chopped parsley
6. Well mixed, make small fritters in hot lard
7. Prepare in advance a good broth like the previous soups, adding fried seasoning, chopped parsley, and flour fried in butter
8. Drop the fritters into it and let them boil five minutes in the tureen
9. Prepare toasted bread slices and pour the soup over them, adding a small glass of dry sherry
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Camarones (Shrimp Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- lard and oil
- plenty of garlic
- two chopped and peeled tomatoes
- two lettuce leaves
- two pasilla chiles, soaked in hot water
- three ounces of toasted shrimp
- water or broth
- fried bread

## Directions

1. Fry plenty of garlic in lard and oil
2. Remove the garlic and fry two chopped and peeled tomatoes with two lettuce leaves in the same fat
3. Grind two pasilla chiles soaked in hot water and three ounces of toasted shrimp and mix everything well
4. When everything is well fried, add water if it is Lent, if not add broth
5. Have fried bread in the soup bowl and pour this mixture over it
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Camarones Frescos (Fresh Shrimp Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- shrimp
- three cooked egg yolks
- pepper
- salt
- lard
- chopped parsley
- fish broth or beef broth
- fried seasoning
- pepper powder
- piece of French bread soaked in milk
- dry sherry

## Directions

1. Cook the shrimp and when done carefully remove the shell and meat
2. Grind the shrimp meat with three cooked egg yolks and mix with pepper, salt, a bit of lard and chopped parsley
3. Fill the shrimp shells with this mixture and place on a platter
4. Cover with fish broth if it is Lent, if not use beef broth made with fried seasoning, pepper powder and a piece of French bread soaked in milk
5. Bring to a boil and when ready to serve add a glass of dry sherry
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Cangrejos (Crab Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- ten crabs
- salt
- half pound of well-washed rice
- fried seasoning of tomato, onion and garlic
- saffron water
- a teaspoon of lard

## Directions

1. Wash ten crabs very well with boiling water, removing the thin parts from their legs
2. Cook the crabs with salt
3. After they have boiled for half an hour, add half a pound of well-washed rice without soaking it
4. Add fried seasoning made from tomato, onion and finely chopped garlic, a bit of saffron water and a teaspoon of lard
5. Leave until the rice is cooked, making sure it comes out whole; do not stir, only move the pot so it does not stick
6. Serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Carne (Meat Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- One pound of very tender meat
- Salt
- Pepper
- Two roasted tomatoes
- One roasted onion
- Flour
- Toasted bread

## Directions

1. Prepare one pound of very tender meat by half-roasting it
2. Grind it with salt, pepper, two roasted tomatoes and one roasted onion
3. Let this well-ground mixture fall into a well-prepared broth
4. Add one teaspoon of flour well-browned and when it has boiled two or three times serve with toasted bread
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Carne de Paloma (Pigeon Meat Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- pigeon meat
- bread soaked in milk
- pepper
- nutmeg
- flour
- lard
- roasted onion
- roasted tomato
- parsley
- broth
- vegetables of all kinds
- peas
- chard

## Directions

1. Grind one pound of pigeon meat with a piece of bread soaked in milk, a little pepper, and nutmeg
2. Fry a little flour in lard and when it changes color add roasted onion, squeezed roasted tomato, and chopped parsley
3. When well fried, add sufficient broth, pepper powder, nutmeg, vegetables of all kinds, peas, and chard
4. Add the little pieces of meat gradually until cooked
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Carnero (Mutton Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- onion
- tomato
- basil leaf
- mutton head
- broth
- fried seasoning
- pepper powder
- flour
- butter
- sherry

## Directions

1. Fry finely chopped onion, tomato, and a basil leaf
2. When well fried, add the well-cooked mutton head cut into pieces
3. When it has taken on a golden color, add the broth in which the head was cooked with fried seasoning, pepper powder, and a tablespoon of flour fried in butter
4. Add a little sherry
5. Serve with toasted bread
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Cataluña (Catalan Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- Roasted tomato
- Onion stalks
- Parsley
- Mint leaves
- Cooked egg yolks
- Cumin powder
- Cinnamon
- Clove
- Saffron
- Broth from boiled meat
- Noodles
- Cheese powder
- Green beans
- Peas
- Chayote
- Parsley sprig
- Toasted bread

## Directions

1. Mince a portion of roasted tomato, some onion stalks, parsley and mint leaves
2. Add three cooked egg yolks with a little cumin powder, cinnamon, clove and saffron, all in small quantities
3. Add broth from boiled meat making a thin sauce
4. Add noodles according to the number of people eating
5. Add cheese powder, green beans, peas and chayote, all minced into small pieces
6. Add a sprig of parsley
7. Cover and let boil
8. If desired, add toasted bread and serve
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Elotes (Corn Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- good broth
- one fat hen or two chickens
- one brain, well cleaned
- corn
- four or five egg yolks

## Directions

1. Prepare good broth, add one fat hen or two chickens and one well-cleaned brain.
2. When cooked, strain the broth.
3. Buy one or two cans of corn, depending on the quantity being made, let it boil for half an hour, and add the chicken and brain cut into cubes.
4. Before serving, beat four or five egg yolks well in the soup tureen, pour the soup, and serve hot.
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Espárragos (Asparagus Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- six pounds of beef bone
- salt
- leeks
- onion
- one hen or two plump chickens
- finely chopped vegetables: carrots, tender green beans, chayote, finely chopped cabbage, broad beans, and peas
- asparagus
- corn (canned)
- fried seasoning made of finely chopped tomato, onion, and one clove of garlic
- chopped parsley
- pepper powder
- one large spoonful of flour
- butter

## Directions

1. Wash six pounds of beef bone very well and place in a pot of boiling water
2. Add salt, leeks, and onion, and skim until the broth is very clear
3. Add one hen or two plump chickens
4. Let the broth simmer for three or four hours
5. Remove the meat and strain the broth
6. Drop finely chopped vegetables into the strained broth: carrots, tender green beans, chayote, very finely chopped cabbage, broad beans, and peas
7. When well cooked, finely chop the hen meat and the asparagus
8. If there are no asparagus pieces, add a can of corn
9. Prepare fried seasoning made of finely chopped tomato, onion, and one clove of garlic with chopped parsley and pepper powder
10. Fry one large spoonful of flour in butter and add to the soup
11. Let it come to a boil two or three times and serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Frijol Blanco (White Bean Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- white beans, well cooked
- sufficient seasoning for frying
- good broth
- pepper powder
- thin slices of bread, well fried
- chopped parsley

## Directions

1. When the beans are well cooked, grind them and strain
2. Fry with sufficient seasoning
3. Add very good broth and pepper powder
4. In the soup tureen, place thin slices of well-fried bread
5. Add chopped parsley
6. Serve very hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Gallina (Hen Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- Tail or hip bone
- One fat hen
- Leeks (or onion if not available)
- Turnips
- Carrot
- Cabbage
- Chickpeas
- Tomato, finely chopped
- Onion
- Four egg yolks, hard-cooked and well-ground
- Sherry wine (optional)

## Directions

1. Cook tail or hip bone and one fat hen
2. Add plenty of leeks to the broth and if not available, use onion
3. Add turnips, carrot, cabbage and chickpeas
4. When everything is well-cooked, separate the broth and add to it a fried mixture composed of very finely chopped tomato, onion and four hard-cooked egg yolks well-ground
5. In this broth add all the hen meat finely chopped along with the well-cooked chickpeas
6. Serve adding a small glass of sherry wine if desired
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Garbanzo (Chickpea Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- beef broth
- chickpeas
- pepper powder
- chopped parsley

## Directions

1. Bring beef broth to a boil
2. Drop in the chickpea and let it boil for ten minutes
3. Remove and place in cold water over strong and steady heat
4. When well cooked, grind it
5. Add very good broth, pepper powder, and chopped parsley
6. Serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Harina (Flour Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- milk
- flour
- egg yolks
- salt
- egg
- flour for coating
- lard
- broth
- peas
- potatoes
- fried seasoning
- pepper powder
- parsley

## Directions

1. In a glass of milk put two ounces of flour, two egg yolks, a few grains of salt and cook
2. As soon as it becomes a paste, remove it and let it cool
3. Then knead with an egg and form balls wrapped in flour
4. Fry them in very hot lard, place in the tureen and cover with a broth prepared in advance
5. The broth should have peas and chopped potatoes, fried seasoning, pepper powder, and parsley
6. Thicken the broth with a teaspoon of flour fried in butter
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Harina y Queso (Flour and Cheese Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- Four ounces of flour
- Two ounces of butter
- Two ounces of grated cheese
- Two eggs
- Salt
- Broth

## Directions

1. Mix four ounces of flour, two ounces of butter, two ounces of grated cheese and two eggs with a few grains of salt
2. Knead very well and stretch with a rolling pin
3. Dry some very thin small tortillas, roll them up and let them fall into a broth prepared as the others
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Hongos (Mushroom Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- sufficient meat for broth
- chayote, carrot, cabbage, green beans, broad beans, peas (all well washed and finely chopped)
- sufficient quantity of mushrooms
- fried seasoning
- saffron water
- pepper powder
- one spoonful of flour
- butter
- chicken, finely chopped

## Directions

1. Prepare a good broth with sufficient meat
2. Chop chayote, carrot, cabbage, green beans, broad beans, and peas very finely
3. Add a very sufficient quantity of mushrooms
4. When everything is well cooked, add fried seasoning, a little saffron water, pepper powder, and one spoonful of flour fried in butter
5. Add the finely chopped chicken
6. Serve the soup hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Imitación de Tortuga (Mock Turtle Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- beef leg
- beef meat
- Castilian pepper
- saffron
- egg yolks
- nutmeg powder
- salt
- flour
- broth
- red wine

## Directions

1. Cook a beef leg until well done, debone it and chop finely
2. Grind one pound of beef meat with a little Castilian pepper and a little saffron
3. Mix the ground meat with the leg
4. Add three egg yolks, nutmeg powder, and salt
5. Mix everything well and form balls wrapped in flour
6. Drop them into a good broth prepared in advance
7. In the tureen, add three well-cooked and ground egg yolks and a little red wine
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Leche (Milk Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- milk
- flour
- butter
- nutmeg
- eggs

## Directions

1. In a glass of milk, dissolve two and a half ounces of flour, two ounces of butter, and a little nutmeg
2. Cook until it forms a ball and let it cool
3. When cold, mix in three egg whites and three egg yolks
4. When well mixed, form little balls and wrap in flour
5. Drop them into broth prepared in advance
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Ostras (Oyster Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- beef tail
- chicken
- fat hen or gallina gorda
- sheep head
- green peas
- green beans
- chayote (güisquil)
- carrots
- potatoes
- fried seasoning (recado frito)
- two tablespoons flour browned in butter
- chopped parsley
- pepper powder
- two or more cans of oysters

## Directions

1. Prepare a broth with beef tail, chicken or fat hen, and a sheep head
2. Boil all of this for three hours
3. Strain the broth and put it back on the fire
4. Add tender green peas, green beans, chayote, carrots and potatoes, all finely chopped
5. When cooked, add fried seasoning, two tablespoons of flour browned in butter, chopped parsley, pepper powder and two or more cans of oysters according to taste
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Ostras (Oyster Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- Tail
- Chickens or fat hen
- One sheep's head
- Green tender peas
- Green beans
- Chayote
- Carrots
- Potatoes
- Fried mixture
- Two tablespoons of flour browned in butter
- Chopped parsley
- Pepper powder

## Directions

1. Prepare a broth with tail, chickens or fat hen and one sheep's head
2. When all this has boiled for three hours remove the broth, strain it and put it back on the heat
3. Add green tender peas, green beans, chayote, carrots and potatoes, all very finely chopped
4. When everything is cooked add the fried mixture, two tablespoons of flour browned in butter, chopped parsley and pepper powder
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Ostras con Leche (Oyster Soup with Milk)
body:
## Ingredients

- butter
- plenty of garlic
- one tablespoon of flour
- one cup of milk
- one can of oysters with their brine
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. Fry plenty of garlic in butter
2. When fried, remove it and in that same butter add one tablespoon of flour without letting it brown
3. Add one cup of milk without making it too thick
4. As soon as it boils, add one can of oysters with all their brine
5. Serve with lemon juice
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Ostras con Seso (Oyster Soup with Brains)
body:
## Ingredients

- brains
- egg
- bread powder
- lard
- one tablespoon flour
- chopped parsley
- pepper powder
- milk
- one can of oysters
- fried bread

## Directions

1. Cook the brains and when cold cut into small pieces
2. Coat in beaten egg and then in bread powder
3. Fry in hot lard and in that same lard fry one tablespoon of flour, chopped parsley and pepper powder
4. Add milk to make a thin sauce and add one can of oysters
5. Serve with the brains and slices of fried bread
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Pan con Gallina (Bread Soup with Chicken)
body:
## Ingredients

- bread slices
- oil
- lard
- cooked chicken breast
- egg yolks
- roasted tomatoes
- Castilian pepper
- cloves

## Directions

1. Fry bread slices in oil and lard and place in the tureen
2. Remove the breast from a well-cooked chicken
3. Grind all the breast meat with four hard-cooked egg yolks, two roasted tomatoes, eight Castilian peppercorns, and three cloves
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Pan con Gallina (Bread Soup with Hen)
body:
## Ingredients

- Bread slices
- Oil
- Lard
- Hen, well cooked
- Four egg yolks, hard-cooked
- Two roasted tomatoes
- Eight Castilian peppercorns
- Three cloves
- A small piece of cinnamon
- Red wine (optional)

## Directions

1. Fry bread slices in oil and lard, and place in the soup tureen
2. Remove the breast from the well-cooked hen and grind it together with four hard-cooked egg yolks, two roasted tomatoes, eight Castilian peppercorns, three cloves and a small piece of cinnamon
3. Pour everything into the broth to boil once and cover the bread slices with this mixture
4. Add a little red wine if desired
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Pan con Salsa de Avellanas (Bread Soup with Hazelnut Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- thin slices French bread
- hen giblets
- hazelnuts
- hen broth
- bay leaf
- oregano
- hard-boiled eggs
- parsley
- chorizo
- brains
- egg

## Directions

1. Fry thin slices of French bread, mince the giblets of a hen that will have been well cooked, and place in a pan alternately one layer of bread and one of liver, making sure the last layer is bread
2. Peel about twenty hazelnuts, dissolve them in a little of the hen broth and cover the soup with this, making sure the broth and hazelnut mixture boils first with a bay leaf and a bit of oregano powder
3. Let the soup boil over two fires and when serving, garnish with hard-boiled egg slices and chopped parsley, chorizo slices and brain slices breaded in egg
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Pan Sencilla (Simple Bread Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- bread
- butter
- water
- salt
- parsley, chopped

## Directions

1. Make bread slices and fry in butter
2. When fried, place in a pan
3. Add water, salt to taste, and a little chopped parsley
4. When it comes to a boil, serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Papa (Potato Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- potato
- good broth
- fried seasoning
- sliced fried bread
- grated hard cheese powder
- chopped parsley

## Directions

1. Cook the potato
2. Grind it in a meat grinder
3. Dissolve in very good broth
4. Add fried seasoning
5. Serve with slices of fried bread, hard cheese powder, and chopped parsley
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Papa a la Francesa (French Potato Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- potatoes
- milk
- salt
- butter

## Directions

1. Boil peeled potatoes until well cooked
2. Pass them through a strainer
3. Add a little milk, salt to taste, and a little butter
4. Let it come to a boil a few times
5. Serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Papas (Potato Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- broth
- fried seasoning
- egg yolks
- nutmeg
- potatoes
- butter
- flour

## Directions

1. Prepare a broth as before with fried seasoning and three cooked and ground egg yolks with a little nutmeg
2. Cook four ounces of well-peeled potatoes, grind them, and dissolve with a teaspoon of butter
3. Mix well, form balls wrapped in flour
4. Drop them into the broth to give it a boil
5. Serve with chopped parsley
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Pata de Res (Beef Foot Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- One beef foot
- Three ounces of well-cooked pork loin
- Two eggs
- Bread powder
- Parsley, chopped

## Directions

1. Cook one beef foot until well done
2. Chop it with three ounces of well-cooked pork loin
3. Mix in two eggs (yolk and white) and a little bread powder
4. Fry in small cakes or balls as desired
5. Have the broth prepared as in the previous recipes and add the cakes to boil once
6. Serve with chopped parsley
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Pescado (Fish Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- carrots
- onions
- sufficient oil
- four to six sprigs of parsley
- two bay leaves
- one head of garlic crushed
- salt
- pepper powder
- pieces of fish
- bread

## Directions

1. Cut carrots into very thin slices and onions
2. Fry with sufficient oil, add four to six sprigs of parsley, two bay leaves and one crushed head of garlic
3. Add sufficient salted water and pepper powder
4. When it has boiled enough, strain through a colander and add pieces of fish (if dried fish, soak it in water the night before)
5. Toast bread, place in the soup bowl and pour this thin broth over it
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Pescado Seco (Dried Fish Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- half pound of chickpeas
- salt
- one large tablespoon of lard
- cabbage
- carrot
- chayote (güisquil)
- potatoes
- a small piece of plantain
- one dried stockfish (zunte)
- three or four roasted tomatoes
- two roasted onions
- three roasted garlic cloves
- a bit of cumin
- a bit of Castilian pepper
- a bit of oregano
- a small piece of achiote
- one French bread soaked in water and salt

## Directions

1. Soak half a pound of chickpeas in water the day before
2. The next morning early put on fire with the same soaking water
3. When half cooked add salt and one large tablespoon of lard
4. After boiling five hours on slow even heat add cabbage, carrot, chayote, potatoes and a small piece of plantain, all finely chopped
5. Soak dried stockfish in very hot water and after ten minutes of soaking remove all the bones and add to the vegetables and chickpeas to boil for half an hour
6. Grind three or four roasted tomatoes, two roasted onions and three roasted garlic cloves
7. Take a bit of cumin, a bit of Castilian pepper, a bit of oregano, a small piece of achiote and grind with all the above and one French bread soaked in water and salt
8. Dissolve with a bit of cold water and add to the broth
9. After boiling half an hour serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Pollo (Chicken Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- beef tail or hip
- fat chicken
- vegetables of all kinds
- flour
- butter
- pepper powder
- parsley

## Directions

1. Prepare very good broth with beef tail or hip
2. Add a clean fat chicken to it
3. When the chicken is well cooked, remove it
4. Strain the broth through a filter
5. Add vegetables of all kinds, parboiled and chopped
6. When everything is cooked, add a teaspoon of flour fried in butter and pepper powder
7. Add all the chicken meat cut into little pieces
8. Serve hot with chopped parsley
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Puré de Tomate (Tomato Puree Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- tomatoes
- broth
- butter
- onion
- parsley
- cornstarch
- heavy cream

## Directions

1. Roast the tomatoes
2. Pass them through a strainer
3. Add the necessary broth prepared in advance
4. In a separate saucepan with a little butter, brown chopped onion and parsley
5. Add one or two tablespoons of cornstarch and let it brown for a moment
6. Mix into the soup
7. Just before serving, add a glass of heavy cream
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Rabo (Oxtail Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- Three to four pounds of raw oxtail
- Lard
- Cold water
- Bay leaves
- Thyme branch
- Chopped parsley
- Fried seasoning
- Flour
- Butter

## Directions

1. Take three to four pounds of raw oxtail cut into very small pieces
2. Once everything is finely minced, drop in a spoonful of well-heated lard and be careful to stir it so it does not stick
3. When browned, cover with cold water, two bay leaves and a thyme branch, a little chopped parsley, fried seasoning, and a spoonful of flour fried in butter
4. Cover and let it boil for four hours (charcoal fire should frequently be used)
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Raviolis (Ravioli Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- Two bundles of spinach
- A little water
- A little saltpetre
- Two ounces of ham
- One brain
- One ounce of marrow
- Pepper powder
- Clove
- Cinnamon
- Two tablespoons of grated Flemish cheese
- Four ounces of flour
- Two eggs
- Salt
- Butter
- Lard
- Good broth
- Toasted bread powder
- Pepper powder
- Clove
- Cinnamon
- One cup of fresh cream

## Directions

1. Cook two bundles of spinach in a little water with a little saltpetre
2. When cooked, drain very well
3. Separately, cook two ounces of ham, one brain and one ounce of marrow
4. When all is cooked, chop with the spinach and add pepper powder, clove, cinnamon and two tablespoons of grated Flemish cheese
5. Take four ounces of flour and knead with two eggs; if the dough is too stiff add another, with a little salt
6. Mix very well and stretch this dough with a rolling pin on a table greased with butter
7. Cut out small circles of the desired size and fill with the previously chopped mixture
8. Seal the edges or cut with a knife, dust flour on the edge and fry in lard with salt over very gentle heat
9. Place on a platter and cover with very good broth thickened with toasted bread powder, pepper powder, clove, cinnamon, one cup of fresh cream and enough broth to boil once, if desired as a soup
10. If desired dry, only cover the ravioli and let it reduce over two fires
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Riñones (Kidney Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- good broth
- kidney
- finely chopped vegetables
- chard, finely chopped
- brain slices, well cooked and fried
- bread powder

## Directions

1. Prepare very good broth
2. Wash the kidney very well and chop it very finely
3. Drop into the broth with finely chopped vegetables and a little finely chopped chard
4. Just before serving, add slices of well-cooked brain fried with bread powder
5. Serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Salchichón (Sausage Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- ham, lean from the leg
- peeled and chopped tomato
- onion
- garlic
- broth
- green beans
- fava beans
- güisquil squash
- carrot
- peas
- flour
- butter
- cooked sausage

## Directions

1. Fry a piece of ham
2. When fried, add peeled and chopped tomato, onion, and garlic
3. Have a good broth prepared
4. Add this seasoning with green beans, fava beans, güisquil, carrot, and tender peas, which should be chopped and parboiled in advance
5. Add a tablespoon of flour fried in butter
6. Serve in a tureen with slices of cooked sausage
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Sardinas (Sardine Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- good broth
- all kinds of finely chopped vegetables
- fried seasoning
- eggs (amount depends on soup quantity)
- sardine
- vinegar
- pepper powder

## Directions

1. Prepare very good broth and add all kinds of finely chopped vegetables and fried seasoning
2. Beat the necessary eggs, being careful to beat the white and yolk separately; add the yolk to the white when it is stiff
3. Add a little sardine and make small fritters
4. Just before serving, add the fritters to the broth
5. Add a little vinegar and pepper powder
6. Serve hot
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Seso (Brain Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- chard
- brain
- beef tail or hip bone
- dry grated cheese
- pepper powder
- flour
- lard
- garlic
- parsley
- onion
- tomato
- red wine
- fried bread

## Directions

1. Cook chard and brain in sufficient beef tail or hip bone
2. When the brain is cooked, remove it and let it drain well
3. Drain the chard and dry it very well with a cloth
4. Grind the chard and mix well with the brain
5. Add grated dry cheese and pepper powder
6. Form balls wrapped in flour
7. Fry in lard without browning and place in the tureen
8. Fry well-crushed garlic in lard, remove it, and in the same lard fry chopped parsley, chopped onion, and two or three ground tomatoes
9. Add sufficient broth and pour into the tureen with the balls
10. Also add pieces of fried bread and grated cheese; if desired, a little red wine
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Sesos (Brain Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- one garlic clove
- onion
- four roasted ground tomatoes
- oil
- pepper powder
- oregano powder
- parsley, chopped
- dry cheese powder
- lard
- tortillas
- cooked brains

## Directions

1. Fry one garlic clove, onion, and four roasted ground tomatoes in one spoonful of oil
2. Add pepper powder, oregano powder, chopped parsley, and dry cheese powder
3. Coat a pan with one spoonful of lard
4. Have tortillas well fried
5. Dip tortillas in the sauce
6. Layer tortillas, then cooked brains sliced, then tortillas, alternating layers and ensuring the last layer is tortillas
7. Pour the remaining sauce on top
8. Place in the oven or over two fires to cook
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Tartaritas (Tartarita Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- Carrots
- Water
- Lard or butter
- Flour
- Milk
- Broth
- Chopped oysters
- Butter

## Directions

1. Cook the carrots, grind them and strain in a little water
2. Fry in lard or butter and a small amount of flour
3. Add milk to the carrots
4. Add broth and some chopped oysters with a little butter
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Tartaritas de Arroz (Rice Tartarita Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- Three ounces of rice
- Two egg whites
- Rice flour
- One tablespoon of grated cheese
- Lard for frying
- Half a pound of very tender loin
- Cinnamon
- Eight Castilian peppercorns
- A little saffron
- A small piece of cinnamon
- Two eggs
- Salt
- Bread or flour powder
- Pepper powder
- Parsley, chopped

## Directions

1. Soak three ounces of rice; when well-soaked wash it and place in the sun for a moment
2. Grind it, obtaining a fine powder from it
3. Beat two egg whites and when well-stiff mix in the yolks, rice flour and one tablespoon of grated cheese
4. Fry in very small cakes in hot lard
5. Have good broth prepared as the others
6. Grind half a pound of very tender loin with a little cinnamon, eight Castilian peppercorns, a little saffron and a small piece of cinnamon
7. When all is well-ground, mix in two eggs, a little salt, the fried mixture and one teaspoon of bread or flour powder
8. With the tip of a spoon or knife make small meatballs and drop into the broth
9. When it boils twice add the tartaritas to boil once so they do not fall apart and serve with pepper powder and chopped parsley
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Tortilla (Tortilla Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- tortilla
- lard
- annatto (achiote)
- fried seasoning
- salt
- mint leaves
- fresh cheese

## Directions

1. Fry the tortilla in lard with a bit of annatto, when fried remove it and place it in a pan
2. Add fried seasoning and cover with hot salted water, mint leaves and slices of fresh cheese
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Tortilla con Seso (Tortilla Soup with Brains)
body:
## Ingredients

- roasted tomato
- onion
- parsley
- oil
- grated dry cheese
- pepper
- cooked brains
- tortillas
- lard
- salt
- 1 clove garlic
- 4-5 cooked tomatoes
- oregano

## Directions

1. Fry roasted tomato, onion and parsley; add one tablespoon of oil, grated dry cheese and pepper powder
2. Drop thin slices of previously cooked and well-cleaned brains into this
3. Have tortillas fried in lard with salt and in the same lard fry one minced clove of garlic, onion, about four or five cooked and ground tomatoes
4. Add pepper powder, oregano and one tablespoon of oil; soak the tortillas in this sauce and arrange them alternately in a dish, one layer of tortillas and one of brain slices, until finished
5. Cover with the sauce in which the brains were cooked and place over two fires
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Tortuga (Turtle Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- carrot
- onion
- bay leaf
- tomato
- parsley
- beef pieces
- broth
- turtle broth
- flour
- Madeira wine
- meat juice
- lemon juice
- turtle

## Directions

1. In a saucepan put carrot, onion, bay leaf, tomato, parsley and some pieces of beef
2. Fill the saucepan with broth, using half turtle broth
3. Add a little flour and let everything cook for five hours
4. Strain this broth through a colander, adding some Madeira wine, meat juice and lemon juice
5. Cut the turtle into small pieces and add to the rest
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Tortuga (Turtle Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- turtle
- tomato
- garlic
- onion
- sweet pepper
- powdered pepper
- salt
- lemon juice
- fried bread slices with butter
- soda cracker crumbs
- 10 tomatoes
- 1 onion head
- 1 cup of good broth
- 2 beaten eggs
- butter

## Directions

1. Cook the turtle as for a broth soup and chop the meat
2. Fry the meat in a soffritto made of tomato, garlic, onion, sweet pepper, powdered pepper, and salt
3. Prepare lemon juice in fried bread slices with butter, some soda cracker crumbs, and a sauce made from 10 tomatoes and 1 ground and fried onion head dissolved in 1 cup of good broth
4. In a baking dish, layer butter, bread and crumbs, turtle meat, and tomato sauce until full
5. Cover with 2 beaten eggs as if to coat in egg and place in a gentle oven or over two fires
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa de Zanahorias (Carrot Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- Four ounces of flour
- Three egg yolks
- Water with salt
- One tablespoon of butter or lard
- Lard for frying
- Cheese, grated
- Young chayote
- Well-cooked carrots
- Green peas
- Well-prepared broth
- Pepper
- Parsley, finely chopped

## Directions

1. To four ounces of flour add three egg yolks, a little water with salt and one tablespoon of butter or lard
2. Knead very well for a quarter hour and let rest for another quarter hour
3. After this, stretch the dough with a rolling pin and cut out shapes with a mold as desired
4. Brown in hot lard
5. In the soup tureen place a layer of tartaritas, one of grated cheese, one of tender chayote and well-cooked carrots, another of tartaritas and another of peas
6. Pour very well-prepared broth over it and add pepper and very finely chopped parsley
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa Gren Bichen (Green Broth Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- flour
- egg
- butter, one tablespoon
- good chicken broth or with beef leg
- green beans, parboiled
- carrot, parboiled
- peas, parboiled
- potato, sufficient
- ground tomato
- onion
- garlic, crushed and fried
- parsley, chopped
- flour, toasted and fried in butter
- pork meat, finely chopped
- chicken
- sweet pepper, chopped

## Directions

1. Knead a little flour with egg and one tablespoon of butter, let it rest
2. Have a good chicken broth ready, if desired with beef leg
3. To this broth add parboiled vegetables: green beans, carrot, peas, sufficient potato, ground tomato, onion, crushed and fried garlic, chopped parsley
4. If it is too thin, add a little flour toasted and fried in butter
5. Roll out the dough very thin and cut into small squares
6. Fill with finely chopped pork meat or chicken with its seasoning fried
7. Seal the edges very well and just before serving drop them into the broth, letting them boil only once
8. Add chopped sweet pepper to the broth
9. The small empanadas can also be filled with brains, mushrooms or vegetables
10. Alternatively, filled ravioli cooked the same way and wrapped in egg can be used instead
source_title: Consejos prácticos sobre cocina, pastelería y repostería al estilo del país

title: Sopa Juliana (Julienne Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- Green beans
- Turnips
- Carrots
- Cabbage
- Peas
- Butter
- Bay leaves
